title: Strategic Video Clipper — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Fill in the application form and record a Loom introducing yourself:




/to/v0OA9cFs



Important note: Put “VC” + [Your Name & Family Name] in the “Name” field.



ROUND 2: Paid test task. You will receive long-form videos and create short clips in the same style.



MORE ABOUT US



Young Publisher:

title: Marketing Manager
description:
We produce stand-up comedy shows featuring top comedians and rising talent at venues in NYC, Los Angeles, and at pop-up venues across the country.



We’re looking for a marketing pro who knows how to sell tickets to live events. This role is focused on driving attendance and revenue, not just managing social media.



If you love comedy, understand digital marketing, and know how to turn online attention into people sitting in seats, we want to hear from you.



Responsibilities



Ticket Sales & Event Marketing



Develop and execute marketing strategies to drive ticket sales for live comedy shows



Launch and manage campaigns for weekly shows and special events



Optimize ticket sales through
 marketing, social media, paid ads, and partnerships



Digital Marketing



Manage and optimize Instagram, TikTok, and other social channels



Run paid advertising campaigns (Meta / Instagram / Google)



Track performance and adjust campaigns based on results



 Marketing



Create and manage
 newsletters and promotional blasts



Segment audiences and improve open and conversion rates



Content & Promotions



Coordinate with comedians to promote shows to their audiences



Help develop viral or shareable comedy content



Identify creative marketing angles for shows



Partnerships & Promotions



Develop promotional partnerships with brands, influencers, and local organizations



Work with media outlets, podcasts, and newsletters to promote events



Analytics & Optimization



Track ticket sales performance



Identify what marketing efforts drive conversions



Continuously improve marketing funnels



Qualifications



Experience marketing live events, comedy shows, theater, or nightlife



Strong understanding of digital marketing and social media



Experience with Meta Ads / paid social campaigns



Experience with
 marketing platforms



Ability to think creatively and execute quickly



Strong communication and organizational skills



Bonus if you:



Are a fan of stand-up comedy



Have experience promoting live entertainment



Compensation



Hourly



Performance bonuses based on ticket sales growth may be available

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Cold Caller
description:
Hello,



Thank you for applying for this position. Based on your experience, I believe you could be a strong fit for our team.



Before moving forward, I want to make a few things very clear, so please take the time to read this entire message carefully.



Company Overview

- We use the ReadyMode dialer.

- All leads are provided by us.

- We primarily target Georgia, but we work with many clients and are actively expanding across the United States.

- Our call center currently has around 80 callers, along with:

- A QC (Quality Control) department

- Managers

- Developers to assist with systems and technical setup



You will not be left alone or unsupported.



What Day One Looks Like



Step 1:

You will receive an SOP (Standard Operating Procedure).

- This must be completed within 24 hours.

- It includes scripts, objection handling, dialer instructions, and processes.

- If you are an experienced caller, this will not be complicated.



Step 2:

You will be added to a group chat that includes:

- QC

- Operations

- A developer



This is to make sure you get help immediately if needed.



Step 3 – Initial Trial Period:

- Your first 3–5 working days will be on paper leads.

- Pay during this phase is $10 per QC-passed, qualified appointment set.

- This period is to:

- Confirm you can hit our KPIs

- Show you that we pay consistently and fairly

- This allows both sides to build trust before fully committing.



Example:

If you set 50 QC-passed appointments in 3 days, you earn $500.

There is no cap during this phase.



KPIs (Key Performance Indicators)

- 1 QC-passed appointment per working day, or

- 30 QC-passed appointments per month



Compensation Structure

- Base salary: $300 per month



If you set less than 30 QC-passed appointments in a month, you are paid at the paper-lead rate:

- Example: 15 appointments × $10 = $150



If you meet or exceed KPIs:

- 40 appointments: $300 base + $150 bonus = $450

- 50 appointments: $300 base + $200 bonus = $500

- 60 appointments: $300 base + $300 bonus = $600



In addition to this, there are weekly and monthly floor bonuses, which is why most callers in this role typically earn $800–$1,000+ per month.



If you set more than 60 appointments, compensation moves to $5 per lead beyond that point.



Schedule & Expectations

- Working hours: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM

- Includes:

- 1 hour training

- 1 full break

- 20 minutes for call dispositions

- We require 8 hours on the dialer, but we care more about production than strict hours.

- If you produce strong results, we are flexible. We prioritize quality and performance over sitting at a desk.



Next Step

If you are still interested and fully understand what this role offers, please reply to this
 confirming that you’ve read and agree with the expectations outlined above.



This message should answer nearly all questions upfront.



To Apply please, attach Resume and Voice Recording

title: Real Estate Cold Caller / Lead Manager (Fluent English Required)
description:
READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING — THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR BEGINNERS



We are hiring a highly fluent English-speaking real estate cold caller / lead manager with experience speaking to motivated sellers. This role is performance-driven, fast-paced, and demanding. If your English is not near-native and confident on the phone, do not apply.







Position Overview



You will be responsible for calling homeowners, holding real conversations, identifying motivated sellers, and setting high-quality, fully qualified appointments that pass internal QC.



This is not a script-reading role. You must be comfortable guiding conversations, asking direct financial questions, and handling objections professionally.



Scripts, systems, and ongoing training will be provided.







Work Schedule

 • Monday – Friday

 • 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST

 • Full-time commitment

 • Reliability and punctuality are mandatory







Daily KPI (Non-Negotiable)

 • 3 QC-PASSED appointments per day

 • Appointments must meet internal qualification standards



Failure to consistently hit KPIs will result in removal from the role.







Your Responsibilities



You must confidently and accurately gather:

 • Property address & ownership confirmation

 • Asking price

 • Seller motivation

 • Timeline to sell

 • Condition & needed repairs

 • Mortgage balance (if any)

 • Liens or legal issues

 • Listing status or Realtor contracts

 • Occupancy status



You will also:

 • Build rapport quickly

 • Push for clarity when sellers are vague

 • Handle objections calmly and professionally

 • Accurately log all data in the CRM

 • Set clean, well-noted appointments for the acquisitions team







Requirements (DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THESE)

 • Fluent English (spoken & written) — clear communication is required

 • Prior real estate cold calling experience REQUIRED

 • Experience speaking with motivated sellers

 • Comfortable discussing money, timelines, and pain points

 • Coachable and able to apply feedback quickly

 • Strong work ethic and mental stamina

 • Reliable internet, headset, and quiet workspace







Training & Support

 • Scripts provided

 • Structured onboarding

 • Ongoing training and call feedback

 • Clear qualification standards and QC process



You will not be left guessing — but execution is on you.







Bonuses & Incentives

 • Monthly floor bonuses

 • High performers can earn $600+ USD per month in bonuses

 • Bonuses tied to:

 • QC-passed appointments

 • Call quality

 • Consistency and attendance



Deduction period: 



60 QC passed leads a month are mandatory & the minimum, if you set example only 45 QC passed leads this month we will have to subtract the salary



$600/60 =$10.00 & in that case 45 leads x 10=$450 payout for that month + any floor bonuses you might have achieved 







Who This Role Is NOT For

 • Beginners with no real estate experience

 • Script readers who fold under pressure

 • Anyone uncomfortable asking direct financial questions

 • People looking for an “easy” job







How to Apply



Include:

 1. Your real estate calling experience (specific)

 2. Your spoken English level

 3. Markets you’ve called

 4. Average daily appointment numbers in past roles

 5. A voice recording introducing yourself (REQUIRED)



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Sylius / Symfony Developer
description:
About Us



We are building an innovative, upcoming online marketplace. We are moving away from traditional auction models to a dual-sales approach: "Buy It Now" and "Make an Offer."



We operate a full-service consignment model where we handle the physical inventory, inspecting, photographing, and storing the goods, while providing a seamless digital experience for both buyers and sellers. Our platform will integrate advanced features like a digital wallet for sale proceeds, hybrid payments, complex shipping logistics (including "Hold in Cellar"), and multi-channel sales via Google Shopping, Amazon Marketplace and eBay.



We are a small, experienced founding team looking for a highly skilled technical partner to build the core platform.



The Role



We are seeking a Senior Sylius / Symfony Developer to architect and build the platform from the ground up. You will be responsible for taking our detailed technical specifications and turning them into a robust, scalable, and secure e-commerce marketplace.



This is not a standard e-commerce build. You will be developing complex custom modules on top of the Sylius framework to handle our unique business logic.



Key Responsibilities



• Platform Architecture: Design and implement the core platform using Sylius and Symfony.

• Custom Module Development: Build sophisticated custom modules, including:



• Offer Engine: A state machine-driven system allowing buyers to submit offers and sellers to accept/reject them.

• Wallet & Hybrid Payments: A digital wallet system for sellers to hold proceeds, integrated with Stripe Connect for complex payouts and hybrid (wallet + card) checkout flows.

• Warehousing & Logistics: A backend module to manage physical inventory, barcode generation, storage locations, and consolidated shipping ("Hold in Cellar").

• Multi-Channel Integrations: Automated feeds for Google Shopping and a comprehensive two-way integration with the eBay API.

• API Development: Design and build RESTful APIs to support a future mobile application.

• Third-Party Integrations: Integrate with Stripe Connect, shipping providers, and potentially external identity/age verification services.

• Quality Assurance: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure platform stability and security.



Required Skills & Experience



• Deep Sylius Expertise: Proven experience building complex, custom e-commerce platforms using Sylius. You must understand how to extend Sylius core components, state machines, and resource management.

• Symfony Mastery: Strong background in PHP 8+ and the Symfony framework.

• Marketplace Experience: Previous experience building multi-vendor marketplaces or platforms with complex payment splitting (Stripe Connect experience is highly desirable).

• API Design: Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs.

• Database Design: Strong SQL skills and experience with Doctrine ORM.

• Frontend Integration: While this is primarily a backend role, you should be comfortable working with Twig templates and integrating frontend assets.

• Testing: Commitment to automated testing (PHPUnit, Behat).



Work Setup



• Flexible hours: We are outcome-focused. Delivery matters more than specific hours logged.

• Collaboration: You will work directly with the founders and our UX/UI design team.



Application Questions (Required)



If this sounds like the challenge you've been looking for, please apply with your CV/LinkedIn, links to relevant GitHub repositories or live projects, and answers to the following questions:



1. Sylius Experience: Describe the most complex custom module or feature you have built on top of Sylius. What was the business problem, and how did you solve it technically?

2. Marketplace Payments: Have you worked with Stripe Connect or similar complex payment splitting systems? If so, briefly describe the implementation.

3. State Machines: Our "Make an Offer" feature requires a robust state machine (Pending -> Accepted/Rejected/Expired). How would you approach implementing this within the Sylius ecosystem?

4. MVP Delivery: If you had to deliver the core MVP (Buy It Now + Make an Offer + Basic Stripe integration) in 8-10 weeks, what would be your technical approach and what potential bottlenecks would you anticipate?

5. Availability & Rates: What is your general availability each week, and what is your expected salary?

6. What excites you most about joining a startup team building something new from the ground up?



Please also let us know why you are the right person, explain your experience and tell us why we should hire you.

title: Senior Medusa.js Developer
description:
About USs

We are building a next-generation, premium marketplace. We are moving beyond the traditional "Buy It Now" model to create a dynamic trading platform that includes a sophisticated "Make an Offer" negotiation engine, a digital wallet system, and a full-service physical consignment and warehousing operation.



This is not a standard e-commerce build. We are creating a complex, multi-sided marketplace with unique business logic, hybrid payment flows, and physical inventory management. We have chosen Medusa.js as our foundational architecture because we need total headless flexibility, robust custom workflows, and native marketplace capabilities.



The Role



We are seeking a Senior Medusa.js Developer to lead the technical architecture and development of the platform. You will be responsible for building the core custom modules that differentiate our business, integrating with third-party services, and ensuring the platform is scalable, secure, and performant.



You will work closely with the founding team to translate complex business requirements into elegant, maintainable Node.js/TypeScript code.



Key Responsibilities & Custom Modules to Build



1. The Offer Engine (State Machine): Build a robust negotiation system allowing buyers to submit offers, sellers to accept/decline/counter, and manage the complex state transitions and time-expirations of these offers using Medusa's Workflows SDK.



2. Digital Wallet & Hybrid Payments: Implement a user wallet system where users can hold funds from sales. Crucially, you must build a custom checkout flow that allows a single transaction to be split between wallet funds and a credit card (via Stripe Connect).



3. Warehousing & Consignment Module: Develop a custom backend module to manage physical inventory. This includes generating unique barcode IDs for incoming stock, tracking storage locations, and managing the "Hold in" logic (where buyers purchase but delay shipping to consolidate orders).



4. Stripe Connect Integration: Architect the complex payment splitting and automated payouts required for a multi-vendor marketplace, ensuring compliance and seamless onboarding for our consignors.



5. Multi-Channel Sync: Build robust integrations to sync our "Buy It Now" inventory with Google Shopping and eBay, ensuring real-time stock updates across all channels.



Required Skills & Experience



• Deep Medusa.js Expertise: Proven experience building complex, custom e-commerce solutions using Medusa.js (v1 or v2). You must understand its core architecture, plugin system, and Workflows SDK.



• Node.js & TypeScript: Expert-level proficiency in backend JavaScript/TypeScript development.



• Marketplace Architecture: Experience building multi-vendor marketplaces, handling split payments, and managing complex user roles.



• Stripe Connect: Deep understanding of Stripe Connect (Custom or Express accounts) for marketplace routing and payouts.



• API Design: Strong experience designing and consuming RESTful and GraphQL APIs.



• Database Management: Proficiency with PostgreSQL and Redis.



Work Setup



• Flexible hours / outcome-focused delivery: We care about what you build, not when you log on.



• Experienced Team: Work with a team running multiple SaaS brands and an established digital agency.



To Apply



Please submit:



1. Your CV or LinkedIn/GitHub profile.



2. Links to any relevant projects, demos, or code (specifically Medusa.js projects if possible).



3. Your answers to the following application questions.



Application Questions (Required)



If the above sounds like you, please apply. Your application will include the following questions:



1. What interests you most about building a complex, multi-sided marketplace?



2. Describe a previous project where you built a custom e-commerce solution or marketplace using Medusa.js. What was the most complex custom module you had to build, and how did you approach it?



3. We require a hybrid payment system where a user can pay for a $1,000 order using $400 from their digital wallet and $600 via credit card. How would you architect this custom checkout flow within Medusa.js and Stripe?



4. We need a robust "Make an Offer" engine with states like Pending, Accepted, Countered, and Expired. How would you leverage Medusa's Workflows SDK or custom services to build this state machine reliably?



5. If you had to deliver an MVP of this platform in 8–10 weeks, what would you prioritise, what would you defer, and what specific Medusa plugins or starters would you leverage to accelerate development?



6. What is your general availability each week?



7. What excites you most about joining a startup team building something new from the ground up?



8. What is your expected salary expectation?



9. Please also let us know why you are the right person, explain your experience, and tell us why we should hire you.

title: Senior Video Editor (Ai tools Expert) (Performance Marketing – DTC)
description:
Company: Lemon Adds

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-Time

Hours: PST overlap required



About Lemon Adds:

Lemon Adds is a performance-driven eCommerce marketing agency scaling DTC brands to 7 and 8 figures.

We operate at the intersection of paid media, creative strategy, and AI-driven production.

Our focus is simple: content that drives measurable revenue.



The Role

We are hiring an elite-level video editor focused on performance, not aesthetics.

This role combines direct response thinking, UGC-style execution, and AI-powered production. Your work will directly impact ad performance, conversion rates, and revenue across multiple DTC brands.



What You’ll Do

- Produce high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and X, with a strong focus on hooks, pacing, and conversion-driven structure.

- Edit and repurpose UGC and influencer-style content into performance creatives that feel native to each platform and are designed to convert.

- Use AI tools such as Runway, Pika, Descript, and ElevenLabs to scale production, including generating voiceovers, UGC-style content, and synthetic assets.

Work hands-on with Stable Diffusion (ComfyUI / A1111 or similar) to generate custom visual assets and integrate them into ad creatives.

- Translate creative briefs into direct-response videos using proven frameworks (hook ? problem ? solution ? proof ? CTA), and collaborate closely with media buyers and strategists.

- Continuously iterate based on performance data, producing multiple variations and identifying winning patterns.

-Help improve internal workflows by contributing to scalable editing and AI production systems.



Requirements:

*4–6+ years of professional video editing experience, with a strong focus on DTC or performance marketing.

*Proven ability to create high-converting ad creatives. Portfolio must reflect performance-driven work, not just visual quality.

*Strong experience with UGC and influencer-style editing, including raw footage, testimonial formats, and native-looking ads.

*Advanced proficiency in Premiere Pro and After Effects (or equivalent), with a deep understanding of short-form, mobile-first content.

*Hands-on experience with AI tools for video, voice, and content generation, and the ability to integrate them into production workflows.

*Practical experience with Stable Diffusion and tools like ComfyUI or A1111, including prompt control and asset generation.

*Strong understanding of direct response marketing, including hooks, retention, and conversion mechanics.

*Fluent English, proactive communication, and ability to work fully aligned with PST hours.



What Success Looks Like:

*Consistent output of high-performing creatives that drive measurable results.

*Ability to increase production volume without sacrificing performance.

*Contribution to scalable AI-driven creative systems within the team.

*Clear impact on campaign performance and client revenue.



Why Lemon Adds?

You’ll work with fast-scaling DTC brands and be part of a team that prioritizes results over fluff.

This is a high-ownership role with real growth potential, especially for someone who wants to operate at the forefront of AI and performance marketing.



How to Apply: 

Submit your portfolio with relevant performance ads, including UGC-style work and AI-generated content to 

Include a short Loom video walking through 1–2 ads you created and explaining why they performed.

title: Media Buyer - FB
description:
Joburn Pte. Ltd.



We're an AI-powered growth agency. We've driven over $5M in client revenue in two years — our flagship client went from $15K/month to over $1M ARR under our system.



We don't do "run some ads and see what happens." We build compounding growth machines: diagnostic audits, analytics pipelines, ad creative engines, CRM automation, and conversion tracking — all wired together so every dollar spent teaches us something.



The agency is scaling from a handful of high-touch clients to 50+ Growth Partner accounts. That's where you come in.



What you're actually doing



You're the person who makes sure campaigns are built right, running clean, and improving every week.



Here's what a typical day looks like:



Morning: Check in via Slack standup. Review yesterday's ad performance across client accounts in Meta Ads Manager. Flag anything bleeding money.

Mid-day: Launch new ad sets, swap out fatigued creatives, adjust budgets based on CPA and ROAS trends. Most of this takes 30–60 minutes per client — not days.

Afternoon: Pull performance data, build client reports that actually say something useful (not just screenshots of dashboards), and feed winning patterns back into our system so the next round of creative is sharper than the last.

You'll work primarily inside Meta Ads Manager 
 + Instagram), with more platforms coming as we scale. You'll also touch GoHighLevel (our CRM — tracking leads from ad click to closed deal), 
 (automation that routes creatives, pulls data, and syncs everything), and Supabase (where all the performance data lives).



You don't need to be an expert in all of those on day one. But you need to be fluent in Ads Manager. That's non-negotiable.



The AI part — read this carefully



Our system uses AI for roughly 90–95% of the operational work. Claude writes first-draft ad copy. 
 routes it through approval flows. HeyGen and ElevenLabs produce video creative. Supabase stores and surfaces the analytics.



Your job is the final 5–10%. The part that actually determines whether the money was well spent. You're checking that campaign structures make sense, audiences are right, budgets aren't misconfigured, and nothing's quietly wasting spend at 2am.



That 5–10% is where the skill lives. AI can generate. You d
 what ships.



And here's the part most job posts won't say: at some point, AI will handle media buying end-to-end. The people who thrive here are the ones who treat AI as a tool that makes them faster — not a threat they're competing against. If you understand that and want to be on the right side of it, we want to talk.



What we need from you



Must-haves:



Hands-on experience in
 Ads Manager. You've spent real budgets, managed real campaigns, and made real optimization decisions. Not "I completed a course." You should be able to open an unfamiliar ad account, audit what's running, and tell us what's broken within 30 minutes.

You think in hours, not days. When something needs doing, you do it now. Most tasks here are 30–60 minutes, maybe two hours. "I'll get to it by end of week" doesn't work here.

Analytical instinct. You see a CPL spike and you already have three hypotheses before anyone asks.

Detail obsession. Wrong UTM parameters, mismatched audiences, typos in ad copy — that stuff should physically bother you.

Rock-solid internet. Not "usually fine." You're managing live ad spend. A dropped connection at the wrong time costs real money.

Good to have:



Experience with GoHighLevel, 
, or any CRM/automation platform

Comfort working alongside AI tools (if you already use ChatGPT or Claude for work, say so)

Experience building client-facing performance reports — not just pulling numbers, but explaining what they mean and what to do next

What you get



Hourly role. You start at a rate that reflects where you are right now. Prove you can execute, and the rate moves up. We don't cap people who deliver results.

Performance incentives tied to the outcomes you drive. We reward people who make our clients money.

Training on our systems. You'll learn our AI stack, our creative frameworks, our reporting standards. We invest in people who are in it for real — but we can't teach you how to think. The foundations need to already be there.

A seat at a small, fast team. This isn't a 200-person agency where you're a cog. You'll work directly with the people building the system. Your input shapes how we operate.

100% remote. Work from wherever. Just be reachable, be fast, and deliver.

To apply



Reply with the subject line: "The capital of Japan is [your answer]"



If you can't follow that one instruction, we already have our answer.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
The executive assistant acts as the right hand to the owner, helping turn ideas into execution across programming, partnerships, marketing, and operations. This role ensures nothing falls through the cracks and that the business runs efficiently day-to-day while driving key initiatives forward.



Responsibilities include:

title: Media Buyer - VA
description:
Joburn Pte. Ltd.



We're an AI-powered growth agency. We've driven over $5M in client revenue in two years — our flagship client went from $15K/month to over $1M ARR under our system.



We don't do "run some ads and see what happens." We build compounding growth machines: diagnostic audits, analytics pipelines, ad creative engines, CRM automation, and conversion tracking — all wired together so every dollar spent teaches us something.



The agency is scaling from a handful of high-touch clients to 50+ Growth Partner accounts. That's where you come in.



What you're actually doing



You're the person who makes sure campaigns are built right, running clean, and improving every week.



Here's what a typical day looks like:



Morning: Check in via Slack standup. Review yesterday's ad performance across client accounts in Meta Ads Manager. Flag anything bleeding money.

Mid-day: Launch new ad sets, swap out fatigued creatives, adjust budgets based on CPA and ROAS trends. Most of this takes 30–60 minutes per client — not days.

Afternoon: Pull performance data, build client reports that actually say something useful (not just screenshots of dashboards), and feed winning patterns back into our system so the next round of creative is sharper than the last.

You'll work primarily inside Meta Ads Manager 
 + Instagram), with more platforms coming as we scale. You'll also touch GoHighLevel (our CRM — tracking leads from ad click to closed deal), 
 (automation that routes creatives, pulls data, and syncs everything), and Supabase (where all the performance data lives).



You don't need to be an expert in all of those on day one. But you need to be fluent in Ads Manager. That's non-negotiable.



The AI part — read this carefully



Our system uses AI for roughly 90–95% of the operational work. Claude writes first-draft ad copy. 
 routes it through approval flows. HeyGen and ElevenLabs produce video creative. Supabase stores and surfaces the analytics.



Your job is the final 5–10%. The part that actually determines whether the money was well spent. You're checking that campaign structures make sense, audiences are right, budgets aren't misconfigured, and nothing's quietly wasting spend at 2am.



That 5–10% is where the skill lives. AI can generate. You d
 what ships.



And here's the part most job posts won't say: at some point, AI will handle media buying end-to-end. The people who thrive here are the ones who treat AI as a tool that makes them faster — not a threat they're competing against. If you understand that and want to be on the right side of it, we want to talk.



What we need from you



Must-haves:



Hands-on experience in
 Ads Manager. You've spent real budgets, managed real campaigns, and made real optimization decisions. Not "I completed a course." You should be able to open an unfamiliar ad account, audit what's running, and tell us what's broken within 30 minutes.

You think in hours, not days. When something needs doing, you do it now. Most tasks here are 30–60 minutes, maybe two hours. "I'll get to it by end of week" doesn't work here.

Analytical instinct. You see a CPL spike and you already have three hypotheses before anyone asks.

Detail obsession. Wrong UTM parameters, mismatched audiences, typos in ad copy — that stuff should physically bother you.

Rock-solid internet. Not "usually fine." You're managing live ad spend. A dropped connection at the wrong time costs real money.

Good to have:



Experience with GoHighLevel, 
, or any CRM/automation platform

Comfort working alongside AI tools (if you already use ChatGPT or Claude for work, say so)

Experience building client-facing performance reports — not just pulling numbers, but explaining what they mean and what to do next

What you get



Hourly role. You start at a rate that reflects where you are right now. Prove you can execute, and the rate moves up. We don't cap people who deliver results.

Performance incentives tied to the outcomes you drive. We reward people who make our clients money.

Training on our systems. You'll learn our AI stack, our creative frameworks, our reporting standards. We invest in people who are in it for real — but we can't teach you how to think. The foundations need to already be there.

A seat at a small, fast team. This isn't a 200-person agency where you're a cog. You'll work directly with the people building the system. Your input shapes how we operate.

100% remote. Work from wherever. Just be reachable, be fast, and deliver.

To apply



Reply with the subject line: "The capital of Japan is [your answer]"



If you can't follow that one instruction, we already have our answer.

title: Senior Accountant / Management Accountant
description:
Senior Accountant (AU Client) – Xero Certified



Reports to: Managing Director

Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Employment Type: Full Time

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Manila Time



About the Role



Staff Connect Australia is recruiting on behalf of an established Australian business operating across multiple service divisions.



We are seeking a high-level, Xero-accredited Senior Accountant to take full ownership of the company’s financial systems, reporting, and compliance. This long-term role reports directly to the Managing Director and requires a detail-driven professional who can independently manage accounting operations while delivering accurate reporting and actionable financial insights to support business decisions.



This role is ideal for someone experienced in Australian accounting standards, multi-entity structures, and operational financial reporting.



Systems & Tools Environment

Xero

GeoOp

Live Payments Portal

Airtable

Slack



Certifications Required

- Xero Advisor Certified

- Xero Payroll Certified



Required Experience

- Australian BAS and IAS preparation

- Company tax return support (liaising with external accountants as needed)

- Experience working with Australian clients or accounting firms



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Reconciliations

-Maintain accurate financial records in Xero for all entities

- Perform bank, credit card, and loan reconciliations

- Allocate GST codes and track job-related costs

- Review and code expense entries with proper documentation

- Reconcile inter-entity transactions and maintain a clean general ledger

-

Accounts Payable (Suppliers & Contractors)

- Process and schedule invoices for payment

- Verify invoice accuracy against purchase orders or job references

- Reconcile supplier statements and maintain positive relationships

- Process weekly contractor payments and maintain payout registers

-

Accounts Receivable (Customer Billing & Collections)

- Review job logs from GeoOp and ensure accurate invoicing

- Identify and correct invoicing/data-entry errors

- Manage debtor follow-ups and resolve invoice disputes

- Maintain an accurate aged receivables ledger and report trends



Payroll & Contractor Management

- Process fortnightly payroll in compliance with Australian award rules

- Audit ove
 claims for accuracy and fairness

- Reconcile PAYG, superannuation, and leave balances

- Maintain employee and contractor payment records

- Post and reconcile all payroll journals



Balance Sheet, Assets & Financial Control

- Maintain reconciled balance sheets each month

- Manage the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Record and monitor capital purchases (vehicles, IT, plant, and equipment)

- Administer dividend payments, director loans, and shareholder distributions

- Track intercompany transactions, retained earnings, and equity movements



BAS / IAS Preparation & Compliance

- Prepare monthly IAS and quarterly BAS for review

- Ensure GST and PAYG data is accurate

- Maintain full working papers and supporting documentation

- Monitor ATO correspondence and ensure timely compliance



Financial & Operational Reporting

- Produce weekly cashflow forecasts and monthly management reports

- Conduct variance analysis and identify cost-saving opportunities

- Track workforce utilization, revenue per labour hour, and service profitability

- Provide actionable insights for management, including pricing and discount analysis



Audit & Year-End Support

- Prepare reconciliations and schedules for audits and EOFY processes

- Liaise with external accountants and auditors

- Assist with year-end adjustments, including depreciation, accruals, and provisions



Key Skills & Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

- Minimum 3+ years’ experience with Australian clients or accounting firms

- Advanced Xero proficiency, including payroll, fixed assets, and reporting

- Strong knowledge of Australian BAS, GST, PAYG, and Superannuation compliance

- Experience managing balance sheets, dividends, and inter-entity accounts

- Excellent accounts payable, receivable, and reconciliation skills

- Strong analytical and financial reporting capability

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Able to work independently and proactively identify risks or opportunities



Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Balance sheets reconciled monthly with full supporting schedules

- Zero unexplained variances in payroll, assets, or BAS accounts

- Timely issuance of invoices and active debtor management

- Accurate and punctual supplier and contractor payments

- Management reports delivered with insightful commentary on trends and efficiencies

- Workforce utilization, cancellations, and discount impacts reported monthly

- BAS/IAS submissions prepared ahead of deadlines

- EOFY and audit documentation complete and delivered on time

title: FULL STACK DEVELOPER | P560/hour | Weekly Pay | 13th month
description:
FULL STACK DEVELOPER 



Full-Time | 40 hours/week | Remote (Philippines)

Rate: P560/hour (~$10 USD/hour)

Weekly pay via Wise | 13th Month Pay | Paid Training | Long-Term Career

8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST, Monday - Friday (8-hour workday with 1-hour lunch)



ABOUT THE OPPORTUNITY

Atlanta Lactation is a high-volume U.S. medical practice -- 17 clinicians, 12+ locations, hundreds of patients and DME shipments per month -- and we are building our own technology from the inside out. That includes a custom EMR (Electronic Medical Records) platform being built from the ground up, plus a deep backlog of automations, integrations, and internal tools that keep our clinical operations running.



We are not a marketing agency. We are not an e-commerce shop. We are not looking for someone to maintain a WordPress site.



This is product work. Your code will be in production, used by real clinicians and real patients, every day. The work is not going to run out. We have months of builds ahead of us and a pipeline of projects that keeps growing.

You will work directly with the practice owner and our lead developer. No project managers. No layers. No tickets that disappear into a queue. You will talk to the people who make decisions and ship code that solves real problems the same week.



ABOUT US

Atlanta Lactation is a patient-centered, insurance-supported lactation practice serving families across metro Atlanta through home visits, office visits, and telehealth. We also operate a growing DME fulfillment operation -- breast pumps and breastfeeding supplies shipped directly to patients.



We are a fully remote, all-female U.S. healthcare team with 9 Filipino tea
mbers, some approaching 6 years with us. We don't cycle through contractors. We hire people we want to keep, train them well, and build long careers together.

Female candidates preferred. This role is backend and not patient-facing, but our team is all-female and we prioritize maintaining that environment.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own automations and integrations. Our operational stack includes IntakeQ (our current EMR), Spruce (patient messaging), custom Vercel dashboards, clearinghouse integrations, and DME fulfillment systems. There is a deep, growing backlog of API integrations, webhooks, form automations, and internal tools that need to be built and maintained. You will take ownership of this work.

 - Become our IntakeQ expert. Every endpoint, every webhook, every form automation capability. IntakeQ is our current EMR and will remain in active use while we build our new platform. We need someone who is willing to learn it inside and out -- not just how to use it, but how to build on top of it.

 - Contribute to our custom EMR build. Our lead developer is building a new EMR platform purpose-built for our practice (Next.js, Vercel, Neon, modern JS/TS). You will support this build as needed -- contributing to backend, frontend, and integrations as the project evolves.

 - Ship with AI tools. We build with Claude Code. This is not optional. If you have not used Claude Code specifically, that is fine -- but you must be actively building with AI-assisted coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, or similar) in your real workflow today, and be ready to work in Claude Code from day one.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - We care more about how you think and how fast you learn than how many years you have on a resume.

 - Full stack development experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript. Next.js and Vercel experience preferred.

 - Comfortable reading API documentation and building integrations end-to-end -- REST APIs, webhooks, authentication.

 - Currently using AI-assisted coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) in your actual daily work. Be ready to talk about this specifically.

 - Database experience (Postgres, Neon, or similar).

 - Strong written and spoken English. You need to communicate clearly about what you are building, what is blocked, and what you need.

 - Self-directed. You can take a problem, figure out the approach, and ship it. You also know when to ask instead of guessing.

 - Fast learner. You will need to pick up systems you have never touched before -- IntakeQ, Spruce, clearinghouse APIs, healthcare billing workflows. We will train you on the domain. You need to be someone who gets up to speed quickly.

 -Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace.

 - This is a dedicated, full-time role with no room for other projects or other clients during scheduled hours.  



PREFERRED 

 - Experience with U.S. healthcare systems, HIPAA, or medical software.

 - Experience building EMRs, practice management software, or clinical tools.

 - Experience with IntakeQ, Spruce, or healthcare APIs.

 - Experience with shipping/logistics APIs or e-commerce backends.

 - DevOps experience (Vercel deployments, environment management, monitoring).



COMPENSATION

Rate: P560/hour | P22,400/week 

Full-time: 40 hours/week

13th Month Pay: Provided (pro-rated during the first year)

Weekly pay via Wise



HIRING PROCESS

 - We might run a paid trial period before extending a permanent offer. Trial structure will be discussed with shortlisted candidates. 



HOW TO APPLY

Please apply by messaging us through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

 - Your updated resume.

 - A link to your GitHub (or equivalent) with at least one project we can review.

 - A 1-2 minute voice or video introduction telling us about your technical background and why this role interests you.

 - Please do not
 or text the practice directly. Only applications through OJP will be considered.



Applications that do not include all three items will not be considered.

title: Full-Time Growth & SEO Specialist — Personal Brand + Trading Education Business
description:
Full-Time Growth & SEO Specialist — Personal Brand + Trading Education Business



Salary: $600/month

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week

Schedule: Work whatever hours you want — I only care about KPIs and growth

Start Date: ASAP



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



I'm hiring one full-time Growth Specialist to own two tracks simultaneously:



1. Personal Brand Growth — rank my name on Google, book me on podcasts, get me published in online articles

2. Business SEO — full on-page, off-page, and technical SEO for a trading education company website, plus ongoing audits and backlink building



This is not a multi-task VA role. This is a high-output growth role with daily, weekly, and monthly targets. If you consistently miss them, we part ways. If you consistently hit them, this becomes a long-term growing position with heavy upside.



---



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Personal Brand (50% of time):

- Research and pitch 125+ podcasts per week for guest appearances

- Write and pitch guest articles to niche blogs and mid-tier publications

- Track and improve my name's ranking on Google (page 1 domination)

- Build and manage a media kit, pitch templates, and outreach CRM

- Coordinate with any external PR specialists I bring in



Business SEO (50% of time):

- Full on-page SEO audits and implementation (titles, meta, schema, internal linking)

- Technical SEO monitoring (Google Search Console, Core Web Vitals, crawl errors)

- Off-page SEO — build high-quality backlinks through outreach, guest posting, directories

- Keyword research and content briefs for any writers

- Weekly competitor SERP analysis

- Monthly full-site SEO audit with action plan



Reporting (always):

- Daily EOD report (short, bullet format)

- Weekly audit report every Friday

- Monthly performance overview with rankings, backlinks, placements, bookings



---



KPIs — THIS IS WHAT YOU'LL BE MEASURED ON



Daily:

- 25+ cold outreach pitches sent (podcasts + articles combined)

- 8+ on-page or off-page SEO tasks completed on the company website

- EOD report submitted before end of your workday

- Pipeline CRM updated with every response, follow-up, and status change



Weekly:

- 125+ podcast pitches sent

- 50+ article pitches sent

- 25+ new quality backlinks built or earned

- Full SEO progress report delivered every Friday

- Keyword ranking tracker updated for all target keywords



Monthly:

- 15+ confirmed podcast bookings

- 10+ article placements live and indexed

- 80+ quality backlinks built to company site

- Measurable SERP movement on target keywords (tracked and reported)

- Full monthly audit with wins, misses, and next-month action plan



Month 1 (ramp-up):

- Complete full SEO audit on main company website

- Build podcast outreach pipeline of 500+ targeted shows

- Send 400+ podcast pitches

- Land first 5 podcast bookings

- Identify and pitch 80+ article opportunities

- Land first 5 article placements

- 40+ backlinks built to company site



---



REQUIREMENTS



Must-have:

- 3+ years experience in SEO and/or PR outreach

- Excellent written English — native-level, no exceptions

- Proven track record of placing guest articles or booking podcasts (portfolio required)

- Hands-on experience with Ahrefs OR Semrush, Google Search Console, GA4

- Strong research skills — you can find any podcast host's
, any journalist's contact

- Clear, direct communication — you say what you mean and deliver what you commit to

- Leadership mindset — you understand that success takes ownership, accountability, and follow-through. You don't wait to be told what to do



Nice-to-have:

- Experience with trading, finance, real estate, or entrepreneurship niches

- Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Content writing skills (to support pitch drafting)

- Technical SEO experience (schema, site speed, JS rendering)



Deal-breakers:

- "SEO generalists" with no specific pitch/outreach experience

- Anyone using generic automated outreach templates as their main workflow

- Freelancers who want to juggle 3 other clients (this is a full-time role)

- Anyone whose portfolio is mostly PBNs, press release farms, or low-DA link farms



---



HOW TO APPLY



This application requires real work upfront. If you're not willing to put in effort before you're hired, you're not the person for this role.



Send me a single message with:



1. Subject line: "Growth Specialist — [Your Name]"



2. Your portfolio — at least 3 live links to podcasts you've booked or articles you've placed for past clients. I will verify.



3. Google search audit — Search "Sai Donti" on Google. Screenshot page 1 of the results. In a short paragraph, tell me:

   - What's currently ranking

   - What's missing or weak

   - What your first 3 moves would be to dominate page 1 for this name



4. Company website SEO audit — Search "AllWin Academy" and find the company website. Run it through whatever SEO tools you use (Ahrefs, Semrush, PageSpeed Insights, etc.) and share a short audit covering:

   - On-page SEO issues you spotted

   - Technical SEO problems

   - Backlink profile observations

   - Your top 5 priority fixes in the first 30 days



5. Book positioning audit — Search "Currency of Mindset Sai Donti" on Google and Amazon. Tell me how the book is currently positioned, what's hurting its visibility, and 2 concrete ways you would leverage it as a ranking asset for my personal brand.



6. One podcast pitch sample — write me a 100-word cold pitch to a business podcast pitching me as a guest. Show me you can write.



7. Your availability — hours per day, any other commitments.



8. Why this role — 3 sentences on why you want this specifically, not why you want "any VA role."



Do not send generic cover letters, "I am hardworking and dedicated" paragraphs, or templates I can tell you've copy-pasted. I will ignore them. If you skip any of the audits above, I will ignore your application.



---



WHAT YOU GET



- Clear SOP from day one, no guessing

- Direct access to me — you report to the business owner, not a middle manager

- Heavy long-term upside and bonus pay opportunities once you prove your spot

- A real role with real stakes, not a glorified task rabbit



If you're a high-performer looking for a serious long-term role where your work actually moves the needle, this is it. If you're looking for easy $600/month to coast on, this isn't for you.



Apply seriously or don't apply.

title: Ecommerce Executive/Specialist (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Oversee day-to-end e-commerce operations (catalog, price checks, campaign execution, inventory management, shipping, logistics, customer service and returns) for the Seller Center Stores and the international House of Hur accounts across Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

- Manage product listings across online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies within Margin Chart, Platform Ads (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok Seller Center) and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management with business insights and clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with team and provide ad-hoc support for special events and projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–4 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Bigseller Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdK1SHQ9UNeQq98nRv_IetlncCT1GozUDZ8RnMbYB9de6pbHg/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=
We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!

title: Customer Service Manager (DTC, High Volume, Team of 40+)
description:
Customer Service Manager (DTC, High Volume, Team of 40+)



We’re hiring an experienced Customer Service Manager to lead and scale a high-volume support operation for a fast-growing direct-to-consumer brand.



This is not an entry-level or mid-tier role. We are only considering candidates who have proven experience inside an 8-figure DTC brand and have directly managed large teams (40+ reps).



If you haven’t operated at this level before, this role will not be a fit.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Managing and leading a team of 40+ customer support reps

Owning daily support operations across
, tickets, and escalations

Maintaining fast response times while preserving quality and brand tone

Building and optimizing workflows, SOPs, and internal systems

Monitoring KPIs (response time, resolution time, CSAT, refund rates, etc.)

Handling high-pressure situations (chargebacks, complaints, delays, etc.)

Working closely with operations, logistics, and marketing teams

Ensuring consistency across all customer interactions

Key Requirement (Non-Negotiable)

You have worked at a DTC eCommerce brand doing at least 8 figures annually

You have personally managed a team of 40+ support agents



If this is not clearly demonstrated, your application will not be considered.



Talent & Hiring Capability (Critical)



A major part of this role is scaling the team fast and effectively.



You must:



Have a strong existing pipeline of trained customer support reps

Be able to hire, onboard, and deploy reps quickly

Know how to identify high-performing agents vs low-quality hires

Have experience building teams across different regions/time zones



We are not looking for someone who “can try hiring” — we need someone who has already done this at scale.



What We’re Looking For

Deep experience in high-volume DTC customer support

Strong leadership and team management skills

Systems thinker — you build structure, not chaos

Calm under pressure and able to make fast decisions

Highly organized with strong attention to detail

Comfortable owning outcomes, not just tasks

Nice to Have

Experience with tools like Gorgias, Zendesk, Shopify, etc.

Experience handling fulfillment issues, refunds, and chargebacks at scale

Experience working with global remote teams

How to Apply



Please include:



The DTC brand(s) you’ve worked for and their revenue scale

The size of the support team you managed

Details on your hiring process and how you sourced reps

Any metrics or results you improved (response times, CSAT, etc.)



If you’ve actually done this before, it’ll be obvious.

If you haven’t, this role will expose it quickly.

title: Customer Service/Client Relations
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and organized professional to manage affiliate partnerships, support customer service operations, and strengthen ongoing client relationships. This role is critical to ensuring seamless execution across our network and maintaining our reputation for excellence.



Key Responsibilities:



* Manage and coordinate affiliate/partner relationships (domestic and global)

* Source, vet, and onboard new affiliate partners

* Handle trip confirmations, updates, and service follow-ups

* Serve as a point of contact for affiliates and clients to ensure smooth operations

* Monitor trip quality and proactively resolve service issues

* Maintain accurate records in dispatch/CRM systems

* Support customer service inquiries with professionalism and urgency

* Build and nurture long-term partner and client relationships

* Ensure all trip details are executed with precision and attention to detail



Requirements:



* Experience in the chauffeured transportation industry required

* Proficiency in Limo Anywhere or similar dispatch software (e.g., Santa Cruz, GroundWidgets, etc.)

* Strong understanding of affiliate networks and trip coordination

* Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication

* Ability to multitask and manage high volumes of bookings

* Problem-solver with a proactive mindset

* Comfortable working remotely and independently



Preferred Qualifications:



* Experience working with luxury clientele or high-end service businesses

* Existing relationships within the affiliate transportation network

* CRM and operations workflow experience



What We’re Looking For:

Someone who doesn’t let things slip through the cracks. This role requires precision, ownership, and the ability to think a few steps ahead. If you understand how one missed detail can impact an entire trip experience, you’ll thrive here.



Compensation:

Competitive and based on experience.



How to Apply:

Please send your resume along with a brief note outlining your experience with Limo Anywhere (or similar systems) and affiliate coordination. Also, please send a whatsapp message to 
(David, owner)

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 elite appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I. 

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4-6/hour base (depending on experience).

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- Monthly bonuses. 

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B. 

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

description:

REMOTE | PER-DEAL OR PART-TIME



THIS IS NOT A BEGINNER ROLE. REAL ESTATE EXPERIENCE REQUIRED.



We are hiring a Transaction Coordinator (TC) to manage contracts from signed agreement to closing.

This role exists to protect deals, prevent mistakes, and keep files moving without drama.



If you are organized, calm under pressure, and obsessed with deadlines — keep reading.



???? ROLE SUMMARY



You will manage real estate transactions after contract execution, ensuring:



Deadlines are met



Title stays on track



Communication is clean



Nothing falls through the cracks



This is a process + accountability role, not sales.

Track all contract deadlines



Coordinate with:



Sellers



Buyers



Title companies



Attorneys (when needed)

Order title & review for issues



Flag problems early (liens, probate, vesting, judgments)



Maintain clean files in Podio / Google Drive



Provide weekly deal status updates



? REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must have:



2+ years experience as a Transaction Coordinator



Experience with U.S. real estate transactions



Strong understanding of:



Purchase agreements



Assignments



Addenda



Closing timelines



Experience using:



Podio CRM



Google Drive

Excellent written English

? STRONG ADVANTAGE IF YOU HAVE

Assignment contracts



Creative finance familiarity (subject-to, seller finance)



Title issue resolution experience



Experience working with multiple states



???? COMPENSATION



Preferred Structure (Recommended):



$300–$500 per closed transaction



Paid only when deal closes



Clean files = fast payment



Optional (Later):



Part-time hourly once volume justifies it



Full-time only after consistent deal flow



? SCHEDULE



Flexible



Deadline-driven



Availability during U.S. business hours for title communication



? DO NOT APPLY IF:



You need hand-holding



You miss deadlines



You panic under pressure



You avoid difficult conversations



You’ve never coordinated a real estate closing



???? APPLICATION PROCESS (REQUIRED – NO EXCEPTIONS)

????

Low S (not fragile)



???? STEP 2: VIDEO INTRODUCTION (REQUIRED)

States you’ve worked in



Volume you’ve handled at once



How you prevent missed deadlines



(Loom or Google Drive link)



???? STEP 3: SCENARIO QUESTION (WRITTEN)

“Title just found a lien two weeks before closing. Walk us through exactly what you do next.”



Clear steps only. No storytelling.

title: GENEALOGIST / PRIVATE INVESTIGATOR
description:
???? GENEALOGIST / PRIVATE INVESTIGATOR



(REMOTE – U.S. RECORDS FOCUS) Part time or Full Time 



THIS IS NOT A BEGINNER ROLE. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ONLY BUILD FAMILY TREES FOR FUN.



We are hiring an experienced Genealogist / Skip-Tracing Investigator to locate hard-to-find individuals for real estate, probate, heirs, and missing owners.



This role exists to find people others can’t — legally, ethically, and accurately.



???? ROLE SUMMARY



You will research, trace, and locate individuals using genealogy records, public records, and investigative tools.



Your work directly affects real estate acquisitions, legal matters, and asset recovery.



Accuracy matters. Speed matters. Excuses do not.



???? CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Locate missing heirs, owners, and relatives



Trace family trees for probate & inheritance cases



Research:



Birth, death, marriage, divorce records



Census records



Obituaries



Property & tax records



Court filings



Identify current contact information:



Phone numbers



s



Physical addresses



Document findings clearly with source citations



Deliver clean, court-ready reports



Escalate dead ends with next-step recommendations



? REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must have:



3+ years experience in:



Genealogy research OR



Private investigation / skip tracing



Strong experience with U.S. public records



Proven ability to:



Track people across states



Resolve name changes, aliases, remarriages



Identify correct individuals with similar names



Excellent written English



Extreme attention to detail



Comfort working independently



???? REQUIRED TOOLS EXPERIENCE



You must be proficient in AT LEAST SOME of the following:











MyHeritage







Whitepages / Spokeo / BeenVerified



LexisNexis / TLOxp / Accurint (strong plus)



County Recorder / Clerk of Court databases



? STRONG ADVANTAGE IF YOU HAVE



Probate research experience



Real estate skip tracing background



Legal research experience



Experience creating heirship reports



Knowledge of U.S. privacy & compliance standards



???? COMPENSATION



Choose one structure (you d
 later):



Option A – Hourly



$6–$10/hour (based on experience)



Option B – Per Case



Fixed rate per completed locate



Bonuses for difficult / cold cases



Long-term, consistent work for top performers.



? WORK STRUCTURE



Flexible schedule



Deadline-driven



Accuracy > speed (but both matter)



? DO NOT APPLY IF:



You guess instead of verify



You fail to cite sources



You quit when records get messy



You confuse assumptions with facts



You dislike deep research



???? APPLICATION PROCESS (MANDATORY – NO EXCEPTIONS)



You must complete ALL STEPS below.



???? STEP 1: DISC PERSONALITY TEST



Complete this test:



???? 



Paste your DISC results in your application.



Preferred Profile:



Moderate D



Moderate C



Low S



Detail-oriented but decisive



???? STEP 2: VIDEO INTRODUCTION (REQUIRED)



Record a 2–3 minute video answering:



Your experience in genealogy or investigation



Types of cases you’ve handled



Tools you use regularly



How you verify you’ve found the right person



(Loom or Google Drive link)



???? STEP 3: WRITTEN CASE TEST (CRITICAL)

“You are given a deceased property owner with no immediate heirs listed. Walk us step-by-step through how you would identify and locate living heirs.”

???? STEP 4: SAMPLE WORK (IF AVAILABLE)



Submit ONE of the following (redacted if needed):



Heirship report



Genealogy chart



Locate summary



Case research outline

title: CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER

title: Real Estate Acquisitions and lead manager
description:
???? REAL ESTATE COLD CALLING VA – PHILIPPINES ONLY



THIS IS NOT A BEGINNER ROLE. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NEW.



We are rebuilding our real estate team from the ground up and hiring EXPERIENCED U.S. REAL ESTATE COLD CALLING VIRTUAL ASSISTANTS.



If you are disciplined, confident on the phone, and driven by performance—not excuses—keep reading.



???? POSITION: REAL ESTATE COLD CALLING VA



You will be calling U.S. property owners, qualifying sellers, and booking opportunities for a real estate acquisitions team.



? REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You MUST have:



Minimum 3 YEARS of U.S. Real Estate Cold Calling experience



Fluent English with a neutral/clear accent



Proven experience using:



Podio CRM (notes, statuses, lead tracking)



Excel / Google Sheets (basic formulas, tracking, reports)



Auto Dialers (SmrtPhone, or similar)



Experience calling:



Absentee Owners



Vacant Properties



Pre-Foreclosures



Probate / Inherited Properties (preferred)



Ability to:



Follow scripts naturally (not robotic)



Handle objections confidently



Accurately disposition and tag leads



Hit daily call and talk-time targets



Work independently without supervision



? BONUS EXPERIENCE (STRONG ADVANTAGE)



Motivated seller qualification



Creative real estate knowledge (cash offers, subject-to, seller finance)



Prior work with U.S. wholesalers or investors



KPI-driven environment experience



Stable internet (with backup) + quiet workspace



???? PAY & EARNING POTENTIAL



$4/hour base pay



PLUS commission per qualified lead



Performance bonuses for hitting targets



Top performers can earn $5,000/month or more



Raises and promotions based strictly on performance



? SCHEDULE



U.S. business hours (EST / CST)



Full-time availability preferred



Consistency required



? DO NOT APPLY IF:



You job-hop



You avoid phone work



You need micromanagement



You blame systems instead of numbers



You are “learning” real estate instead of experienced



???? APPLICATION PROCESS (REQUIRED – NO EXCEPTIONS)



YOU MUST COMPLETE ALL STEPS BELOW.

SKIPPING ANY STEP = AUTOMATIC REJECTION.



???? STEP 1: DISC PERSONALITY TEST



Complete this DISC assessment:



???? 



After completing the test:



Copy your DISC results



Paste them directly in your application



Preferred Profile:



High D (Dominance)



Moderate-High I (Influence)



Low-Moderate S



Low C



???? STEP 2: VIDEO INTRODUCTION (REQUIRED)



Record a 2–3 minute video (Loom or Google Drive link) answering ALL of the following:



Your full name & location



Your real estate cold calling experience (years + list types)



Dialers & CRMs you have used (be specific)



Your average daily call volume in past roles



What you do when you don’t hit targets



?? Videos without clear English, confidence, or specifics will be rejected.



???? STEP 3: VOICE RECORDING (REQUIRED)



Submit a 1–2 minute voice recording reading the script below naturally:



“Hi, this is [Name]. I’m calling about a property you own.

I know this call may be unexpected, but I just had a quick question.

Would you consider selling the property if the numbers made sense?”



Upload via Google Drive or Loom and include the link.



???? APPLICATIONS WITHOUT ALL 3 STEPS WILL NOT BE REVIEWED
