title: Senior Finance Analyst
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is one of Australia’s fastest growing businesses, in one of the most traditional industries in the world — the funeral industry.

We exist to make end-of-life care accessible, affordable and transparent, changing the way Australians deal with death. For too long, the industry has delivered expensive, traditional, cookie-cutter services that don’t reflect how modern Australians want to say goodbye.

By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalised and affordable. In just five years, we’ve supported more than 40,000 families, become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (recognised for customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and built a team of 100+ passionate people.

And we’re just getting started.

As part of our continued growth, we’re looking for a Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Analyst, you’ll turn messy financial and operational data into clear, actionable insights. You’ll work closely with leadership to provide strategic analysis, support decision-making, and ensure financial reporting is accurate and insightful. This is more than bookkeeping, you’ll be analyzing, forecasting, and modeling to drive real business impact.



Key Responsibilities

-Take raw or messy data from multiple sources and turn it into accurate, meaningful financial reports.

-Prepare monthly and ad hoc reports, including P&L, gross profit, EBITDA, and cash flow analysis. Provide variance, trend, and KPI insights, including LTV-CAC and other commercial metrics.

-Build and maintain financial models to support budgets, forecasts, and strategic decision-making.

-Work with Marketing, Operations, and other teams to align on budget, strategy, and performance improvements.

Identify opportunities to streamline reporting, implement Excel/automation tools, and enhance financial workflows.

-Contribute to special projects, cost analysis, and other initiatives that influence the company’s financial future.



What Sets You Apart

-Advanced Excel and data manipulation skills (formulas, pivot tables, macros)

-Strong understanding of key financial metrics: EBITDA, gross profit, cash flow, LTV-CAC

-Ability to translate complex data into actionable insights

-Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

-Curious, proactive, and solution-oriented



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Consistent monthly income

-Health insurance coverage

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive, and collaborative team culture



Please ensure to submit your resume with your application. Thank you

title: Financial Accountant - AU Company
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Accountant, you’ll be a key player in ensuring accurate, insightful, and timely financial reporting. You’ll collaborate across teams, drive process improvement, and uphold the financial integrity of our mission.



Key Responsibilities:

-Own the Month-End Close

Lead all aspects of EOM: journal entries, reconciliations, accruals, and financial statement prep.

-Deliver Insightful Reporting

Produce monthly and quarterly management reports, including variance and trend analysis.

-Ensure Regulatory Compliance

Prepare BAS, IAS, and statutory filings, ensuring alignment with AASB and tax standards.

-Champion Continuous Improvement

Streamline workflows, introduce automation, and enhance internal controls.

-Collaborate Cross-Functionally

Partner with Marketing, Operations, and other non-finance teams to align on budget and strategy.

-Support Strategic Projects

Get involved in cost analysis, ERP upgrades, and special projects that shape our financial future.



Why Join Bare?

Make a Meaningful Impact: Your work directly supports families during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.

Remote-First Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Australia with the tools and autonomy to succeed.

Mission-Driven Culture: Join a team that leads with empathy and integrity—where your voice matters.

Growth & Innovation: Help shape scalable systems in a business that's growing fast and disrupting the norm.



About You

You’re not just technically sharp, you bring heart and high standards to everything you do. You thrive in fast-paced environments and care about doing work that matters.



Must-Haves:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or similar.

-CPA/CA qualification (or in-progress).

-2–3+ years' experience in financial accounting, ideally in service-led sectors.

-Familiarity with Australian accounting standards, BAS/IAS, and financial reporting.

-Understanding of various accounting standards relevant to Bare and consolidations of many entities.

-Attention to detail and excellent reconciliation skills

-Strong ERP (MYOB, Xero, SAP) and Excel skills.

-Strong Excel/Sheets skills and automation of manual processes in your mindset-DNA



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in mission-driven sectors (healthcare, aged care, funeral services).

• Adaptability in high-growth or high-volume environments.

• Resilient, working with little or no supervision.

• Experience of managing international teams, interaction with multi-entity organizations, and experience within companies with a minimum annual revenue of $50 million.

• Handle ambiguity, competing priorities, and strict deadlines. Create and implement scalable processes, including training. Integrate AI and automation.



Core Values We Look For

• Empathy: You care deeply about people—colleagues and customers alike.

• Accountability: You take ownership and deliver results with pride.

• Clarity: You communicate financial information in a clear, human way.

• Curiosity: You’re always looking for a better way and love solving problems.



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive team culture



Please include your resume when submitting your application. Thank you!

title: Video editor for short form documentary style instagram and tiktok
description:
???? AI-Savvy Short Form Video Editor (CapCut / TikTok / IG Reels)  



We are hiring a high-level video editor who understands AI tools, fast-paced content, and viral short-form formats.  



If you are a beginner or need training, this role is NOT for you.



Reference Style (Must Be Able to Replicate EXACTLY):  


  



---



### ? What We Need

- Short-form videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts)

- Fast-paced, informational content with strong hooks + retention editing

- Clean, engaging subtitles (CapCut-style or native platform tools)

- Ability to replicate viral formats precisely—not “similar,” but exact execution



---



### ???? Requirements

- Advanced experience with CapCut / TikTok / Instagram in-app editing tools

- Strong understanding of AI-driven content workflows (ChatGPT, AI voice, automation, etc.)

- Proven ability to create high-retention, scroll-stopping content

- Deep understanding of pacing, cuts, zooms, captions, and visual hooks

- Must be fast, responsive, and detail-oriented



---



### ???? Workflow Expectations

- We provide clear briefs ? you execute quickly

- Ability to produce multiple videos per day

- Turnaround time: same day or within 24 hours

- Minimal back-and-forth—must understand direction immediately



---



### ? Do NOT Apply If:

- You are a beginner or still learning

- You cannot match the reference video EXACTLY

- You need constant guidance or slow turnaround

- You lack experience with viral short-form content



---



### ? To Apply:

Send:

1. 3–5 examples of short-form videos you’ve edited (similar style ONLY)

2. Confirmation that you can replicate the reference video exactly

3. Your daily capacity (how many videos/day)

4. Your turnaround time per video



---



We are looking for serious professionals only.  

If you’re fast, precise, and understand what performs on social media, this will be long-term work.

title: Super Star Graphics, Creator, Video Editor
description:
Super Star graphics/Content Creator, Social Media Manager, Video Editor! We’re looking for you! 

We’re a small hard-working imaginative, creative group.  

We own multiple businesses in the real estate field, and in the area of serving seniors and their families. We also have a weekly radio show, plus the chairperson of a local nonprofit.



If you’re lazy, looking for an easy job without working hard, this is not for you.  However. if you’d like to be appreciated, have variety in your work,  and enjoy working hard and seeing great results then we should talk.  We will be looking at resumes that show a lot of ambition and drive, great reviews, and someone who has experience with video editing and content creation, and video editing.

If you are a superstar who loves and excels in these areas and building an online presence this might be for you.

Make sure to send a résumé and samples of your work

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

title: Full Stack, Shopify Plus Developer, for B2B Website
description:
We are looking for you if you can provide the following expertise for a Woocommerce to Shopify Plus migration:



1. Proven hands-on Shopify Plus capability, with practical AI leverage

They need real hands-on experience with Shopify Plus in B2B builds that they have personally owned, not just standard Shopify theme work or vague familiarity. Practical use of AI in day-to-day responsibilities will be looked on very favourably.



2. Native-first, custom-second, apps-last mindset

They should default to native Shopify / Shopify Plus where possible, then controlled custom development, with third-party apps used only where clearly justified.



3. Core Web Vitals Assessment Pass capability at build level

They must understand the difference between lab scores and real-world Core Web Vitals outcomes, and know how to design for speed and responsiveness from the outset so we achieve Core Web Vital Assessment Pass across the website whether on desktop or mobile and for both logged in and logged out users.



4. Ability to achieve close visual parity without performance compromise

They need to be able to rebuild a site to closely match an existing WooCommerce front end while still keeping the Shopify Plus build lean and maintainable.



5. Deep B2B / trade logic experience

They should have real experience with customer-specific pricing, logged-in price visibility, trade account logic, B2B price lists, and account-based workflows.



6. Able to work alongside a separate ERP integration partner

We already have a partner for MYOB Exo integration, so this person must be comfortable working alongside that partner and correctly using the data written into Shopify Plus rather than trying to own the ERP side themselves.



7. Structured delivery process with early proof

They need to be comfortable working in a phased way with ownership/admin setup first, performance governance first, early proof sprint, migration dry run, and milestone sign-offs.



8. Comfortable with company ownership from day one

All key systems must sit under company ownership and billing from the start, including Shopify Plus store, code repository, analytics, tag manager, monitoring tools, app subscriptions and admin access.



9. Strong migration and SEO preservation capability

They need to be able to handle WooCommerce to Shopify migration properly, including products, customers, pricing structures, redirects, metadata, canonicals, schema and ranking-sensitive page structure.



10. Commercially stable, direct and not a yes-man

We want someone who will challenge assumptions where needed and give grounded technical judgement rather than simply agreeing with everything.



Checklist for your application:

* Ensure you cover the above 10 points

* Provide 3 live Shopify Plus examples you have built closest to our situation

* The exact parts/percentage of site you personally built for each example you provide

* A written explanation of how you would approach close visual parity, the same functionality as the current Woocommerce website plus achieve CWV Assessment Pass across the website on desktop or mobile and whether logged in or logged out

title: Senior Video Editor [ US-Based Brand | Pacific Standard Time ]
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

Work Ethic & Discipline

Bonus Experience

What We Offer

How to Apply

title: GoHighLevel CRM Specialist & VA
description:
About FEC Playbook

FEC Playbook is a GoHighLevel white-label CRM and marketing automation agency built specifically for the Family Entertainment Center (FEC) industry. We help FECs, party venues, trampoline parks, and similar businesses run smarter operations through done-for-you CRM systems, automation workflows, AI agents, and marketing playbooks.

Our clients are busy operators who trust us to build and maintain the systems that drive their revenue. That means our team needs to be sharp, self-directed, and genuinely fluent in GoHighLevel, not just surface-level familiar with it.



What You'll Be Doing

This is a high-ownership role with a broad scope. Your day-to-day will include a mix of:

Platform Development and Documentation

Assist in creating snapshot documentation

Maintain and continuously improve documentation for our GHL snapshot (our core agency product)

Audit, refine, and help build out our next snapshot version as we evolve the platform

Write clear internal SOPs and client-facing playbook guides



Custom Automation Builds



Build specialized GHL workflows, pipelines, and AI agent configurations for individual client accounts

Implement and test automations to client-specific specs, including booking integrations and lead follow-up sequences



Client Onboarding



Assist with the technical setup and configuration of new client sub-accounts

Host onboarding calls to walk clients through their new systems

Ensure new clients feel confident and set up for success from day one



Tier 2 Client Support



Respond to client support inquiries related to GHL system use, workflows, and playbooks

Troubleshoot automation issues, misconfigured settings, and broken workflows

Educate clients on how to get the most out of their systems



Additional Responsibilities



 inbox management for the CEO and Sales team (triage, draft replies, flag priority items)

Incoming lead management: ensure new leads are tagged, assigned, and moving through the pipeline





What We're Looking For

Non-Negotiables:



Available during US business hours (any US time zone is acceptable)

Fluent in written and spoken English, including professional and client-facing communication

Strong background in customer support and/or client training

High-level, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, specifically: workflows, automation triggers, pipeline management, AI agents, sub-account setup, and snapshot deployment



Qualities That Will Help You Stand Out:



You've worked inside a GHL white-label agency before

You've built automations involving third-party integrations (Zapier, webhooks, booking software, etc.)

You're comfortable troubleshooting independently before escalating

You write clearly: your SOPs and client
s are organized, easy to follow, and free of fluff

You treat your work like a business owner, not a task-ticker





Important: Read Before Applying

We receive a high volume of applications. To ensure we're connecting with candidates who are a genuine fit and who pay close attention to detail, a requirement for this role, we ask that you follow a specific instruction in your application.

In the first line of your cover message, write the following sentence exactly as shown:

"I have read the full job posting for FEC Playbook and I understand this role requires working US hours with advanced GoHighLevel knowledge."

Applications that do not include this sentence will not be reviewed. This is not optional. It is the first test of whether you follow instructions carefully, which is a daily requirement for this position.



How to Apply



Include the required sentence at the top of your message (see above)

Briefly describe your GoHighLevel experience: specifically, what types of workflows or automations you have built and for what types of clients

Let us know your available working hours and which US time zone you would be working in

If you have examples of documentation, SOPs, or workflow builds you can share, please include them or a link

title: Senior Estimator (Seeking Experienced Draftsperson/ Architect/ Estimator)
description:
Senior Estimator (Seeking Experienced Draftsperson/ Architect/ Estimator)

____________________________________________

Work Remotely | Australian Projects | Great Team & Career Opportunities



YOU MUST HAVE AutoCAD/ ARCHITECT/ DRAFTSPERSON EXPERIENCE TO APPLY FOR THIS ROLE



Work with our existing team of estimators in the Philippines (If you progress, you will be able to connect with them before accepting the role to hear their experience working with ProGlazed).



APPLY HERE - 



About ProGlazed

ProGlazed Windows and Doors is an established Australian leader in aluminium windows, doors, glass, and retrofitting solutions for commercial and residential projects. Known for our exceptional quality workmanship and a friendly, collaborative approach, we're now expanding our international team and seeking an experienced Virtual Estimator in the Philippines to provide vital support to our senior estimators in Melbourne.



About Your Role

As a Virtual Estimator, you'll directly support our senior Australian estimators on a range of exciting projects windows and doors projects. Your role is crucial—helping ensure timely, accurate quotations and streamlined project delivery from your virtual office in the Philippines.



Working in the Australian time zone with a friendly, growing team.



Your Key Responsibilities:



-Prepare accurate and detailed estimates for aluminium windows, glass, and doors.

-Review and analyse architectural drawings, specifications, and project briefs.

-Provide ongoing support to senior estimators, assisting across multiple commercial and residential projects.

-Work with our team to submit tenders and win projects.

-Coordinate closely with the Australian team, suppliers, and stakeholders.

-Maintain organised documentation and support administrative processes.



Who We're Looking For:



-Minimum 3-5+ years' experience as an Estimator in windows, glass, and doors (aluminium systems preferred).

-YOU MUST HAVE AutoCAD/ ARCHITECT/ DRAFTSPERSON EXPERIENCE TO APPLY FOR THIS ROLE

-Experience and proficiency using V6 (Softtech) or Logikal (Orgadata) software is a fantastic skill (not required).

-Exceptional attention to detail, accuracy, and strong organisational skills.

-Clear, professional communication in English (both written and verbal).

-A positive, collaborative, and proactive attitude—ready to become a valued part of our team!



Why Join ProGlazed?



-Long-term, stable employment working remotely with a growing Australian company.

-Friendly, supportive virtual work environment with great team culture.

-Competitive salary package with performance-based bonuses.

-Opportunities for career growth and professional development.

-Work closely with experienced Australian estimators and gain international industry exposure.



Ready to bring your estimating expertise and positivity to our team?

title: Small Business Looking For THE BEST COLD CALLER For High Commission Role
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center where you are just a number, I am only looking to add 1-3 people to my small team.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: Virtual Assistant – GoHighLevel Sales & Cold Calling Specialist
description:
Virtual Assistant – GoHighLevel Sales & Cold Calling Specialist



We are looking for a results-driven Virtual Assistant who can SELL GoHighLevel websites and services through cold calling and lead generation.



This is a SALES role, not just technical.



IMPORTANT:

You must have experience with BOTH:



* GoHighLevel (GHL)

* Cold calling / sales



If you only build websites but don’t sell, this is NOT the right role.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



Sales & Cold Calling:



* Make outbound cold calls to businesses

* Pitch GoHighLevel websites, funnels, and marketing services

* Handle objections and close deals

* Book appointments for high-ticket sales

* Follow scripts and improve conversion rates



Lead Generation:



* Find and qualify potential business leads

* Target local businesses and service-based industries

* Track leads and follow-ups inside GoHighLevel CRM



GoHighLevel Tasks:



* Manage leads and pipelines inside GHL

* Set up basic funnels or demos if needed

* Update CRM, notes, and deal stages

* Support onboarding of new clients



---



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



* Proven cold calling or sales experience (MUST)

* Experience selling digital services (websites, marketing, SaaS, etc.)

* Hands-on experience using GoHighLevel (CRM, pipelines)

* Strong English communication and persuasion skills

* Confidence in handling objections and closing deals



---



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED)



* Experience selling GoHighLevel specifically

* Appointment setting for agencies

* High-ticket sales experience

* Basic funnel/demo setup inside GHL



---



PAY STRUCTURE



* Hourly 

* Performance-based incentives available



---



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (MANDATORY)



1. Short Introduction Video (2–3 minutes)



   * Your cold calling experience

   * Your sales results

   * Your experience with GoHighLevel



2. Sales Experience Details



   * What have you sold before?

   * Your results (appointments, deals closed)



3. GoHighLevel Experience



   * CRM, pipelines, or sales usage



4. Resume (CV)



5. Your hourly rate + availability



---



SCREENING QUESTION:

Are you vegetarian or non-vegetarian?



---



IMPORTANT:

Only candidates with REAL sales + cold calling experience will be considered.

We are looking for closers, not just assistants.

title: Social Media Manager (senior Level)
description:
Social Media Manager (Part-Time)

4 -5 hours per day



Senior Social Media Manager (LinkedIn & YouTube Focus)



ManageCasa, a fast-growing property management software platform serving HOAs and property managers, is seeking a Senior Social Media Manager to lead and execute our social presence with a strong focus on LinkedIn growth and YouTube video strategy.



This is a Senior, hands-on role for someone who can own strategy and deliver high-quality content daily, especially across LinkedIn and YouTube.



What You’ll Do (Daily Execution & Strategy)



* Own and execute daily content on LinkedIn (primary focus) and YouTube (short-form + long-form)

* Plan, create, and edit video content for YouTube, LinkedIn, and cross-platform use

* Develop LinkedIn-first content strategy (thought leadership, product storytelling, engagement posts)

* Produce YouTube Shorts, Reels, and long-form videos that educate and convert

* Create modern graphics, carousels, and social media visuals

* Actively engage on LinkedIn- comment, respond, and build conversations with target audiences

* Turn product features, blogs, webinars, and customer stories into compelling content

* Track performance and optimize **content strategy based on analytics and growth metrics

* Collaborate with marketing and sales to align content with campaigns and revenue goals



What We’re Looking For

Senior-level experience managing and scaling LinkedIn and YouTube channels (B2B preferred)

* Proven ability to create high-performing LinkedIn content and YouTube videos

* Strong video production and editing skills (critical for this role)

* Deep understanding of LinkedIn engagement strategy and YouTube growth mechanics

* A sharp eye for design, storytelling, and modern content trends

* Reliable, proactive, and able to take full ownership

* Experience in SaaS, property management, or B2B tech is a plus



How to Apply

If this sounds like you, we’d love to connect.

Please submit:

* Your resume

* LinkedIn profile

* Portfolio or reel showcasing your video content (LinkedIn + YouTube preferred)

title: Paid Ads Specialist (Meta + Google) – TMJ / Pain Relief Patient Acquisition
description:
We’re a growing dental practice focused on helping patients with TMJ and chronic pain find real, lasting relief—not just temporary fixes.



We’re looking for a high-level performance marketer who has experience generating qualified patient leads in pain-related healthcare (TMJ, chiropractic, physical therapy, fibromyalgia, etc.) and knows how to turn ad spend into booked appointments—not just clicks.



Role Overview: Your primary responsibility is to generate consistent, qualified new patient leads for our TMJ and pain relief services using paid advertising.



You will take ownership of strategy, execution, and optimization across:



- Meta Ads 
 & Instagram):

- Google Ads (Search + Retargeting/Display)

- Landing page performance and conversion optimization



What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days):

- Consistent flow of qualified TMJ/pain relief leads

- Clear and improving cost per lead (CPL) and cost per booked patient

- A structured funnel (ads ? landing page ? follow-up)

- Ongoing testing and optimization (no “set it and forget it”)



Responsibilities:

- Build, launch, and optimize Meta and Google ad campaigns

- Develop and test pain-focused messaging (jaw pain, headaches, sleep issues, etc.)

- Set up and manage retargeting campaigns

- Advise on or build high-converting landing pages

- Track and report on key metrics (CPL, CPA, booked appointments)

- Provide strategic input on what’s working and what to test next



Required Experience

You must have experience in at least one of the following:



- Chiropractic clinics

- TMJ pain services

- Physical therapy or pain relief clinics

- Fibromyalgia or chronic pain marketing



You must also have:

- Proven results running Meta and/or Google Ads

- Experience generating local service leads (not e-commerce)

- Strong understanding of pain-driven marketing and patient psychology



Preferred Experience:

- High-ticket or insurance-based healthcare services

- Funnel building (landing pages, lead forms, follow-up systems)

- Copywriting for pain-based offers

- Basic understanding of healthcare advertising compliance

- Important – Proof of Results Required



To be considered, please include:

- 1–2 examples of campaigns you’ve run (screenshots or case studies)

- Cost per lead and/or cost per acquisition

- A brief explanation of what worked and why

- Strategic Input



We’re not just looking for execution—we want someone who can help guide strategy, including:



- Which channels to prioritize

- Budget allocation recommendations

- Offers that convert best for pain relief patients

- Insights from similar campaigns or industries



Compensation

Flexible based on experience:

- Hourly or monthly retainer

- Potential performance-based incentives tied to results



Final Question (Required)



Please answer the following in your application:

“If you had to generate 20 new TMJ patients in the next 30 days, what would your strategy be?”



About Us:

- We move fast, test quickly, and focus on results—not vanity metrics. We’re looking for someone who takes ownership, brings ideas, and wants to build something long-term.

title: STR - Listing Optimization & Revenue Lead
description:
Position Title: Listing Optimization & Revenue Lead

Schedule: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM EST (US Time Zone), Monday – Friday

Hours: Full-Time (45 Hours Per Week)

Rate of Pay: $8.00 – $10.00 USD / hr (DOE)



About Us: 

Key Getaways is a premier property management firm founded by a former futures trader who applies high-level market precision to the vacation rental space. Currently anchored in the Smoky Mountains of Tennessee, we specialize in transforming vacation rentals into high-performing assets. Our culture is built on "family-style" values of kindness and leadership, yet we operate with the precision and scalability of a high-growth tech company. We are a lean, execution-focused team that rejects micromanagement in favor of individual ownership.



Accountability: 

1) Listing Health & Mastery

Take full ownership of listing creation and optimization on Airbnb and VRBO to ensure maximum conversion.

Independently resolve operational issues such as part sourcing or vendor research.

2) Revenue Support & Pricing Execution

Manage and adjust pricing within PriceLabs and related dynamic pricing tools.

Ensure pricing rules are implemented consistently across all platforms.

3) Process Leadership

Proactively identify inefficiencies and propose better workflows.

Document systems and create "Playbooks" so tasks can be delegated and scaled as we grow.

4) Market Intelligence

Monitor local events in the Smoky Mountains to ensure our rates front-run the market algorithm.



Tasks: 

Perform daily pricing audits to identify "orphan nights" or conversion drops.

Coordinate with leadership on priorities, risks, and process improvements.

Maintain calendar integrity between the PMS and OTAs to prevent overlaps.

Provide "heart-in-it" engagement, acting as a resourceful partner rather than just a task-worker.



Expectations: 

STR Industry Experience: Must have a background in the Short-Term Rental industry and understand the "flow" of property management.

Resourcefulness: Must have a "find a way" instinct. If you don't know an answer, you research and solve it independently before escalating.

Ownership Mentality: You see tasks through to 100% completion without being chased.

Communication: Clear, confident, and proactive communication is required.

Attention to Detail: Mandatory. Secret Code: LORL041026.

Technical Familiarity: Prior experience with PriceLabs, Airbnb, and VRBO is preferred but not required if the candidate is highly resourceful.



Salary: 

Position and Length: Contractor (Remote) 1-Year (12 months).

Rate of Pay: $8.00 – $10.00 USD (DOE).

Scheduled Hours Minimum: 40 Hours (Must Track Hours).

Scheduled Hours Maximum: 50 Hours (Anything above needs approval).

Pay Schedule: Monthly via Wise or preferred method with the submission of hours worked.

13th Month Pay Bonus: Optional; based on hitting agreed-upon KPIs after the probation period.



Subject Line: KG List & Rev Lead.

ID Score: Must have a score of 70+.

Secret Code: Must be provided in the initial application message.

Application Deadline: 4/30/2026

title: Recruitment Assistant Manager
description:
We’re hiring a Recruitment Assistant Manager to directly support our Recruitment Manager and help oversee the day-to-day operations of our Selection Team.



This is a higher-level recruitment operations role focused on team coordination, performance tracking, reporting, and workflow management. You’ll play a key role in ensuring recruiters and sourcers stay organized, accountable, and aligned with hiring goals.



This position is ideal for someone with recruitment management or team lead experience who is comfortable supporting leadership and driving operational efficiency.



Role Details

• Pay: $1300 USD/month

• Type: Full-time, long-term

• Work Setup: Remote

• Commitment: No other active jobs

• Work Schedule: 9am-5pm MST



What You’ll Do

• Oversee daily operations of the recruitment / selection team

• Support the Recruitment Manager with reports and performance tracking

• Monitor recruiter and sourcer pipelines and activity

• Help manage team workflows, follow-ups, and deadlines

• Maintain and improve recruitment trackers and reporting templates

• Provide feedback and coordination support to recruiters and sourcers

• Ensure hiring processes and SOPs are followed consistently

• Assist with operational improvements to increase hiring efficiency



Requirements

• Experience in recruitment coordination, operations, or management

• Background supporting recruiters or sourcing teams

• Strong reporting skills (Excel / Google Sheets)

• Proficient with Microsoft Excel formulas and functions

• Excellent organization and attention to detail

• Strong written and verbal English communication

• Comfortable working in a leadership / team coordination role

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities

• Experience with Go High Level (preferred) 



**Recruitment management or team lead experience is strongly preferred.



This role is a strong fit if you:

• Have experience supporting or managing recruitment teams

• Enjoy improving structure and workflow efficiency

• Are comfortable tracking performance and reporting metrics

• Want a higher-level, long-term role in recruitment operations



About Us

We are an award-winning, top-performing insurance district in Colorado and a leader across all of Farmers Insurance. Known for consistent growth and elite production, we are proud to be a 13-consecutive-year qualifier for President’s Council—an honor reserved for the top 1% of the organization.



In this role, you’ll work directly with experienced leadership and support a high-performing recruitment team responsible for building one of the top-tier districts in the country. This is a unique opportunity to step into a leadership support role and help drive recruitment operations at a high level.



How to Apply

Please send:

1. A summary of your recruitment operations or management experience

2. Tools you’ve used (ATS, trackers, reporting tools, etc.)

3. Your updated CV

4. Confirmation of full-time availability

title: Amazon FBA/FBM Admin Assistant
description:
Are you a detail-oriented Amazon FBA expert who loves solving puzzles and finding profitable opportunities? We are a growing Amazon business looking for a dedicated Operations & Lead Analysis VA to become the backbone of our daily workflow.



This is not a "simple" data entry role. We need someone who understands the nuances of Account Health, knows how to fight for reimbursements, and can analyze Keepa charts like a pro.



Key Responsibilities

1. Account Health & Operations



Case Management: Open and relentlessly follow up on cases with Seller Support regarding listing errors, Brand Registry, and shipping discrepancies.



Account Health Monitoring: Daily checks of the dashboard to catch policy violations or IP complaints before they become problems.



Reimbursements: Audit lost/damaged inventory and file claims to recover funds.



2. Inventory & Supply Chain



Stock Tracking: Monitor levels to prevent OOS (Out of Stock) scenarios or excessive long-term storage fees.



Updating COGs(Cost of goods sold) in Sellerboard to accurately reflect accurate profit calculations on a daily basis.

title: Trailer Management Admin
description:
GH Logistics (AJG Transport) is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and refrigerated freight. We move quickly, but we move with structure. Our operation is built on real-time visibility, disciplined execution, and clear communication. We take pride in keeping freight organized, assets accounted for, and operations running cleanly from pickup to delivery.



If you’re someone who enjoys structured execution, asset visibility, and maintaining operational accuracy behind the scenes, you’ll feel right at home here.



Role Overview

You support the Trailer Manager in overseeing a fleet of 400+ trailers across multiple carriers and terminals. You play a critical role in ensuring every trailer is accounted for, properly assigned, compliant, and operational. This is not a passive data entry role. You're the person who keeps the fleet picture accurate and flags problems before they cost us time and money. If you thrive on structure, take pride in clean records, and don't let things slip through the cracks, this role was built for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Monitor, update, and reconcile trailer locations across the network on a daily basis

• Coordinate with dispatchers, drivers, and terminals to ensure accurate trailer assignments and timely movement

• Track trailer availability, maintenance schedules, and repair status

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date trailer documentation (registrations, inspections, tags, insurance)

• Support reporting on trailer utilization, downtime, and compliance

• Identify discrepancies, missing updates, or unreported trailer statuses and escalate promptly

• Assist in improving internal trailer tracking systems for better visibility and accuracy

• Execute processes consistently with strong attention to detail

• Collaborate cross-functionally with dispatch, compliance, and maintenance teams



What Success Looks Like

• Trailer locations and statuses are consistently accurate and fully reconciled

• Assignments, availability, and movements are properly documented and updated in real time

• Maintenance and compliance records are complete and up to date

• Discrepancies are identified early and resolved before impacting operations

• Reporting on utilization and downtime is clean, accurate, and actionable

• Communication across departments is clear, timely, and structured



Who We’re Looking For

• Experience in fleet management, logistics coordination, dispatch, or similar live operational roles (not general admin work)

• Strong attention to detail with high accuracy in tracking and record-keeping

• Organized and capable of managing multiple data points across systems and teams

• Clear and professional communication skills across departments

• Familiarity with platforms such as Samsara, LoadStop, or similar tracking systems (a plus)

• Proactive mindset, able to identify and address issues before they escalate

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills in a fast-paced environment

• Minimum 45 WPM typing speed

• Proficient in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and Logistics tools

• Reliable internet connection and fully equipped remote work setup

• Team oriented, coachable, and aligned with structured processes



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full time permanent remote role

• Direct Hire to a US Company (not agency or BPO)

• Current needed shifts: 3 PM - 1 AM CDT | 11 PM - 9 AM CDT (San Antonio time)

• Possible Shift (only if assigned): 7 AM – 5 PM CDT (San Antonio time)

• Reliable home office setup and back up internet and power stations

• Zoom presence required (camera on throughout shift)

• Possible Hubstaff time tracking during shifts, but is not currently in use.



What You'll Get

• Paid biweekly. No delayed payments and no excuses.

• Paid training only UPON completion.

• Stable & long-term position. This is not project-based nor seasonal. We're building a team and we need people who want to build with us.

• Direct access to US executive leadership. You're not buried in a call center reporting to a middle manager. You work directly with our operations team.

• Real operations work. 



Who Thrives Here

• People who've worked in a US freight brokerage or 3PL and want something more stable

• Former fleet coordinators, logistics admins, or dispatch support staff who are tired of BPO environments

• Fleet admins who take ownership. You don't clock in and zone out. You manage trailers like they are your business.

• People who want to grow into leadership but need the right company to do it in.



Who This Isn't For

• General VAs looking for easy remote work. This is real logistics and not admin tasks.

• People who need constant supervision or step by step instructions for every task

• Anyone who can't commit to US shift hours consistently

• Candidates without actual freight/logistics experience. We don't have time to teach the basics.



This role is built for someone who takes pride in maintaining control over moving assets, ensuring trailers are accounted for, properly assigned, and always operational. If you value structure, accuracy, and keeping operations running clean behind the scenes, you’ll thrive in this role.



Apply Here:


/team/
/GHApplicationForm

1. Use “Creative Director” as your
 subject line.

2. In your message, include: A short introduction about yourself

3. A link to your resume and portfolio

4. Your availability to start

5. Your desired starting rate ($/hour)



JOB TITLE: Creative Director



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead the creative direction and execution of Cabana’s visual identity across all platforms

- Drive the design of products, packaging, campaigns, website visuals, and digital content

- Collaborate cross-functionally to tell one cohesive brand story

- Review, refine, and elevate all creative output to ensure luxury-level consistency

- Translate strategy into stunning visuals that capture the heart of our audience

- Inspire and guide the design team while staying hands-on when needed



Bonus: Step in as Brand Designer for key campaigns or special projects



Qualifications:

- 2–3+ years of experience in art direction, brand design, or creative leadership

- Strong portfolio showcasing visual identity work across digital and print

- Mastery of design systems, typography, color, and composition

- Experience in lifestyle, luxury, or wellness brands

- Detail-oriented, collaborative, and obsessed with visual storytelling

- Strong project management skills — able to run projects end-to-end and keep timelines tight



Bonus:

- Good sense for copywriting (you think visually and verbally)

- Proficiency in Figma, Framer, or similar tools



Why Work with Cabana?

- Work from anywhere that sparks your creativity

- Flexible schedule (just a few shared US hours for collaboration)

- Paid Philippine holidays

- Supportive, no-drama team

- Build a luxury wellness brand that blends science with style



Role Overview:

At Cabana, design isn’t just how we look, it’s who we are.



As our Creative Director, you’ll shape and elevate Cabana’s visual world across every touchpoint — from our website and campaigns to packaging and branded experiences. This role is about bringing beauty, intention, and storytelling into every pixel.



You’ll collaborate closely with our Brand Designer, Front-End, and Web teams to bring our luxury wellness vision to life. Every detail should feel thoughtful, modern, and unmistakably Cabana.



Perfect for someone who lives for aesthetics, thrives on creative energy, and knows how to turn a brand into a feeling.





About Cabana:

Cabana is where science meets style, a modern luxury wellness brand redefining what it means to look and feel your best. We offer science-backed treatments like GLP-1s and hormone therapies, helping people live with more confidence, energy, and ease.



We’re building something beautiful. At Cabana, you won’t just design visuals, you’ll help shape a world where wellness feels elevated, effortless, and deeply personal.

title: Senior Loan Modification & Foreclosure Specialist (EX-BANK / SERVICER VA)
description:

Location: Remote (Philippines only)

Schedule: Full-Time

Company: U.S.-Based Real Estate Investment Firm

READ THIS FIRST

This role is ONLY for candidates with direct experience working for:

Mortgage servicers

Banks

Loss mitigation departments

Foreclosure or default servicing teams

(Directly or via BPO supporting U.S. lenders)

If your experience is limited to general real estate VA work or “assisting” without owning files, do not apply.

NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS

3+ years of hands-on experience in:

Loan modifications

Loss mitigation

Foreclosure processing or prevention

Prior work with U.S. banks, servicers, or foreclosure firms

Deep understanding of:

Foreclosure timelines

Default status

Loan mod documentation & workflows

Strong English (written & spoken)

Comfortable communicating with:

Lenders & servicers

Attorneys

Homeowners under distress

Extremely detail-oriented and deadline-driven

Can manage multiple active files without hand-holding

CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Own loan modification & foreclosure files end-to-end

Prepare, submit, and track complete loss mitigation packages

Follow up aggressively with lenders & servicers

Track foreclosure notices, sale dates, and deadlines

Maintain accurate file notes and status updates

Coordinate with attorneys and third parties

Identify missing docs and resolve issues fast

Report risks and timelines clearly to management

SYSTEMS & TOOLS

Experience with any of the following is a strong plus:

Mortgage servicing platforms

Loss mitigation portals

Google Workspace

CRM systems (Podio or similar)

Secure document handling systems

APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (MANDATORY)

Resume (PDF)

Your exact role in the loan mod or foreclosure process

Average number of files you handled at once

DISC Personality Test

Link will be sent to shortlisted applicants

Completion required to proceed

WHAT WE OFFER

Long-term, stable role

Clear systems and expectations

Real ownership of your function

Professional U.S. team (no chaos, no guessing)

IMPORTANT

If not, save both of us the time.

Please submit your resume and video introduction. Looking forward to finding the next STAR to join our team!

title: Personal Assistant (High-Level, Fast-Paced Environment)
description:

Handle
s, messages, and follow-ups so nothing falls through the cracks

etings, calls, links, agendas, and notes

title: Experienced B2B Cold Caller To Schedule Appointments About Our A.I. Receptionist
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 elite appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4-6/hour base (depending on experience).

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- Monthly bonuses.

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

title: Paralegal
description:
Litigation & Bankruptcy Paralegal (US-Based Firm)



Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday – Friday | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (11:00 PM – 8:00 AM PHT)

Compensation: Competitive; Based on Experience



About the Firm

We are a tech-forward California law firm specializing in complex civil litigation, real estate disputes, and bankruptcy matters. We operate with a highly integrated, engaged team in the Philippines and believe in leveraging technology (Zoho, ProLaw, Westlaw) to deliver elite results. We aren’t looking for a passive assistant; we are looking for a sharp, proactive legal professional to take true ownership of their caseload.



The Role

As a Litigation Paralegal with a heavy emphasis on Bankruptcy, you will go beyond "filling out templates." You will be responsible for drafting substantive legal content, managing federal and state court filings, and ensuring our attorneys are prepared for every deadline.



Key Responsibilities:

•	Substantive Drafting: Draft complaints, answers, demurrers, discovery motions, meet-and-confer letters, and oppositions from scratch.

•	Bankruptcy Support: Prepare and file pleadings for Chapter 7, 11, and 13 bankruptcy cases via CM/ECF.

•	Case Management: Oversee the litigation lifecycle, including calendaring deadlines, coordinating process service, and gathering documents for subpoena responses.

•	High-Stakes Communication: Act as a primary point of contact for clients and opposing counsel, with a commitment to a 30-minute response time during shift hours.

•	Legal Research: Utilize Westlaw to conduct targeted research and summarize procedural histories.

•	Judgment Enforcement: Assist with post-judgment work, including writs of execution, bank levies, and abstracts of judgment.



What We Are Looking For

•	Education: A Law degree (JD/LLB) is required. Passing the Philippine Bar is a significant plus.

•	Experience: Proven experience in US Litigation (State and Federal). Specific experience in US Bankruptcy law is strongly preferred.

•	Tech-Savvy: You must be proficient in Word, Excel, and Outlook. Experience with Zoho, ProLaw, and CM/ECF is a major advantage.

•	The "Night Owl" Edge: You must have prior experience working US hours and a reliable, high-speed internet connection.

•	Ownership Mindset: You are observant, punctual, and proactive—anticipating issues before they become bottlenecks.



IT Requirements:

•	Own a laptop with at least Windows 10, Processor I5 Core-1235U 1.30 GHz, 16GB RAM (REQUIRED SPECIFICATIONS)

•	Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements. 

•	Additional
 with more instructions will be sent as part of the application process.

• Upload attendee lists to Wrike and shared drives; assist with internal and partner distribution

• Update Airtable following mail merges and registration updates

________________________________________

Sponsor & Attendee Coordination

• Register confirmed sponsors in Airtable, Wrike, and Cvent

• Assist with tracking sponsorships, registrations, and deliverables

• Support attendee communications and internal reporting needs

________________________________________

Marketing & Website Support

• Maintain and update conference websites with current information

• Coordinate with the graphics team on:

 o Conference graphics

 o Sponsor materials

 o Speaker bios and headshots

 o Swag and signage requests

• Submit graphic request forms for approved, straightforward items

________________________________________

Project & Administrative Support

• Create Wrike projects for confirmed conferences

• Update marketing agendas, Wrike tasks, Excel sheets, and conference agendas based on meeting notes and leadership direction

• Create calendar invites for new conferences, meetings, and events

________________________________________

Travel & Event Logistics Support

• Assist with coordinating travel and hotel logistics with partners’ assistants once conference attendance is confirmed

• Book travel for the marketing team when applicable

________________________________________

Ideal Candidate

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working across multiple systems and tools

• Strong follow-through and ability to take direction

• Clear written and verbal communicator

• Interest in conferences, events, and marketing operations

________________________________________

Specific Requirements:



(a) Proficiency in the English language

(b) Must have reliable power and internet connection

(d) Work Pacific Time (Main Office is located in California)

(e) Must own a personal laptop (Windows or Mac) with a valid, fully licensed operating system. Minimum specifications: Windows 10 or macOS 12, Intel Core i5-1235U 1.30 GHz processor (or Apple M1/M2 equivalent), and at least 16GB of RAM.

(f) Must complete a speed test, meet system specification requirements, and meet laptop specification requirements.



Hours: 8:30 am—5:00 pm, PT, Monday through Friday

Salary: $800-$1000 a month plus $75 supplemental pay to use toward health insurance

________________________________________

Next Steps: 

Send us a link to a PDF of your resume and include a brief explanation of why you think you're the best fit for this position.



We look forward to seeing your application!

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Company



Infinite Modern Brands is a fast-growing e-commerce company managing multiple premium brands, including Modern Shelving and TANDMSurf. We are committed to delivering high-quality products and seamless customer experiences worldwide.



We are looking for an Executive Virtual Assistant to provide high-level administrative, operational, and project support to our leadership team. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and capable of managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced, fully remote environment.



Key Responsibilities



Provide executive-level support to the CEO and leadership team, including calendar management, meeting coordination, and communications.

Prepare reports, presentations, and documentation for internal and external stakeholders.

Coordinate and track projects, ensuring timelines, deliverables, and follow-ups are completed efficiently.

Support project management workflows using tools such as Slack, ClickUp, Notion, or similar platforms.

Utilize AI tools to improve productivity, assist with content drafting, automate tasks, and streamline workflows.

Handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism.

Manage travel arrangements, schedules, and expense reporting.

Act as a liaison between executives, internal teams, and external partners.

Conduct research, organize data, and contribute to process optimization initiatives.

Draft, edit, and manage correspondence while maintaining brand voice and professionalism.

Identify opportunities for automation and implement solutions using tools such as Zapier, Make, or AI assistants.

Anticipate executive needs and proactively resolve administrative or operational challenges.



Qualifications



Proven experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or in a similar role supporting senior executives.

Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Proficiency in productivity and project management tools (e.g., Slack, Google Workspace, Notion, Asana, ClickUp).

Experience using AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT or similar) to enhance efficiency and workflow automation.

Tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and adapt to new systems and tools.

High level of discretion, professionalism, and sound judgment.

Ability to work independently in a fully remote, fast-paced environment.



Preferred Skills



Experience in e-commerce, marketing, or operations support.

Familiarity with automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar platforms.

Strong research, data analysis, and reporting skills.

Experience managing projects or supporting cross-functional teams.

Ability to integrate AI into daily workflows to improve efficiency and output quality.



Application Instructions



Subject line must include: EVA

Include the code stated in the job description as part of your subject line.

title: Reels Video Editor (Fully Remove)
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team at Exchange Life, a travel-themed e-commerce brand selling jewelry (keychains and bracelets featuring country flag charms that people wear to show where they've been). Your mission will be to create high-performing organic videos for Instagram and TikTok that don’t look like an ad.



If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you. This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator, Not Just an Editor: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos that have achieved significant reach. Specifically: at least one TikTok or Reel you edited has crossed 500,000 views in the last 2 months or an ad that performed well. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds, and you can explain exactly what you did to make that happen.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. You think about hook rate, watch time, and retention, not just aesthetics.

- A Short-Form Native: Your portfolio contains at least 3 recent TikTok or Reels edits from the last 30 days. Not YouTube. Not wedding videos. Not long-form. Short-form organic social, specifically.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a reliable internet connection and can turn footage around quickly when it lands.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $20 per hour, averaging around 18 hours of work per week, fully flexible, you manage your own time.

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and winning ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $2,000-$3,000+ per month by combining base hours with performance bonuses.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- No Fixed Schedule: You manage your own time. Work when footage is ready, deliver fast, and own your output.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.



Ready to Apply?



Complete our application form here: 



The form includes everything, your portfolio, background questions, and two trial videos to submit. Do not
 us directly. All applications must go through the form.

mbers, contractors, and departments to ensure accountability and operational alignment.

Team Leadership & Cross-Department Coordination
