title: Call Team Manager - DTC E-Commerce
description:
Call Team Manager - DTC E-Commerce (US Customers)



We're a US-based DTC e-commerce company operating multiple storefronts serving US customers. We're building an inbound call team from the ground up focused on customer retention, support, and subscription management, and we need someone to own and run it.



This is not an agent role. You will be the person who builds, manages, and optimizes the entire call operation.



What You'll Be Doing:



• Hiring & Vetting: Source, interview, and pre-vet call agents to make sure they're the right fit before they ever touch a phone. You own the hiring pipeline.



• Training & Onboarding: Build and run the training program for new agents. Get them up to speed fast and make sure quality stays consistent.



• Script Development: Create, customize, and continuously improve call scripts for retention, cancellations, refunds, and general support. Test what works, cut what doesn't.



• Performance & Data Analysis: Track call metrics (hold times, resolution rates, save rates, call outcomes) and use the data to optimize agent performance, scripts, and workflows.



• Staffing & Scheduling: Build and manage call heatmaps to ensure we have agents staffed at peak times. Target: hold times under 1 minute.



• Day-to-Day Management: Handle scheduling, QA, coaching, escalations, and accountability across the team.



What We're Looking For:



• Experience managing or building a call team (inbound CS, retention, or telemarketing)

• Strong recruitment and interviewing skills - you know how to spot a good phone agent

• Comfortable with data - you can read call reports, spot trends, and make decisions from numbers

• Experience with call center tools and dialers

• Excellent English communication skills

• Reliable internet and a professional home office setup

• Available to overlap with US business hours (EST preferred)



Bonus Points:



• Experience in e-commerce, subscription businesses, or DTC brands

• Familiarity with Shopify, CRM platforms, or helpdesk tools (Gorgias, Zendesk, etc.)

• Background in workforce management or scheduling optimization



This is a long-term, full-time role with room to grow as the team scales. If you've built or managed a call floor before and want to do it again with a fast-moving company that gives you real ownership - we want to hear from you.



To apply, send a brief loom about your call team experience and what a good call operation looks like to you.

title: Junior Recruiter – Local Community Liaison Recruitment
description:
Apex Social brings together experienced educators, therapists and care providers with families who have special care needs and provides personal & career development through a unique, collaborative work experience for Care Professionals in a new state or new country.



Our Mission

Unlocking children’s greatest potential through integrating skilled Care Professionals into their family’s daily life.

Empowering Children to develop to their fullest abilities.

Empowering Care Professionals by providing personal & career development, experiential learning and cultural enrichment through a unique, collaborative work experience.

Empowering Families by providing specialized, skilled child care and cultural exchange in the home through an individualized recruiting and matching process.

Empowering Schools & Universities by providing career coaching and support for their students and alumni to gain interdisciplinary paid work experience & continuing education in Germany, the United States and Australia.

Empowering Tea
mbers by providing a collaborative, remote work environment with opportunities for training and growth as well as a commitment to our mission ensuring that we find purpose, fulfillment and a sense of belonging in our careers.



Role Summary:

APEX Social Group is looking for a driven Junior Recruiter to support the sourcing and onboarding of Local Community Liaisons (LCLs) across multiple regions. This role focuses on grassroots recruitment, community engagement, and building strong relationships with local stakeholders to expand APEX Social Group’s regional presence and talent pipeline.

The ideal candidate is proactive, comfortable with fieldwork, and effective at engaging with diverse communities to identify individuals who can represent and advance APEX Social Group’s mission at the local level.

This role will report to and work closely with the HR team and may also provide support on HR-related functions as needed.



Key Responsibilities

1. Community-Based Recruitment

-Source and identify potential Local Community Liaison candidates through:

-Build and maintain a strong pipeline of qualified candidates across assigned regions.

2. Community Engagement & Outreach

-Represent APEX Social Group in local community activities, job fairs, and outreach programs.

-Develop and maintain relationships with community leaders and partner organizations.

-Support the establishment of local recruitment partnerships to strengthen hiring pipelines.

3. Candidate Screening & Coordination

-Conduct initial screenings to assess candidate suitability for LCL roles.

-Coordinate interview schedules with internal hiring teams.

-Track candidate progress through the recruitment pipeline using internal systems.

4. Candidate Experience & Support

-Ensure timely, respectful, and clear communication with all applicants.

-Guide candidates through recruitment steps, requirements, and onboarding processes.

-Promote a positive and inclusive candidate experience aligned with APEX Social Group values.

5. Reporting & Administrative Support

-Maintain accurate recruitment databases and tracking reports.

-Provide updates on sourcing progress, regional talent availability, and recruitment challenges.

-Assist in onboarding coordination for successfully hired LCLs.



Qualifications



Required

1. Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Psychology, Business Administration, Social Sciences, or related field (or equivalent experience)

2. 0–2 years of experience in recruitment, community development, HR, or field coordination

3. Strong communication and interpersonal skills

4. Comfortable engaging with diverse communities and stakeholders

5. Highly organized and detail-oriented



Preferred

1. Experience in grassroots recruitment, NGO work, or community outreach programs

2. Familiarity with applicant tracking systems (ATS) or recruitment databases

3. Knowledge of local dialects or regional languages 



Key Competencies

-Community engagement and relationship-building

-Cultural sensitivity and adaptability

-Initiative and self-direction in field environments

-Strong coordination and multitasking ability

-Professional communication and stakeholder management



Working Hours: 10AM to 7PM EST

Why Join Us:

- Great People: We hire people who are positive, smart, and get things done. Being around great people makes us all better every day

- Dynamic Work: Every day is a little bit different here. Be challenged and solve new problems regularly.

- Remote Work: 100% remote.



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do both of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

title: Business/Finance Video Editor Needed for Fast-Growing Channel
description:
I’m looking for a full-time video editor to help me create high-quality business and finance videos for YouTube.



The work includes editing talking-head videos, adding B-roll and overlays, creating clean motion graphics, adding captions, and designing animated charts and graphs similar to Ali Abdaal’s style.



This role requires strong attention to detail, fast turnaround times, and the ability to follow a consistent brand style. You should be skilled in Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut, and have a preference for clean, modern editing.



If you’re interested, please fill out the application form completely.






Only applicants who submit all answers and portfolio links will be considered.

title: GoHighLevel CRM & Automation VA
description:
WHO WE ARE



We are Perspective Media — a marketing, media, and personal brand company built around one founder's vision. At the center of everything is a message about ownership, discipline, personal growth, and becoming the best version of yourself so you can show up fully for the people around you.



We believe that structure and routines are what set people free — not hold them back. We build with intention, hold ourselves to a high standard, and show up every day committed to getting better.



If that resonates with you at a personal level — not just professionally — keep reading. If it does not, that is okay too. This just may not be the right seat for you.





IS THIS YOU?



You exercise regularly. You eat to support your body. You invest in your relationships, your faith, and your mental and emotional health. The people around you might think you are a little intense about wanting better for yourself and your family — and you would not have it any other way.



You believe God has a plan for your life and you show up every day to honor it. Faith and discipline are not opposites to you. They work together.



You know there is more opportunity out there than what is immediately around you and you are willing to work hard to reach it. That hunger is not a burden — it is what drives you.



If your instinct is to wait to be told what to do, this will not be the right fit. If your instinct is to understand the vision, ask the right questions, and build — welcome home.





ABOUT THE ROLE



We run GoHighLevel across four active sub-accounts covering personal brand, roofing, supply, and home services. We need a GHL-experienced VA who can take a vision and translate it into real systems — funnels, automations, pipelines, and campaigns that power our lead generation and follow-up.



We are still building our internal playbooks. That means you will need enough GHL experience to take direction from a conversation, ask the right clarifying questions, build it out — and then help us document it for the future. This is a ground-floor opportunity for someone who does not need a manual to get started.





YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR



- Building and maintaining funnels and landing pages inside GHL sub-accounts

- Setting up workflows, triggers, and automated follow-up sequences

- Configuring pipelines and CRM tagging logic across brands

- Building out SMS and
 campaigns inside GHL

- Connecting GHL to outside tools via webhooks, Zapier, or API integrations

- Configuring reputation management — review request sequences for Google and

- Troubleshooting automation issues and reporting breakages to the Lead VA

- Helping document builds into repeatable SOPs as we grow





YOU ARE A FIT IF



- You have hands-on GHL experience — please specify sub-account vs. agency level

- You can build a funnel from scratch inside GHL without step-by-step guidance

- You understand CRM tagging, pipeline stages, and lead source tracking

- You are comfortable working inside multiple sub-accounts simultaneously

- You can take a vision, ask smart questions, and build — without needing hand-holding

- You have a growth mindset strong enough that new challenges feel like opportunity, not friction

- The mission actually means something to you — not because we need it to, but because the right person will just feel it





GHL MODULE CHECKLIST



In your application, tell us honestly which of these you have hands-on experience with. You do not need all of them — but we need the truth.



CORE (required):

- Funnels & landing pages — building from scratch inside GHL

- Workflows & automations — triggers, conditions, sequences

- Pipelines & CRM tagging — stages, lead source tracking

- SMS &
 campaigns — broadcast and drip sequences



STRONG PLUS:

- Webhooks & integrations — Zapier, calendars, form builders

- Snapshots & templates — cloning builds across sub-accounts

- Reputation management — Google /
 review requests



BONUS:

- Reporting & dashboards — reading data, flagging what's working

- Conversation AI / chat widget — GHL native chatbot configuration

- White-label agency accounts — experience vs. standard GHL accounts





FOLLOW ANTHONY'S JOURNEY



Before you apply, take a few minutes to watch his content. We are not looking for someone who just needs a job. We want someone who sees this and thinks — that is what I am about.



Instagram: 



TO APPLY



1. Record a 90-second video and cover all of the following:

   - What GHL builds have you completed — funnels, automations, campaigns?

   - Have you worked at the sub-account level, agency level, or both?

   - Walk us through the most complex automation you have ever built.

   - How do you operate when you are given a vision but no written instructions?

   - What about Anthony's content or Perspective Media's message made you want to apply?



2. In your
, list which GHL modules from the checklist above you have hands-on experience with. Be specific and honest — this is not a test you pass by checking every box.



3. Use this exact subject line: PRSPCTV GHL VA Application



4.
 your full application with:

   - Your video link

   - Your GHL module checklist responses

   - A brief written description of the most complex GHL automation you have built





We have high standards here and we do not apologize for them. We are not looking for someone to complete tasks. We are looking for someone already on their own path — because when people with high standards are in the same room, everyone gets better. You will be challenged here. You will be encouraged here. And if you are the right person, you will be elevated here.

title: HR Manager and Recruitment
description:
Our company is looking to fill the position of an HR manager, a specialist who will also act as a hiring manager and point of contact for employees. The ideal employee will possess the following desired skills: time management, adaptability, collaboration, persuasion, and 
t listed but equally important are empathy, honesty and integrity. This position is not for an entry level employee. We are looking for someone who knows and understands HR duties, a problem-solver and a quick 
 is important to also have education and experience in this field. Good communication and English-speaking skills are a must. We would prefer someone who is familiar with Google Apps, such as Drive, Sheets, etc. or a quick learner.

Duties will include:

Recruiting candidates: arranging interviews, coordinating hiring efforts, and onboarding new employees.

Maintaining employee records: maintaining personal details and emergency contacts for each 
pany-specific data is also managed by HR, such as employee evaluations.

Processing payroll: calculating each employee’s pay and taxes and managing bonuses and other benefits for employees

Conducting disciplinary actions: evaluating employee performance and providing guidance on how to improve, carrying out disciplinary action when needed

Updating policies: suggesting changes or making official updates to company policies. Policies are usually updated as a reaction to an occurrence (e.g., in-office social distancing guidelines in response to COVID-19).

Other Responsibilities are:

The HR manager is responsible for employee engagement and motivation. Our company wants to maintain an aligned, thriving, and purpose-driven culture among employees of a company.

HR must continuously maintain clear communication with workers and monitor how employees are dealing with their new remote work situation. This ensures HR is doing everything it can to keep the remote workforce satisfied and productive. This includes tracking employee statistics and reporting statistics for a group as a goal.

HR departments for remote workplaces also need to create suitable benchmarks to measure employee job performance virtually. The HR manager will be responsible for developing new systems of employee performance reviews and recognition.

We are looking to hire. Please send us your resume if you possess all of the listed required qualifications. Thank you!

title: Transportation Safety Manager
description:
This position serves as the subject matter expert in DOT and EHS and is responsible for implementing and executing environmental and safety programs that effectively lead the safety culture at our Company. This position is responsible for providing sound leadership and management to our Company’s safety, security, environmental and DOT programs to ensure compliance with all applicable federal, state and/or local DOT and Environmental, Health and Safety legislation.

1.    Monitor compliance with the Hours of Service (HOS) regulations through audits.

2.    Monitor Driver/Vehicle Examination Reports (Inspection Reports).

3.    Monitor employees' compliance with corporate safety policies and procedures.

4.    Conduct roadside inspections of company equipment passing through DOT weigh stations & checkpoints. If remote, being able to guide the driver and the person doing the inspection.

5.    Ensure compliance with OSHA regulations. Handle DOT complaints under the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Regulations (FMCSR).

6.    Provide assistance with post-a
 and post-injury investigations to ensure proper completion of required documentation and reporting to the proper agencies. 

7.    Review all investigation reports on a
 and injuries.

8.    Monitor SAFETY/RISK ONLINE (SRO) reporting for a
 and injuries. Review employees' a
/injury histories and target issues identified as causal factors.

9.    Create and implement an annual Safety Action to improve safety, as well as provide a monthly report for all i
 and improvements. 

10.   Assist with all aspects of training and provide ongoing training as new initiatives are implemented.

Qualifications

REQUIREMENTS  

1.    5 + years risk management or safety department experience.

2.    The safety manager must possess working knowledge of DOT guidelines, OSHA compliance, hazardous material handling and the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Act, including the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Regulations (FMCSR).



We are looking to hire. Please send us your resume if you possess all of the listed required qualifications.  This is not a general office duty. Knowledge of protocols and laws are very critical for this job position. Thank you!

title: Full-Time Virtual Bookkeeper/Accountant (US Company | Long-Term | Growth Role)
description:
We are a US-based landscaping and real estate company looking for a high-level Accountant / Controller to fully own our bookkeeping and financial operations.



This is NOT a basic bookkeeping role — we need someone who can think, d
, and take ownership like an accountant or mini-CFO.



What You’ll Do

You will take full ownership of the books across multiple entities:

Daily Accounting

- Manage A/P and A/R (billing, collections, payments)

- Enter and reconcile transactions in QuickBooks Desktop

- Keep records clean, organized, and accurate



Month-End Close

- Prepare journal entries (accruals, reclasses, etc.)

- Produce clean, CPA-ready financials (P&L, Balance Sheet)

- Close books within 2 weeks of the month-end



Financial Oversight

- Monitor cash flow, budgets, and variances

- Identify errors, risks, and inefficiencies

- Recommend improvements to systems and reporting



Support & Growth

- Help transition into Aspire software

- Work closely with leadership on financial decisions



Who We’re Looking For



We want someone who:

- Thinks like an Accountant / Controller, not just a bookkeeper

- Can work independently without constant supervision

- Takes full ownership and accountability

- Is proactive and detail-oriented



Must-Have Requirements

- Strong experience with QuickBooks Desktop

- Full-cycle bookkeeping experience (A/P, A/R, reconciliations, month-end)

- Experience handling multiple entities or complex books

- Strong English communication

- Reliable internet + backup setup

- Willing to work US Pacific Time (8 AM – 5 PM PST/PDT)



Nice to Have (Not Required)

- Experience with US clients

- Real estate or service-based businesses

- Familiarity with Aspire software



Compensation & Setup

- Full-time, long-term role

- Stable company with growth potential

- Monthly salary (PHP) – based on experience

  - Please include your expected salary in your application



IMPORTANT

This role requires:

- High accuracy

- Strong ownership

- Consistency month-to-month

If you prefer task-based work with step-by-step instructions, this role may not be a good fit.



How to Apply

Send your application to: 

Subject Line: Full-Time Accountant Application – Your Name



Include:

1. Resume



2. Short cover letter including:

    - Why you're a good fit

    - Confirmation of PST availability

    - Your expected monthly salary (PHP)



3. 2-3 minutes audio recording

    - Your accounting experience

    - QuickBooks Desktop experience

    - Types of businesses you've handled

title: Media Buying Facebook Expert - Remodeling Niche
description:
APPLY HERE OR YOU WILL NOT BE HIRED: 



We're hiring a high-level Media Buyer with strong
 advertising experience, ideally in the home remodeling niche. You must understand how to create demand for kitchen and bathroom remodelers — not just generate cheap leads.



Your core responsibilities:



Managing, testing, and scaling Meta 
 and Instagram) ad campaigns



Identifying winning ads, audiences, and hooks inside Meta Ads Manager



Using performance data to optimize CPL, lead quality, and appointment rates



Running structured testing frameworks across copy, creative, targeting, and placement



Developing and iterating creatives based on outcome metrics



Monitoring KPIs including CPL, CTR, CPM, cost per appointment, and ROI



Editing short-form video ads in CapCut when needed



Creating and refining static ad creatives and image variations



Working inside GoHighLevel to monitor lead flow and optimize tagging



Collaborating on strategy to improve homeowner targeting and messaging



Managing budgets across multiple accounts and scaling proven winners



Producing detailed yet clear performance reports and recommendations



What we require:



Strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager and campaign optimization



Proven ability to identify and scale winning ads based on real data



Experience with GoHighLevel for tracking, tagging, and basic CRM workflows



Ability to edit video content in CapCut



Some image editing and creative design experience



Strong understanding of homeowner psychology and remodeling demand cycles



Experience with lead generation (NOT e-commerce or brand awareness only)



Ability to communicate clearly and professionally in English



Willingness to work U.S. time zones and respond quickly to performance shifts



Highly analytical, resourceful, and execution-focused



This role is for someone who knows how to leverage data, make smart adjustments fast, and generate measurable results. If you know how to find winning ads in the Meta ecosystem and you thrive in a performance-driven environment — you'll excel here.

Self-motivated and reliable

MUST SEND LOOM VIDEO

title: Market Development Representative (MDR) + Portfolio Support
description:
About Vaycaay



Vaycaay is a vacation rental management and co-hosting company. We help short-term rental owners run high-performing listings while delivering a great guest experience.



Role overview



We are hiring a Market Development Representative (MDR). This is a part-time role focused on **outbound market outreach and appointment setting to connect self-managing Airbnb hosts with our team.



This role will also support property success and guest experience tasks for our current Airbnb portfolio.



- Hours: 20 hours/week (4–5 hours/day)

- Schedule: Must be able to work US/Eastern time hours

- Work type: Remote



What you’ll do (primary: MDR / appointment setting)



- Conduct outbound outreach to identify and start conversations with self-managing Airbnb property owners who may benefit from a co-host.

- Use approved messaging and follow-up workflows to generate qualified opportunities.

- Book meetings for Account Executives (AEs) and ensure smooth handoff with clear notes and context.

- Keep outreach and pipeline activity organized and up to date.



What you’ll do (secondary: portfolio support)



- Assist with property success and guest experience for our Airbnb portfolio as needed.

- Help with day-to-day coordination tasks that improve guest satisfaction and listing performance.



Bonus eligibility (Host Bonus + AE Program)



This role is eligible for our bonus programs:



Host Bonus (company-wide)



- Monthly bonus pool funded by 10% of gross revenue generated from new properties acquired on or after April 18, 2026.

- Paid monthly after books/statements are closed.

- Split equally across eligible tea
mbers (not tied to being assigned to the specific properties).



MDR + AE bonus eligibility



For qualifying subscription deals:



- Upfront commission:30% of upfront earnings, split 50/50 between the MDR (sourced lead) and the AE/closer.

- Ongoing monthly AE bonus:10% of subscription gross revenue, split between MDR and AE/closer (or paid fully if the same person sourced and closed).



Requirements



- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Stable internet connection, with reliable video + audio for conference calls

- Comfortable with outbound outreach, follow-up, and appointment setting

- Organized, consistent, and able to hit daily activity goals within a part-time schedule

- Professional communication and ability to represent the Vaycaay brand



Nice to have



- Experience with short-term rentals (Airbnb/Vrbo/[
](
))

- Experience with lead generation via communities (e.g.,
 groups), social outreach, or cold

- Experience working with CRMs, tracking spreadsheets, or Notion-based systems



Compensation



- $2–$4 USD per hour to start

- Bonus eligibility as outlined above



How to apply



Please submit:



- A short intro (why this role, and relevant experience)

- A brief summary of any appointment-setting or lead generation results

- Your availability in US/Eastern time

- Confirmation of stable internet + ability to join video calls





?Include the subject line: MDR — Vaycaay Application

title: Graphic Designer, Video Editor

1. Graphic Design (45%)

Design sales pages, book covers, ad creatives, and presentation slides

Create
 ad images, website banners, and branding materials.

Design thumbnails, social media posts, and promotional graphics.

Work closely with me to ensure all visuals match brand identity and sales messaging.



2. Video Editing (45%)

Edit Video Sales Letters (VSLs) using provided scripts and footage.

Create engaging
 & TikTok ad videos with motion graphics, captions, and effects.

Reply back with your
 info

Cut and edit short-form content for social media marketing.

Add captions, transitions, background music, and animations to enhance video quality.



3. Research & Market Analysis (10%)

Research top-performing ad creatives & landing pages for inspiration.

Make sure to reply back to this job post with picture of a husky,

Help identify best design practices for different platforms 
, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok).



Things you will love about this role:



1.Creative Freedom – Work on various exciting projects where you can bring your design and video editing skills to life. Your creativity matters!

???? Fully Remote & Flexible Schedule – Work from anywhere with flexible hours, as long as you meet deadlines and deliver high-quality work.

2.Long-Term Growth & Stability – This role has the potential to become a long-term opportunity with room for growth, increased pay, and more responsibilities as we scale.



B. Character Trait:

1.Attention to Detail – You carefully review your work to ensure it meets high-quality standards and aligns with branding and marketing goals.



2.Great Communication – You can clearly express ideas, take feedback constructively, and collaborate effectively.



3.Creativity & Problem-Solving – You think outside the box to create visually compelling graphics and videos that engage and convert.

4.Proactive & Self-Motivated – You take initiative, meet deadlines, and don’t need constant supervision to produce high-quality work.



Reply back with a link to your past work/portfolio.



Our hiring process includes a short interview, followed by a paid trial project to assess the quality of your work. This role is a long-term opportunity for the right candidate, with potential for increased pay and more responsibilities as we grow.

title: Engineering Manager
description:
Mobile and Web App Engineering Manager — Philippines (Remote)



We are looking for an Engineering Manager based in the Philippines to lead a team of approximately five developers. This role combines people management, project execution, and technical leadership. You will work closely with the CTO to keep engineering work organized, on track, and aligned with company priorities.



Our core stack includes MongoDB, TypeScript, and Node.js. You do not need to be the top hands-on coder on the team, but you should be technically strong enough to guide engineers, review approaches, help break down work, and provide clear technical direction.



Responsibilities include day-to-day project management, planning and estimating engineering work, tracking progress against deadlines, identifying risks early, and communicating clearly when work is off track. You will follow up with engineers to make sure tasks are moving forward, help remove blockers, support accountability, and maintain a high standard of execution. You will also mentor developers, improve team coordination, and help create a strong, reliable engineering culture.



The ideal candidate is organized, communicative, proactive, and comfortable managing both technical and operational aspects of a small engineering team. Experience leading developers in a fast-moving environment is important.



You will report directly to the CTO.

title: Office Manager
description:
About Us:

We are a fast-growing restoration company specializing in water, fire, and mold mitigation services. Our team is committed to delivering high-quality service, fast response times, and exceptional customer care. We are looking for a driven and organized Office Manager to help streamline operations and support business growth.



Position Overview:

The Office Manager plays a critical role in daily operations, overseeing administrative functions, financial processes, customer communication, and business development support. This role requires someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in driving efficiency and revenue.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Manage Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR), including invoicing, collections, and vendor payments.

 • Create and manage estimates, proposals, and contracts for restoration projects

 • Support business development efforts, including prospecting and outreach to generate new leads (property managers, plumbers, insurance agents, etc.)

 • Maintain consistent follow-up with customers and subcontractors to ensure project timelines and satisfaction

 • Provide administrative support to the operations team, including scheduling, documentation, and reporting

 • Maintain accurate records in CRM and job management systems

 • Assist with job file compliance and insurance documentation

 • Handle incoming calls,
s, and customer inquiries professionally

 • Coordinate with field teams to ensure smooth project execution



Qualifications:

 • 2+ years of experience in office management, preferably in restoration, construction, or service industry

 • Strong understanding of AP/AR processes and basic accounting principles

 • Experience creating estimates/contracts 

 • Excellent communication and customer service skills

 • Strong organizational and multitasking abilities

 • Self-starter with a proactive approach to problem-solving

 • Proficient in Microsoft Office and CRM/job management software



Preferred Qualifications:

 • Experience in restoration or insurance-related work

 • Familiarity with industry tools such as QuickBooks and Microsoft Office Products 

 • Sales or business development experience



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume along with a brief description of your experience and why you would be a great fit for this role.

Training 

-Templates for Proposals/Contracts

-Template on how to invoice in quickbooks

-Script for answering phone calls

-Script for prospecting residential property managers

-Research on Insurance - TPAs

-Timeline on when to do follow ups

-Timeline on when to collect from Customers/Insurance Companies

-How to properly generate a Customer File in the Server

-How to respond to
s 

- Business Licenses and Insurance Renewals

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month)
description:
Before applying, complete the following (incomplete applications will not be reviewed):

- Share 3 videos you've edited, not a portfolio page, just 3 specific links. For each one, write one sentence on why you're proud of it.

- Watch this video: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1bamjMX35cpjt3qHoT8pEnfRIupRShGto/view?usp=sharing and tell us what you would change about the editing and why.

- Start your application message with the phrase "I'm ready!"



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Junior Video Editor - Premiere Pro & Basic After Effects (Growth Role)
description:
About the Role:

I am a Creative Director and filmmaker based in Los Angeles running a fast-growing production business. I am looking for a highly reliable, detail-oriented Junior Video Editor to join my team.



Please read carefully: This is a growth role. To start, you will act as my Assistant Editor, focusing heavily on social media content. Your primary job will be prepping the canvas perfectly (project setup, rough cuts, captioning) so I can come in and do the creative finishing.



However, my ultimate goal is to find someone I can rely on for all of my editing needs. As you master my Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and prove your reliability, I will train you to take over full edits across a variety of formats, including Social Media Reels, Paid Ads, Video Sales Letters (VSLs), and Event Highlight videos. Hours will increase over time for the right candidate. 



Hours & Pay:



Structure: Hourly pay (tracked). No project-to-project haggling.



Rate: $4.00 – $8.00 USD per hour, depending on experience and portfolio.



Time Commitment: Starting at an average of 10–15 hours per week. The exact hours will fluctuate based on shoot schedules, but there will be a minimum of a few hours guaranteed every single week.



Phase 1 Responsibilities (Starting Immediately):



Project Setup: Downloading raw footage, organizing folders, and setting up Premiere Pro project files using my exact templates.



The A-Cut: Stringing out raw footage, cutting all dead space, and culling bad takes to create a seamless, perfectly paced vocal track.



Visual Framing: Scaling and positioning A-roll footage to match our standard brand guidelines.



Captions: Generating auto-transcripts in Premiere and applying our specific caption styling presets.



Phase 2 Responsibilities (Future Growth):



Visual Ideation: Using AI prompts to generate visual treatments based on the transcript.



Asset Sourcing & Animation: Finding authentic assets and using After Effects to create clean, minimalist animations.



Expanding Formats: Taking the lead on pacing and cutting long-form VSLs, high-energy ads, and event recaps.



Requirements:



Primary editing software must be Adobe Premiere Pro (we need to be able to share .prproj files seamlessly).



Working knowledge of Adobe After Effects (smooth basic animations and keyframing).



Basic color grading skills in Davinci Resolve.



Fast, reliable internet for downloading heavy raw footage files and uploading project files.



Exceptional attention to detail. If a caption is supposed to be at position 0,500, it cannot be at 0,501.



BONUS: Copywriting skills! If you know how to write engaging hooks, draft social media captions, or understand marketing psychology, please let me know.



To Apply:

I need someone who can follow Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) flawlessly. To prove you have read this entire post and have strong attention to detail, please make the subject line of your application exactly: Transcend Setup. I will instantly delete any applications that do not have this subject line.



In your application message, please include:



A brief summary of your experience with Premiere Pro and After Effects.



A link to your portfolio or 1-2 examples of dialogue/talking-head videos you have edited.



Your PC/Mac specs and a screenshot of your internet download/upload speeds.

title: AI Empowered Content Creation: Graphics & Video Editor (Claude + Canva + AI)
description:
Graphics + Video Editor AI VA (Canva / Claude Design / Opus Clip / Blotato / Content Creation)



We are looking for a highly creative, organized, strategic, and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to help create graphics, edit videos, build marketing assets, and use AI tools to turn ideas into polished content across multiple brands.



This role is ideal for someone who loves combining creativity with AI, understands short-form content, can build beautiful visual systems, and can take rough ideas and turn them into eye-catching videos, graphics, landing pages, mockups, pitch decks, and marketing assets.



You should enjoy using new tools, experimenting with trends, and making content that feels modern, engaging, aesthetic, and visually strong.



### About Our Brands



Please review our current brands to get an idea of our style and business types:



* 

* 

* Website: 

* Website: 



Crystal Portal is a metaphysical retail store and community brand that hosts events, workshops, sound baths, astrology activations, classes, and promotions regularly. We need graphics often for events, promotions, flyers, classes, workshops, social posts, product launches, sales, and seasonal campaigns.



Spring Oasis Retreat is currently an Airbnb and retreat property but is being expanded and repositioned more heavily into weddings, retreats, events, artist residencies, and elevated experiences. We need help revamping the branding, marketing, and website experience to better reflect that vision.



We also need support for Alexis Gray’s personal brand, including:



* Pitch decks

* Landing pages

* Event booking pages

* Client-facing PDFs and one-pagers

* Consulting marketing materials

* YouTube content

* Skool community content

* Marketing videos

* Personal brand graphics

* Future client content and consulting materials



This is not just a simple editing role. This is a promising long-term partnership for the right person who is ready to grow with us, think strategically, and apply their skills across multiple brands and marketing channels.



### Main Responsibilities



* Create graphics for social media, events, products, promotions, flyers, YouTube thumbnails, carousels, stories, reels covers, ads, and
 campaigns

* Design graphics for workshops, sound baths, seasonal events, sales, classes, and promotions

* Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
, ads, and Skool communities

* Use AI tools like Claude Design, Canva AI, ChatGPT, Opus Clip, Blotato, Runway, Midjourney, Leonardo, ElevenLabs, CapCut AI, and similar tools to speed up content creation

* Take long-form videos and cut them into short clips with captions, transitions, zooms, overlays, stock footage, sound effects, hooks, and visual storytelling

* Add AI overlays, motion graphics, text effects, b-roll, screenshots, mood boards, mockups, animated elements, and visual references to make content more engaging

* Create interactive webpage concepts and visual layouts using Claude Design or similar AI design tools

* Design landing pages, event booking pages, opt-in pages, lead magnets, and branded client materials

* Create infographics, product labels, printed materials, packaging concepts, signage, and merch mockups

* Help create branded merchandise concepts and realistic product mockups

* Build pitch decks, PDFs, one-pagers, and presentation materials

* Help transform voice notes, Loom videos, rough concepts, screenshots, and written ideas into polished content

* Create branded templates in Canva and keep visual branding consistent across all brands

* Repurpose content into multiple formats across social media platforms

* Research trends, viral editing styles, hooks, sounds, and content formats

* Organize content folders, templates, footage, and project files

* Help create SOPs and workflows for repeatable content systems

* Assist with project management, deadlines, timelines, and keeping marketing deliverables organized

* Collaborate through Google Drive, Google Meet, Asana, Loom, Slack, and messaging apps



### Required Skills



* Strong Canva skills

* Strong graphic design skills with a strong eye for layout, typography, color, and premium branding

* Strong video editing skills in CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

* Advanced understanding of AI tools for editing, design, copywriting, mockups, automations, and content systems

* Experience creating short-form content that is visually engaging and optimized for social media

* Experience creating landing pages, pitch decks, infographics, one-pagers, and web page concepts

* Comfortable creating interactive designs and modern web layouts

* Strong understanding of social media trends, storytelling, hooks, pacing, captions, and attention spans

* Strong English communication

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects at once

* Comfortable taking feedback and improving quickly

* Able to work independently and proactively without needing constant direction

* Good project management skills

* Strategic thinking beyond just design execution



### Bonus Skills



* Experience with Shopify, Meta Business Suite, YouTube Studio, Skool, Kajabi, or social media scheduling tools

* Basic copywriting or caption writing skills

* Experience with
 marketing graphics and ads

* Experience creating packaging, labels, and printed materials

* Experience designing merchandise and mockups

* Experience using Claude, Moltbot/OpenClaw, Claudedesign, Wix Harmony, Framer, Zapier, Make, or n8n

* Experience creating branded content for wellness, retail, lifestyle, events, spiritual, fashion, beauty, luxury, hospitality, retreats, or weddings

* Experience with website builders like Wix, Framer, Shopify, Webflow, Kajabi, or Squarespace



### Brand Style



Our brands lean toward:



* Modern but soulful

* Bright, aesthetic, premium visuals

* Retro wellness vibes

* Trendy but polished

* Strong storytelling and emotional connection

* Clean, visually satisfying design that feels elevated and engaging

* Luxury retreat, wedding, wellness, and lifestyle aesthetics

* High-end but approachable

* Creative and immersive



### Hours + Pay



* Part-time to start, but ideally full time 30-40 hours and immediate start

* Potential to grow into a larger long-term role

* Flexible hours, but must be responsive and reliable

* Please include your hourly rate and monthly rate options



### To Apply



Please send:



1. Portfolio of graphics and video edits or web pages

2. Examples of reels, TikToks, shorts, landing pages, mockups, or decks you have created

3. List of AI tools you know how to use

4. Favorite content creator, brand, or aesthetic you admire

5. Your hourly rate

6. A short paragraph about why you would be a great fit

7. Include the phrase “Creative AI Wizard” at the top of your application so we know you read the full post



If you know how to make a boring video become addictive to watch, design a webpage that feels alive, and create content that actually makes people stop scrolling, we probably want to meet you.

title: AI Video Content Virtual Assistant (Higgsfield / Tolstoy / Seedance Experience Required)
description:
Your Mission: you will be responsible for two things:



Creating organic video content that actually performs

Publishing that content consistently across social platforms



Simple. Not easy.

Conversational tone

Take a simple idea and turn it into a finished video

, etc.)

Consistency matters more than perfection.

A short message answering:

Final Note

title: Go highlevel Expert & Support Specialist
description:

If you can step in, understand a business model, build clean systems, and speak confidently with clients… keep reading.



What You’ll Own

Integrations & Tech Stack

- Client Support & Communication

- Documentation & SOPs

- Keep workflows organized as we scale

- Optimization & Scaling

- Identify bottlenecks and inefficiencies

- Improve systems based on performance

- Continuously upgrade the CRM as the business grows



What Success Looks Like

- Leads are routed instantly and correctly

- Follow-up happens automatically without manual work

- Clients understand and trust the systems you build

- Sales team has full visibility into pipeline and performance

- Systems run clean—and when they don’t, they’re fixed fast



Must-Have Skills (No Exceptions)

 and SMS automation inside GHL

title: Part-Time Video Editor (Long-Term) – Short-Form Reels (Color-Focused)
description:
We are looking for a reliable long-term video editor to help produce consistent short-form content (Instagram Reels / TikTok).

This is a part-time, ongoing role with steady monthly work.

We produce approximately 50–60 reels per month and need an editor who can deliver consistent quality, especially in color grading, along with clean, fast-paced edits.

?? IMPORTANT: READ BEFORE APPLYING

Our top priority is color quality and consistency.

Many editors can cut clips — we are specifically looking for someone who can:

Match color across different clips

Maintain natural skin tones

Deliver a clean, professional, brand-level look

If your color grading is not strong, this role will not be a good fit.

Workload:

~50–60 short-form videos per month

Flexible schedule (daily or batch work)

~20–40 hours per month

What You’ll Be Doing:

Editing short-form videos (15–45 seconds)

Matching style and pacing of reference videos

Syncing footage to audio

Adding captions and light motion

Ensuring consistent, high-quality color across all clips

Editing & Color Style Requirements:

???? Color (MOST IMPORTANT)

Clean, natural, professional color

Consistent look across all clips

Proper exposure and contrast

Natural skin tones (not over-saturated or washed out)

No heavy LUTs or “filter” look



Requirements:

Experience editing Reels / TikTok / Shorts

Strong understanding of color correction & grading

Ability to maintain consistent look across multiple videos

Reliable and responsive communication

Able to deliver consistently each week

Turnaround Expectations:

24–48 hour turnaround per batch

Consistent delivery (no long delays)

Compensation:

$10–$15 per reel

Consistent monthly workload

Long-term opportunity with potential for increased volume

How to Apply (IMPORTANT):

To be considered, you MUST:

Send 2–3 examples of videos you’ve edited

(must show strong color work — not just cuts)

Include the word “COLOR” at the top of your application

Answer this question:

???? Do you color grade manually or use LUTs?

Be ready to complete a paid test edit

Test Edit:

We will provide:

Raw footage

A reference video

You will be paid $15–$25 to complete a test edit.

???? Goal:

Match the color, consistency, and overall look of the reference as closely as possible.

Editing is secondary — color accuracy is the priority.

Goal:

We are building a long-term relationship with a reliable editor.

If you perform well, this will become ongoing monthly work with consistent volume.

title: E-Commerce Marketing Coordinator
description:
Role

We arere hiring an E-Commerce Marketing Director to own the full marketing execution of a growing Asian American art and lifestyle brand with 100,000+ social media followers. 



This brand was built on cultural storytelling and founder authenticity. We sell original watercolor art-printed products — tote bags, tea towels, Swedish dish cloths, art prints — and our flagship product, the Ultimate Journal Bag. The founder creates the content and the products. Your job is to make sure every marketing channel is running, optimized, and generating revenue without her involvement.



We are looking for someone who has run
 programs, managed paid ads, built affiliate pipelines, and handled wholesale outreach — and can point to specific, measurable results from each.



If you need to be told what to do every week, this is not the right role. If you see a gap and fill it before anyone asks — keep reading!



Responsibilities

- Own the full Klaviyo
 marketing program — planning, writing, designing, scheduling, and reporting. Send 2–3 campaigns per week. 

- Monitor and respond to all customer DMs and
s within 24 hours. Resolve shipping issues, coordinate warehouse replacements, and file insurance claims for lost packages.

- Set up, manage, and optimize paid ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager. Monitor ROAS, CPC, and CTR daily.

- Research, identify, and contact micro-influencers across art, journaling, home decor, Asian American lifestyle, and stationery niches. 

- Research independent retail stores and initiate personalized wholesale outreach via DM and
. 

- Manage ManyChat automations on Instagram and TikTok. Schedule content using the provided content calendar. Respond to post comments in the founder's voice. Manage affiliate applications, approvals, and discount codes.



Requirements

- Minimum 2 years of hands-on Klaviyo experience — flows built from scratch, not just campaigns sent. You can point to a flow you built and tell us what revenue it generated.

- Minimum 2 years of Meta Ads Manager experience — full campaign structures, not boosted posts. You have managed budgets over $300/day.

- Experience with influencer or affiliate outreach. You know the difference between a gifting campaign that converts and one that doesn't.

- Experience with wholesale outreach or B2B sales communications is a strong advantage.

- Excellent written English. You write in a way that is warm, clear, and on-brand — whether it's an
 subject line, a customer DM, or an influencer pitch.

- Actively uses AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, or similar — as a core part of daily work.

- Highly organized. You manage your own deadlines, update your own trackers, and never let a follow-up fall through the cracks.



Tools

- Klaviyo, Meta Ads Manager, Instagram,  TikTok Ads Manager, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, 
, ManyChat, Shopify, Faire, Google Docs and Sheets, Claude or ChatGPT.



Results

-
 revenue contributing 25%+ of monthly DTC revenue within 90 days.

- All core Klaviyo automated flows built, tested, and live within 60 days.

- Meta Ads maintaining 3.0x+ ROAS at scaled daily spend.

- TikTok Ads generating measurable attributed revenue within 90 days.

- 5+ wholesale accounts opened or in active negotiation within 90 days.

 - 15–20 active influencer relationships in the pipeline within 90 days.

- Founder fully removed from day-to-day marketing execution within 90 days.



Compensation

$10-$15/hour. 20-25  hours per week to start. Strong potential to grow into a full-time role as the business scales. Performance-based rate increase available at 90-day review.



Fully remote. Philippines-based candidates strongly encouraged to apply.



Our Values

Ownership over execution. We don't want someone who completes tasks. We want someone who owns outcomes. The difference is whether you're thinking about results or just checking boxes.

Community first. Our customers feel like they know us because they do. We treat that relationship as the most valuable thing we have.

Proactive over reactive. If you wait to be told there's a problem, you're already behind. The right person for this role spots gaps, flags them early, and brings solutions — not just updates.

Quality over volume. Every
, every ad, every customer reply represents this brand. We would rather send fewer things that are excellent than more things that are mediocre.



How to Apply

Send your application to 
 with the subject line: "Marketing Director — [Full-Name]"

Include the following at the top of the
 SUNSET. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



1. Introduction: Your name, location in the Philippines, and summary of your marketing background and what makes you the right fit for this role.

2. Klaviyo experience: Describe a flow or campaign you built from scratch. What was the objective, what did you build, and what did it generate in revenue or engagement?

3. Paid ads experience: Describe a Meta or TikTok campaign you managed. What was the budget, what was the ROAS or result, and what would you do differently?

title: Graphic Designer (Remote)
description:
About Buzz Digital Agency

Buzz Digital Agency is a creative-driven and performance-focused B2B digital marketing firm headquartered in Houston, Texas. We help high-growth companies in SaaS, consulting, real estate, construction, and fintech attract and convert ideal leads through powerful storytelling and strategic design. Our creative team transforms brand strategy into scroll-stopping visuals that fuel lead generation, sales enablement, and digital performance.



Visit: 



Role Purpose

As a Graphic Designer at Buzz Digital Agency, you’ll bridge brand storytelling with conversion-focused design. You’ll create engaging assets for social media, ads,
s, eBooks, sales decks, and landing pages that drive awareness, trust, and action. You’ll work in agile, cross-functional sprint teams to execute client strategies and uphold consistent, authoritative design across every touchpoint.



Key Responsibilities



Brand & Visual Identity

-Conduct industry and competitor research to inform visual direction.

-Develop brand identities: logos, color systems, typography, brand guidelines.

-Create branded collateral such as business cards,
 signatures, letterheads, and brochures.



Marketing, Sales & Funnel Assets

-Design high-converting paid ad creatives (LinkedIn, Google Display, retargeting).

-Develop visually engaging landing pages and lead-gen assets (eBooks, whitepapers, checklists).

-Design sales enablement tools: pitch decks, proposal templates, case studies.



Social Media & Content Design

-Design branded Canva templates for social posts, video thumbnails, GIFs, and Reels.

-Design creatives for ads and blog content.

-Design and/or edit videos for Social Media channels, Ads, Website. 

-Ensure cohesive brand visuals across social and digital channels.



Collaboration & Iteration

-Work within agile sprint teams alongside strategists, copywriters, and account managers.

-Interpret wireframes and campaign briefs into polished, conversion-driven visuals.

-Deliver creative variations for A/B testing and refine based on performance data.

-Participate in weekly design standups to iterate with the team and optimize visual outcomes.



Asset Management & Tools

-Organize and maintain digital assets across Drive, Canva, 
, and other platforms.

-Optimize images for digital use and collaborate with web developers when needed.



Essential Competencies

-Conversion-focused design thinking

-Canva expertise; Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) proficiency, understanding of editing tools such as Capcut, Promo videos etc. for editing

-Strong visual hierarchy, layout, and branding alignment

-Understanding of marketing funnels and digital lead generation

-Time management and agility in asynchronous workflows

-Strong communication and collaboration skills



Qualifications & Experience

-2–4 years of experience in a graphic design role, ideally within a digital agency or B2B setting

-A strong portfolio showcasing digital ads, branded content, sales collateral, and lead-gen assets

Bonus: Experience with SaaS, consultancy, or professional service brands



Certifications & Training -Strongly Recommended

Canva Design School Certifications

Adobe Certified Professional (Illustrator, Photoshop)

Google UX Design Certificate





Why Join Buzz Digital Agency?

-Work with a dynamic, creative team shaping the future of B2B digital marketing.-

-Collaborate on diverse, high-impact projects for industry-leading clients.

-Be part of a fast-growing agency that values your creativity, innovation, and career growth.

-Enjoy competitive compensation, room for growth, and a supportive, results-driven culture.

-Opportunity to grow your skills and make a tangible impact on client success.



Ready to Join Us?

If you’re excited to bring your creativity to Buzz Digital and make an impact through powerful, conversion-focused design, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and let’s create something extraordinary together.

title: Virtual Assistant - Video Editor & YouTube Channel Manager
description:
Job Title:

Virtual Assistant – Video Editor & YouTube Channel Manager

Part-Time or Full-Time

Remote

This role will start with one account and may expand to two accounts over time.

The short-form videos will be 10–30 second highlight clips pulled from daily content.



This role will begin with support for one YouTube account, with the opportunity to grow into support for a second account as the workload expands.



We also want someone who is comfortable using English to respond to comments on YouTube as an admin in a professional and natural way.



Responsibilities:

Pull strong highlight 
nts for short videos

Organize raw footage and keep content files in order

Upload or prepare YouTube videos

Help with titles, descriptions, thumbnails, scheduling, and posting

Respond to YouTube comments/messages professionally as an admin

Follow our editing style and brand direction

Work quickly and consistently with recurring content

Potentially support a second account as the role grows

Requirements:



Must be based in the Philippines

Strong English communication skills

Proven experience with video editing

Good understanding of YouTube long-form and short-form content

Able to edit content in a fast and organized way

Able to identify engaging clips and 
nts

Comfortable managing YouTube comments and audience engagement

Reliable internet and good communication

Preferred Skills:

title: Go High Level Funnel Finisher + Facebook Ads Specialist (Focus: Paid China Travel Bookings)
description:
We are a luxury travel brand specializing in cruise experiences and hosting international group travel.

We are launching multiple China group trips (2–3 groups of 60 travelers each) and need an experienced Go High Level expert to build a high-converting sales funnel from scratch.

Goal:

Build a complete funnel that drives registrations and payments for 120–180 travelers from international markets (primarily Australia and Singapore).

Scope of Work:

Build a full funnel inside Go High Level from scratch

Create a high-converting landing page (sales page)

Set up group selection (2–3 groups with separate payment links)

Integrate Stripe payment links for service fees

Create checkout and thank-you pages

Set up
 and/or SMS follow-up automation

Ensure mobile optimization and a clean user experience

Structure the funnel for conversions (clear CTA, urgency, flow)

Focus:

This is a SALES funnel, not just a design project.

We want a clean, simple, high-converting layout that drives action.

Target Audience:

International travelers from visa-friendly countries such as Australia and Singapore.

The funnel should:

Highlight a curated, hosted China experience

Reduce friction for international travelers

Build trust and authority

Clearly guide users to register and secure their spot

Requirements:

Proven experience with Go High Level (must provide examples)

Experience building high-converting funnels (not just design)

Experience integrating Stripe or payment systems

Strong understanding of conversion-focused design

Ability to complete the project quickly



We are a travel brand specializing in international group trips and cruise experiences.



We currently have a Go High Level funnel that is approximately 70–80% complete and need an experienced freelancer to finalize the funnel and help generate real paid bookings.



This is NOT a full build from scratch. The funnel is already built and needs to be completed, optimized, and used for conversion.



Goal:

Finalize the funnel, implement service fee payments, and drive paid bookings for our China group trips.



Scope of Work:

• Review and clean up the existing funnel inside Go High Level

• Finalize landing page structure (clear messaging, CTA, layout)

• Implement and test Stripe service fee payment (must work end-to-end)

• Complete checkout and thank-you page flow

• Ensure mobile optimization and smooth user experience

• Launch and manage
/Instagram ads using your own ad account

• Drive traffic to the funnel and focus on converting users into PAID bookings (service fees)



Requirements:

• Strong experience with Go High Level (must provide examples)

• Proven experience running
/Instagram ads that generate SALES (not just leads)

• Must be able to run ads from your own ad account

• Ability to quickly understand and improve existing funnels

• Strong execution and attention to detail



Performance Expectations:

• Focus on REAL paid bookings (service fee collected)

• Provide daily updates (ad spend, leads, conversions)

• Optimize campaigns and funnel performance



Compensation:

• Fixed base: $200–$300

• Performance-based bonuses tied to paid bookings (service fees collected)

• Milestone incentives as booking volume increases

• Opportunity for long-term work and higher earnings based on results



To apply:

Include the word "CHINA" and provide:



Examples of funnels you have worked on



Examples of ad campaigns that generated actual sales



We are looking for someone who can move fast, execute, and deliver results.

title: Brand Social Media Manager – (Instagram + Facebook)
description:
Social Media Manager - Job Duties Sheet (Instagram +
)

Role Summary

Manage and grow the brand’s presence on Instagram and
 through content planning, creation, publishing, community management, influencer outreach, and performance reporting. Ensure consistent brand voice, visual identity, and measurable growth in engagement, traffic, and sales/leads (as applicable).

Core Responsibilities

1) Strategy + Planning

• Build and maintain a weekly/monthly content calendar for Instagram and
.

• Align content themes with brand goals (awareness, engagement, lead gen, sales, launches).

• Research audience insights, competitors, and platform trends to guide content decisions.

• Recommend campaign ideas, hooks, and creative angles based on performance data.

2) Content Creation + Production

• Write captions in the brand voice (short-form, long-form, and CTA-driven).

• Create post-ready assets: Reels, Stories, carousels, static posts, and
 posts.

• Source and organize UGC, testimonials, product shots, and lifestyle content.

• Coordinate creative requests (photo/video briefs) and ensure assets match brand guidelines.

• Basic editing: cropping, sizing, subtitles, light retouching, simple motion graphics (as needed).

3) Publishing + Scheduling

• Schedule and publish content using approved tools (e.g., Meta Business Suite).

• Ensure correct formatting, hashtags/keywords, tagging, and location usage where relevant.

• Maintain posting consistency and timing based on best-performing windows.

• Manage link placement strategy (link in bio, story links, pinned posts, etc.).

4) Community Management

• Monitor and respond to comments, DMs, and post replies within agreed response times.

• Engage proactively with followers and relevant accounts (likes, comments, story replies).

• Escalate customer service issues, sensitive comments, or PR risks to the appropriate team.

• Moderate spam and enforce community guidelines.

5) Growth + Engagement

• Optimize hashtags/keywords and content structure for discoverability.

• Support collaborations (creator outreach coordination, giveaways, collab posts).

• Track and improve KPIs: follower growth, reach, engagement rate, saves/shares, clicks.

• Test and iterate: formats, hooks, CTA styles, posting times, and creatives.

Influencer Discovery + Outreach (Required)

6) Identify Influencers / Creators

• Build and maintain an influencer list aligned with the brand audience and niche.

• Source creators across tiers (nano, micro, mid-tier, macro) and formats (UGC, lifestyle, review, tutorial).

• Evaluate fit using audience match, engagement rate and comment quality, content quality/brand safety, and prior partnerships.

• Refresh lists weekly and prioritize new prospects for outreach.

7) Collect Influencer Contact Info + Key Details

• For each creator, document and verify public contact points:
 (bio/contact button), IG handle/link,
 Page (if applicable), management/agency contact (if listed), website/contact form link, and media kit link (if available).

• Maintain a tracking sheet/CRM with: name + handle, platforms, follower counts, recent engagement estimate, location/time zone (if known), content tags, notes on fit, outreach status, and pricing/gifted-only notes (if known).

8) Outreach + Relationship Management

• Draft and send outreach messages 
 + DM) using brand-approved templates.

• Coordinate deliverables: posting dates, content requirements, FTC disclosures, and usage rights.

• Negotiate basics when permitted (rates, timeline, concepts) and escalate for final approval.

• Maintain follow-up cadence and keep the outreach pipeline updated.

• Track results per creator (views, engagement, clicks, conversions) and recommend who to re-hire.

 Groups (Required)

9) Find & Vet
 Groups

• Identify relevant
 Groups where the target audience is active.

• Vet each group before engaging: member count and activity level, group rules (promo/links policy), audience fit/sentiment, and approval requirements.

10) Maintain
 Group Targets List

• Build a database of groups with: group name + link, niche/category, member count + activity notes, posting rules summary, admin/mod contact (if publicly available), recommended content angles, and status (not joined/joined/approved/active posting schedule).

11) Group Engagement (Value-First)

• Participate consistently with helpful, non-spam engagement (answer questions, provide tips, share educational content).

• Mention the brand only when allowed and relevant; request admin approval for promos when needed.

• Report which groups drive the best engagement/traffic and double down.

Meta Tools + Admin

• Manage
 Page updates (bio, buttons, pinned posts, featured content).

• Support Meta Business Suite tasks (inbox, scheduling, Page roles if applicable).

• Maintain an organized asset library with clear naming conventions and folders.

Reporting + Optimization

• Deliver weekly or monthly reports with insights and next-step actions.

• Report on top-performing content and replicate what’s working.

• Track influencer outreach metrics: creators sourced, creators contacted, reply rate, cost per deliverable, performance by creator.

• Track group engagement outcomes: posts made, engagement, and clicks/leads/sales if tracked.

Deliverables (Typical)

• Content calendar: weekly or monthly.

• Posting cadence: ___ posts/week (IG), ___ stories/week, ___ posts/week (FB).

• Influencer list: ___ new creators/week added + outreach updates.

•
 group list: ___ new groups/week identified + engagement log.

• Community responses: within ___ hours.

• Monthly report: metrics + insights + next month action plan.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

• Engagement rate (likes, comments, saves, shares).

• Reach and impressions.

• Follower growth and profile visits.

• Link clicks / traffic.

• Leads or sales attributed (if tracked).

• Response time + community sentiment.

• Influencer outreach: reply rate, cost per result, performance per creator.

• Group participation: engagement + traffic/leads from compliant posts.

Success Standards

• On-brand, consistent content and voice across Instagram and
.

• Reliable execution of posting schedule and inbox coverage.

• Active influencer pipeline with documented contact info and outcomes.

• Active, compliant
 group participation that drives measurable lift.

• Clear reporting with actionable insights.

title: Media Buying Facebook Expert - Remodeling Niche
description:
APPLY HERE OR YOU WILL NOT BE HIRED: 



We're hiring a high-level Media Buyer with strong
 advertising experience, ideally in the home remodeling niche. You must understand how to create demand for kitchen and bathroom remodelers — not just generate cheap leads.



Your core responsibilities:



Managing, testing, and scaling Meta 
 and Instagram) ad campaigns



Identifying winning ads, audiences, and hooks inside Meta Ads Manager



Using performance data to optimize CPL, lead quality, and appointment rates



Running structured testing frameworks across copy, creative, targeting, and placement



Developing and iterating creatives based on outcome metrics



Monitoring KPIs including CPL, CTR, CPM, cost per appointment, and ROI



Editing short-form video ads in CapCut when needed



Creating and refining static ad creatives and image variations



Working inside GoHighLevel to monitor lead flow and optimize tagging



Collaborating on strategy to improve homeowner targeting and messaging



Managing budgets across multiple accounts and scaling proven winners



Producing detailed yet clear performance reports and recommendations



What we require:



Strong expertise in Meta Ads Manager and campaign optimization



Proven ability to identify and scale winning ads based on real data



Experience with GoHighLevel for tracking, tagging, and basic CRM workflows



Ability to edit video content in CapCut



Some image editing and creative design experience



Strong understanding of homeowner psychology and remodeling demand cycles



Experience with lead generation (NOT e-commerce or brand awareness only)



Ability to communicate clearly and professionally in English



Willingness to work U.S. time zones and respond quickly to performance shifts



Highly analytical, resourceful, and execution-focused



This role is for someone who knows how to leverage data, make smart adjustments fast, and generate measurable results. If you know how to find winning ads in the Meta ecosystem and you thrive in a performance-driven environment — you'll excel here.

title: Internal Accounting Assistant
description:
Own the Numbers. Keep the Engine Running.



This is NOT just a bookkeeping role.



This is NOT a slow, task-by-task accounting job.



This is a speed + accuracy + ownership role.



Role Overview

We’re hiring a Part-Time Internal Accounting Assistant to support our internal financial operations.



You will be the behind-the-scenes operator making sure everything in QuickBooks is accurate, up to date, and handled quickly.



This role is critical—because when accounting is messy, everything breaks.



You’ll make sure that never happens.



Job Responsibilities



- Maintain and update financials inside QuickBooks

- Categorize transactions accurately and consistently

- Perform bank and credit card reconciliations

- Track accounts payable and receivable

- Keep records clean, organized, and audit-ready

- Identify discrepancies and fix them fast

- Support internal reporting and monthly close

- Handle ad hoc accounting tasks as needed





Qualifications



- Quick and efficient — you don’t sit on tasks

- Detail-obsessed — small errors don’t slip past you

- Reliable — if it’s yours, it gets done

- Independent — you don’t need constant direction

- Organized thinker — you bring structure to everything

- Put the word TAX  on the subject line to be considered.





Requirements

- Certified QuickBooks ProAdvisor (non-negotiable)

- Strong hands-on experience with QuickBooks

- Solid understanding of bookkeeping fundamentals

- Ability to work quickly without sacrificing accuracy

- Strong communication and responsiveness
