title: B2B Outbound Cold Caller & Appointment Setter
description:
SGJ Consulting is a sales consulting firm based in Braintree, Massachusetts. We work with contractors across the US to help them recover revenue from estimates that never closed.

I need an experienced outbound cold caller to work through a provided list of contractors, deliver a short pitch, and set appointments with decision makers for a follow-up call with me.

This role is pure outbound. You must be comfortable making high-volume calls to small business owners and contractors who can be skeptical and direct. If you have only handled inbound calls or customer service, this is not the right fit.

The Role:



Call from my provided list of contractors — business owners and decision makers only

Deliver a short scripted pitch (provided)

Goal: book a callback appointment with me OR capture an
 address at minimum

80+ outbound calls per day, Monday through Friday

Log every call outcome in GoHighLevel CRM after every single call

Send a brief end-of-day summary via Slack



Requirements:



Proven outbound B2B cold calling experience — this is non-negotiable

Experience calling skeptical decision makers — contractors, tradespeople, or small business owners preferred

Excellent spoken English with clear, confident delivery

Reliable VOIP setup for US calls — GoHighLevel dialer will be provided

Available Monday through Friday during US Eastern business hours

Highly organized, self-directed, and results focused

Familiar with GoHighLevel CRM preferred but not required



***This is not a customer service role. This is not an inbound role. You must have real outbound cold calling experience and be comfortable with rejection and resistance on the phone.***





Compensation:



$200 base per week paid every Friday via PayPal

$20 bonus per qualified booked appointment — decision maker agrees to a call with me and shows up

Strong performers typically earn $350-$400 total per week



To Apply:

Reply with your specific outbound cold calling experience. Tell me what industries you have called into, what your daily dial volume was, and what you were setting appointments for. Applications without outbound experience will not be considered.

Interviews will be conducted via Zoom.



Start date, immediate

title: AI UGC Editor (Higgsfield Specialist)
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled AI UGC Editor who can create realistic, high-converting AI-generated UGC ads using Higgsfield.



This is not a traditional video editing role — you will not appear on camera or record yourself. Everything is created inside AI tools. Your job is to bring scripts to life using ultra-realistic AI avatars that feel indistinguishable from real creators.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Create AI-generated UGC-style ads using Higgsfield

Direct AI avatars to perform natural, believable actions (not just talking)

Build scenes that feel real (e.g., car interiors, natural lighting environments)

Ensure lip sync, pacing, and delivery feel human

Produce scroll-stopping creatives designed for Meta & TikTok ads

Deliver ready-to-use video outputs (with basic formatting via CapCut if needed)



What Great Work Looks Like:

• Avatar realism: The AI character must look like a credible, attractive real person — not an obvious AI. No uncanny valley.

• Action execution: The editor must be able to direct the avatar to perform specific physical actions on cue — putting on or taking off glasses, glancing out a window, reacting with surprise or delight. This requires Higgsfield skill, not just template use.

• Natural delivery: Lip sync must match the script. Pacing must feel human. No robotic cadence or dead eyes.

• Setting and lighting: The scene needs to feel like a real environment — typically a car interior with natural window light. The editor must be able to build or select scenes that match the brief.

• Ecom awareness: The editor should understand what a direct-response ad needs to do — stop the scroll in the first 3 seconds, hold attention, and feel like organic UGC, not a produced commercial.



Non-Negotiable Requirements:

• Proven Higgsfield experience — must be able to show prior work, not just claim it

• Ability to generate realistic AI avatars that pass as real people at first glance

• Ability to direct avatar actions beyond just talking — physical movements, reactions, props

• Ecom or DTC advertising experience — they must understand what a Meta/TikTok ad needs to do

• Basic CapCut familiarity — even if Faiz handles final edit, the editor should understand the output format

• Fast turnaround — able to deliver a complete Higgsfield video within 48 hours of receiving a brief

• Reliable communication — active on WhatsApp and 



Strong Bonus (Nice to Have)

• Portfolio of AI UGC ads that have run on Meta or TikTok

• Experience with product-demo style AI video (showing a product being used by an AI avatar)

• Has worked with ecom brands in health, beauty, lifestyle, or accessories categories

• Understands hook structure and first-3-second creative principles



Automatic Disqualifiers:

• Cannot show any real Higgsfield output — claims experience but has no work to show

• Output looks clearly AI-generated / uncanny — avatar is not convincing as a real person

• No understanding of what a direct-response ad is trying to accomplish

• Cannot direct avatar physical actions — only knows how to use basic talking-head templates

• Slow responder — takes more than 48 hours to reply during the hiring process itself

• Asks to see scripts or briefs before the test task is completed



Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test task to evaluate fit for the role.



How to Apply

Please include:

Portfolio of Higgsfield work (required)

Examples of AI UGC ads (especially for Meta/TikTok if available)

A short note on your experience with e-commerce creatives

Your typical turnaround time



Application Instructions (Important)

Do not send applications through OnlineJobs.ph messaging system or
 — these will not be reviewed.

To apply, contact directly via WhatsApp: Joan 
Important:

This role is for someone who understands that performance matters more than aesthetics.

We’re not looking for “nice-looking AI videos” — we’re looking for ads that convert.

title: Reviews Specialist (Calling US Homeowners)
description:
Job Title: Reviews Specialist (Calling US Homeowners)



Type: Full time, Remote, Independent Contractor



Hours: Monday–Friday, 12:00 p.m.–9:00 p.m. US Eastern



Compensation: USD $2,000–$3,000/month on target earnings based on experience and performance



****************************



ABOUT THE ROLE: 



Contractor Independence helps roofing companies in the US get more Google reviews from their happy customers.



We’re hiring a Reviews Specialist to call homeowners that have worked with our Clients, ask a few questions about their experience, and guide them to leave a Google review. No cold calling. No selling. Just quality conversations and disciplined follow up.



Your mission: turn completed home visits into consistent, high quality Google reviews.



****************************



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Contact Homeowners: Contact customers after completed appointments via call, SMS, voi
 to gather feedback on their experience with the client’s business.



 Generate Reviews: Gather feedback on customer experience, ask customers to leave a Google review, send the link and guide the customer through leaving a review.



 Resolve Issues: Identify any negative experiences or concerns and escalate them to the team and the client, and put the homeowner at ease.



 Update CRM: Log call outcomes, data, notes, and review status accurately to ensure up to date and accurate records.



*This is a high volume, structured role. You’ll be following a proven script and process, not making it up as you go.



****************************



MUST-HAVE REQUIREMENTS:



     Very clear, easy to understand spoken English for US homeowners (you’ll be on the phone all day)



     Comfortable handling live calls in English, reading a script, and responding naturally in real time



     2+ years experience in sales, retention, or customer service (call center / BPO / SDR / CSR is ideal)



     Strong communication and customer service skills



     Able to handle high call volume and repetitive outreach without burning out



     Reliable internet, headset, and a quiet work environment

title: Full-Time AI Video Producer — Permanent Role (U.S. Company)
description:
Full-Time AI Video Producer — Permanent Role (U.S. Company)



We're a U.S.-based AI video production studio. We don't do "good enough." Our clients — real estate brokerages, insurance companies, commercial brands, and talent networks — pay us because the final video doesn't look AI-generated. It looks expensive.



We're hiring one full-time producer for a permanent position. Not a gig. Not a trial project that becomes three months of ghosting. A real seat on the team, with daily work, raises, and a path to lead.



What You'll Actually Do



Every day you'll be moving AI video from concept to finished deliverable. That means:



- Generating clips across Seedance, Kling, VEO, Sora, Runway, Pika, and HeyGen — and knowing which one wins for which shot before you burn credits on the wrong tool

- Chaining multi-clip sequences with last-frame continuity so a 30-second video feels like one take, not three fragments bolted together

- Making decisions about voice — when to run Minimax voice clones vs. native platform audio, when to re-dub, when to let it ride

- Finishing in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or DaVinci Resolve — cutting to pace, mixing audio that doesn't fatigue, adding captions that match brand typography, color-matching shots that don't agree with each other out of the generator

- Splicing pre-built branded end cards so cleanly that no one can tell where the generated content stops and the end card starts

- Catching the stuff that kills AI video: warped hands, collapsing backgrounds, four-fingered reflections, eyes that drift, lip-sync that's half a frame off, lighting that jumps between shots. You see it before we do, and you fix it before it ships.



We'll give you the briefs, the scripts, the character references, and the brand standards. You take it from there.



Who We're Looking For



This role suits someone who:



- Already treats AI video as their craft, not a side experiment. You've been in the tools long enough to have opinions about them.

- Gets visibly annoyed by bad AI output and can't help fixing it

- Works fast without getting sloppy — we ship volume, not hero projects

- Communicates clearly in written English and is comfortable on a Loom or a quick call when something needs to be talked through

- Overlaps a reasonable chunk of the day with U.S. Eastern time

- Wants stability. This is a job, not a portfolio-building stop.



What You Get



- Permanent salaried position with daily work year-round — no feast-or-famine

- Every tool we use, paid for by us. You will not spend a peso on subscriptions.

- Raises tied to output and quality, not tenure

- A path to leading a small team as we scale — first performer into the role gets it



How to Apply



Send us three things:



1. Two to four samples of AI video you personally produced. Mix of styles if you have them. We want to see avatar work, multi-clip sequences, and anything with branded finishing (lower thirds, end cards, captions). Traditional editing reels alone won't qualify — we need AI-generated work.



2. A short note (no more than a paragraph or two) telling us which AI video tools you reach for first and why, and one example of a shot or sequence that was hard to get right and how you solved it. We're not looking for an essay. We're looking for how you think.



3. Your availability (hours per week, time zone overlap) and your monthly rate expectation.



That's it. If the samples are strong and the note shows real taste, we'll respond within a few days with next steps.



No samples, no response. Stock reels, template work, or other people's videos with your name on them will be obvious and disqualifying.

title: Senior QuickBooks Online Accounting Specialist / Controller – Manufacturing & Construction
description:
Job description

We are a U.S.-based manufacturing and construction-related company seeking a senior QuickBooks Online accounting specialist with strong experience in cleanup, chart of accounts design, inventory, job costing, monthly close, and financial analysis.



This is not a basic data-entry bookkeeping role. We want someone who can take ownership of the quality, clarity, and usefulness of our books over time.



Our business includes manufacturing, inventory, installation, and job-based work. We need someone who understands businesses that have both product sales and project/job cost activity.



We want someone who will spend time learning our business, how we make money, how our projects work, and what our financials should look like. We want our books closed each month in a disciplined and timely manner, transactions classified correctly, and our financial statements reviewed by someone who can tell us whether the numbers make sense.



We also want someone who can clearly explain the financials, identify issues, make practical recommendations, and provide strong cash flow analysis. This role should help us build order, improve financial visibility, and support better decision-making.



Main responsibilities:



Review our current QuickBooks Online file

Review and simplify our chart of accounts

Help redesign the COA into a cleaner, more useful structure

Ensure transactions are classified correctly

Ensure books are closed each month in a disciplined and timely manner

Review reconciliations and identify problem areas

Help separate direct costs, overhead, inventory-related costs, and job-related costs correctly

Review financial statements and help determine whether the numbers make sense

Learn our business model, operations, and market well enough to improve financial accuracy and reporting usefulness

Explain financial statements, trends, and concerns clearly to ownership

Make practical recommendations based on the financials

Perform cash flow analysis and help us improve cash visibility and planning

Flag items that should be escalated to a CPA or tax professional



Minimum qualifications:



5+ years of bookkeeping/accounting experience

3+ years of hands-on QuickBooks Online experience

Direct experience with manufacturing/inventory businesses and/or construction/job-costing businesses is required

Experience owning or supporting a disciplined monthly close process

Strong English communication

Able to review books and explain recommendations clearly



Strongly preferred:



Experience supporting U.S.-based businesses

Experience cleaning up messy books

Experience redesigning chart of accounts

Experience improving reporting structure and account usage

Experience with cash flow analysis and management reporting



Ideal candidate:



Senior-level judgment

Process-driven

Detail-oriented

Comfortable reviewing an imperfect system and bringing structure to it

Able to learn a business and not just process transactions

Honest about what should be escalated versus handled directly

Able to communicate clearly with ownership



As the business grows, we expect accounting volume to increase. We want someone who can grow with the role, help build sound accounting processes, and, if needed, help assign and review work performed by additional accounting support staff over time.



Please do not apply if your experience is mainly:



basic VA work

simple transaction entry only

payroll only

tax filing only

generic bookkeeping without cleanup, review, and analysis experience



When applying, please include:



Your years of bookkeeping/accounting experience

Your years of QuickBooks Online experience

Your experience with manufacturing clients

Your experience with construction or job-costing clients

Your experience with inventory in QuickBooks Online

Whether you have redesigned a chart of accounts before

Whether you have owned or supported a monthly close process before

Your experience with cash flow analysis and management reporting

A short description of how you would review a messy QBO file

Your expected hourly rate or monthly rate

A short voice introduction link if available



We will likely begin with a paid diagnostic review, then move into cleanup, restructuring, and ongoing monthly oversight if the fit is right.

title: Claude Code Power User & AI Automations Engineer — Full-Time, U.S. Company
description:
Claude Code Power User & AI Automations Engineer — Full-Time, U.S. Company



We're a U.S.-based company running multiple brands across real estate technology, AI video production, and compliance-heavy verticals. We're hiring one AI-native engineer who takes detailed briefs and ships real work — websites, automations, API integrations, multi-agent workflows — using Claude Code and the modern AI coding stack to move at triple the speed of a traditional dev.



This is not a prompt-writing job. This is not a "use ChatGPT to help with tasks" job. We need someone who lives in Claude Code, builds subagents and skills files in their sleep, and has shipped enough production work to know what breaks at 2 a.m.



What You'll Actually Build



- Websites and landing pages — Next.js, Vercel, headless CMS, occasional WordPress

- Real estate data pipelines — MLS pulls, agent transaction lookups, HUD parsing, license verification, lead enrichment

- API integrations — FAL, Seedance, Minimax, Supabase, Stripe, Mux, Clerk, Inngest, Resend, Google Drive, Slack

- Multi-agent workflows — Claude Code subagents, MCP servers, n8n flows, background jobs, webhook-driven pipelines

- Internal tools — VA dashboards, QA review interfaces, batch processors, audit logs

- Data enrichment and tagging — structured outputs, vector search, automated categorization



What We Offer



- Starting $1,200–$3,000/month based on demonstrated ability and portfolio

- Full access to our AI stack — Claude Max, Kimi Code, GLM, Minimax, FAL, and more. We pay for all of it.

- Recurring long-term work across multiple brands — this is an ongoing pipeline, not one project

- Direct work with ownership, no middle layers

- Top performer moves into a lead role managing VAs and junior builders



How to Apply — Read This Carefully



Most applicants to jobs like this paste AI-generated answers. We can tell. The candidates we hire answer like people who have actually done the work and have scars to prove it.



To apply, answer the following. Short answers are fine — we'd rather read three honest sentences than three paragraphs of polished nothing. Answer in your own words, in one sitting, without running your response through an LLM to "clean it up." If your answer reads like ChatGPT wrote it, we'll assume ChatGPT did.



1. What's the most annoying thing about Claude Code that you've had to work around? Be specific. What did you do about it?



2. Describe the last subagent, skill file, or slash command you built. What problem did it solve, and what would you do differently if you built it again?



3. You're given a brief: "Pull every active MLS listing for a specific agent, enrich each with public HUD transaction history, and dump the result as a structured JSON file into Supabase storage, triggered by a webhook from a form submission." Give us your rough architecture in 5–10 bullets. Not the code. Just how you'd stitch it together and what would be the hardest part.



4. Name one MCP server you've actually used in production (not just installed to try it), and one you wish existed but doesn't.



5. Which do you reach for first for background jobs — Inngest, n8n, BullMQ, Temporal, or plain cron — and why? No wrong answer, we want to hear your reasoning.



6. Tell us about a project where something broke in production. What happened, what did you do, and what did you learn? One paragraph max.



7. Send portfolio links: GitHub repos, live sites, Looms of tools you built, or anything else that proves you ship. Minimum three links.



8. What's your monthly rate expectation within the $1,200–$3,000 range, and how many hours per week can you commit?



9. One-line answer: what time zone are you in, and what hours overlap with U.S. Eastern?



We read every application that answers all nine honestly. We delete the ones that don't. Copy-pasted generic cover letters, AI-polished "thrilled to apply for this exciting opportunity" openings, or answers that dodge the specifics will not get a response.



Bonus (Not Required, But Noticed)



- Shipped work with Kimi K2.5, GLM, Minimax, or other non-Anthropic coding models

- Experience with FFmpeg, video pipelines, or media processing

- Real estate, mortgage, or regulated-industry project history

- GitHub with visible commit history over the last 12 months

- Supabase, Vercel, Cloudflare Workers, or Runpod experience

title: E-commerce Operations & Website Manager
description:
About the Role

We are a growing UK-based e-commerce business specialising in discount furniture. We are looking for a highly organised, proactive, and detail-oriented E-commerce Operations & Website Manager to join our team.



In this role, you will be the backbone of our daily operations. You will ensure our website runs smoothly, our customers receive excellent support, and our product listings are always up to date. This is a diverse role that requires a mix of technical skill, creative thinking, and a commitment to delivering a high-quality customer experience.



Key Responsibilities

1. Customer Experience (CX) Support



Respond to customer enquiries via
, chat, and social media platforms in a professional and timely manner.



Resolve order-related issues (returns, shipping queries, product feedback) to maintain our excellent store ratings.



Maintain accurate records of customer interactions within our CRM systems.



2. Order Management



Monitor daily orders across our sales channels, ensuring seamless processing from placement to delivery.



Coordinate with our logistics partners to track shipments and resolve any transit issues promptly.



Manage inventory levels to ensure we avoid stockouts and maintain supply chain efficiency.



3. Product Management



Manage product listings on our Shopify store and marketplace channels (Amazon, etc.).



Optimise product titles, descriptions, and imagery to maximise visibility and conversion rates.



Ensure all product information is accurate, categorised correctly, and adheres to our brand guidelines.



4.
 Campaigns & Marketing



Plan, design, and schedule
 marketing campaigns to engage our existing customer base.



Implement segmentation strategies to ensure our communications are relevant and drive repeat purchases.



Analyse campaign performance metrics to improve open rates, click-through rates, and overall engagement.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Experience: Proven experience in an e-commerce operational role (Shopify experience is essential).



Communication: Excellent written English (British English spelling and grammar are a must).



Technical Proficiency: Comfortable using e-commerce platforms (Shopify,) and

title: Staff Accountant
description:
ABOUT US

Legacy Home Builders is a construction and real estate company based in Hickory, North Carolina. We focus on developing and managing high-quality multifamily communities while building a strong portfolio of investment-class assets. Our team is committed to operational excellence, continuous improvement, and delivering long-term value through well-executed projects.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Staff Accountant to support our day-to-day accounting operations. This role is ideal for someone who is strong in bookkeeping, enjoys working with numbers, and can maintain accurate financial records in a fast-paced environment. You will play a key role in supporting the finance team with reconciliations, reporting, and overall financial organization.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Maintain accurate financial records, including general ledger entries

- Perform bank and credit card reconciliations on a regular basis

- Assist with month-end close processes, including journal entries and account reviews

- Support accounts payable and accounts receivable processes

- Ensure proper documentation and organization of financial transactions

- Assist in preparing financial reports such as profit & loss and balance sheets

- Help maintain clean and accurate sub-ledgers

- Coordinate with internal teams to gather financial data as needed

- Identify discrepancies and resolve issues in a timely manner

- Support additional accounting and bookkeeping tasks as needed



QUALIFICATIONS

- At least 2 years of experience in accounting or bookkeeping

- CPA license is required

- Experience working in a CPA firm is an advantage

- Experience working with U.S.-based clients or companies is required

- Strong understanding of basic accounting principles

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Ability to work independently and manage tasks efficiently

- Comfortable working in a remote environment

- Available to work in the U.S. Eastern Time Zone (EST)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Strong problem-solving skills

- Proactive and dependable

- Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple priorities

- Team player with a positive and professional attitude



WHY JOIN LEGACY HOME BUILDERS

- Be part of a growing company in the construction and real estate industry

- Opportunity to contribute to both client experience and business growth

- Collaborative and supportive team environment

- Opportunity for growth as the company expands



HOW TO APPLY

If this sounds like a good fit for you, please complete our application form below:





Only candidates who complete the application form will be considered for the next step.

title: Marketing VA — Strategy, AI Content Execution + GHL Implementation
description:
Read This Before Applying

This is not a task-taker role. We need a marketing partner who can think strategically, build content systems using AI, and execute across platforms — while also owning our Go High Level backend.

You should be equally comfortable:



Mapping out a 30-day content strategy across multiple channels

Using Claude and other AI tools to produce that content at scale

Building the GHL workflows, funnels, and automations that turn that content into booked calls



If you're a GHL tech VA with no marketing instinct, this isn't your role.

If you're a content VA with no GHL experience, this isn't your role either.

We need both — and we're willing to pay for it.



What You'll Actually Be Doing

Marketing Strategy



Building content calendars and multi-channel marketing plans

Identifying content angles, hooks, and themes that resonate with our audience (business owners seeking funding)

Planning campaign sequences: awareness ? engagement ? lead capture ? booked call

Recommending what to test, what to scale, what to cut



AI-Powered Content Execution



Using Claude (and other AI tools) to produce:



Short-form video scripts (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Long-form content (blog posts,
 sequences, VSL scripts)

Ad copy variants for
/Instagram

Social captions, carousels, hooks





Refining prompts and building repeatable AI content workflows

Coordinating with video editors/designers to get content shipped



GHL Implementation & Backend



Building and maintaining workflows, funnels, calendars, pipelines

Connecting
/Instagram ads to GHL lead capture ? booking

Integrating our AI stack (ClawBot, Claude, n8n) into lead flows

Troubleshooting form mapping, workflow logic, pixel tracking

A/B testing and performance reporting





Who We're Looking For

You are someone who:



Has implemented GHL for 3+ separate businesses (not just one company)

Has real marketing experience — you've built strategies and executed campaigns, not just pushed buttons

Has used Claude (or similar AI) to produce content for real clients at scale

Thinks in systems and funnels, not one-off tasks

Can take a business goal and reverse-engineer the content + automation plan to hit it

Doesn't need daily hand-holding to ship work





Required Claude Certifications (Non-Negotiable)

You must show verified certificates from Anthropic Academy (
 — 100% free):



Claude 101 (or equivalent intro)

 AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations

 Building with the Claude API

Claude Code in Action (strongly preferred)

Introduction to Model Context Protocol (MCP) (strongly preferred)



Don't have them yet? Earn them and apply when you do. Free, self-paced, 15–20 hours total. We verify every certificate.



Required Track Record

In your application, be specific about:



Which businesses / clients you've built GHL for (redact names, keep business types + what you built)

Rough total hours in GHL

Marketing campaigns you've planned and executed (what was the goal, what did you do, what was the result)

AI/Claude content workflows you've built for real clients

Content formats you've produced (scripts,
s, ads, carousels, etc.)



Surface-level knowledge gets caught in 5 minutes on the interview call.



What We Offer



$6–$12/hr based on proven experience and certifications

Paid advanced learning and certifications once you're in

Direct access to the owner — no middleman

Long-term role with clear path to full-time + leadership

Real ownership over marketing strategy, not just task execution

Work on cutting-edge AI + marketing automation

Respect for your expertise and your time





How to Apply (Generic Applications Auto-Rejected)

Your application must include ALL of the following:



Subject line: Start with "ALTURA-GHL-[Your Favorite GHL Feature]"

(e.g., "ALTURA-GHL-Workflow Builder")

Anthropic Academy certificate proof — screenshots or verification links

Track record summary:



How many businesses have you implemented GHL for?

Rough total hours in GHL?

2–3 specific marketing campaigns you've planned + executed (goal, what you did, result)

1 example of an AI content system you've built for a real client





Answer these 4 questions:



Walk me through how you'd plan a 30-day content strategy for a business funding company targeting small business owners. What channels, what content types, what's the funnel?

How do you use Claude (or similar AI) to produce content at scale without it sounding generic or AI-written?

A GHL calendar form isn't passing
/phone to the contact record. What are your top 3 troubleshooting steps?

What's the difference between a GHL workflow trigger and a campaign trigger — and when do you use each?





Your hourly rate + earliest start date

60-second Loom video — introduce yourself, then walk us through ONE marketing campaign or content system you've built for a real client. We want to hear your thinking, not read a summary.





Red Flags That Will Get You Rejected



No Anthropic Academy certificates (or unverifiable ones)

Only GHL experience inside a single company or personal account

Pure tech VA with no marketing instinct

Pure content VA with no GHL implementation experience

Vague "I have lots of experience" answers without specifics

AI-written applications (ironic fail — we can tell)

Asking "what is GHL?" or "where do I get these certificates?"





We review applications daily and respond within 48 hours to qualified candidates.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Social Media Content – Reels, TikTok, LinkedIn)
description:
Short-Form Video Editor

Social Media Content – Reels, TikTok, LinkedIn



Role Overview

We’re looking for a skilled video editor to transform long-form videos into high-performing short-form content for Reels, TikTok, and LinkedIn. This role goes beyond basic editing — you should understand how to capture attention in the first few seconds, craft strong hooks, and keep viewers engaged all the way through.  You’ll work across multiple proejcts, following clear workflows and SOPs to deliver consistent, on-brand content every week.



Responsibilities:

- Edit long-form videos into short-form content (5–10 clips or more weekly for various projects)

- Add clean, modern, easy-to-read captions

- Create strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds of every clip

- Add text to reels

- Maintain consistent editing styles based on each project

- Apply light transitions, zooms, and emphasis where needed

- Organize files and deliver content on schedule

- Follow SOPs and project management systems



Tools (Preferred Knowledge – Not Beginner Level):

- We will provide access to all tools.

- CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro

- Opus Clip or similar AI editing tools

- Canva (basic graphics)



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven experience editing short-form social media content

- Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, and viewer engagement

- Ability to adapt quickly across different project styles

- Self-starter who takes ownership of their work

- Detail-oriented and organized

- Reliable communication and consistent, quick turnaround times

- Comfortable working within structured systems and workflows



Nice to Have

- Experience juggling multiple projects or working in a team environment

- Familiarity with personal brand content (business, mindset, leadership)

- Ability to suggest improvements to content flow or structure



Compensation

- $4 to 6 per hour, based on experience and portfolio strength

- Paid weekly via your preferred method (OnlineJobs.ph EasyPay, Wise, PayPal, etc.)

- Hours tracked via Time Doctor or Hubstaff

- Rate increases available after a successful 30–60 day trial period and as volume/responsibility grow



Work Setup:

- Remote

- Part-time to start, with opportunity to grow into more hours

- Weekly content batches

- Long-term role with real growth potential



How to Apply - Please submit the following:

- Your resume

- 2–3 examples of short-form videos you’ve edited

- A short description of your process for turning a 10-minute video into multiple short clips

- A short answer to: What makes a short-form video engaging?

- Include the word “Scale” at the top of your application



We’re looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and excited to grow with a team.

title: Senior YouTube Video Editor | Long-Form Content (4K)
description:
Remote | Per-Video Contract

JenniferMaker LLC is seeking an experienced independent video editing contractor to support our YouTube production on a per-video contract basis.

- We create long-form educational content for a large crafting audience on YouTube, and we need an experienced video editor who is highly organized, deadline-driven, and technically strong in Adobe Premiere Pro.

- We are looking for someone who can manage large project files, deliver clean exports, and maintain professional project organization standards.



What You’ll Be Editing

- One (1) long-form compilation video

- Footage, graphics, and direction are provided

- This is primarily an assembly task using pre-edited segments, not full editing from raw footage.



Responsibilities

For this video, you will:

- Edit and assemble a long-form compilation video from provided assets

- Ensure seamless transitions between segments

- Perform basic audio leveling and color consistency

- Export final 4K YouTube-ready file

- Deliver a fully organized Adobe Premiere Pro project package

- Meet strict turnaround deadlines



Turnaround Time

- Final delivery deadline will be agreed upon in advance.

- Time is critical. Repeated missed deadlines will result in contract termination.



Important Notes

- This is an independent contractor role (not employment)

- You must handle your own taxes and government contributions

- You must disclose any AI-generated content used

- No subcontracting without written approval

- No portfolio use without written permission from JenniferMaker LLC



Who We’re Looking For

You are:

- Extremely comfortable in Premiere

- Comfortable managing very large project files

- Detail-oriented with exports

- Reliable with deadlines

- Comfortable working independently

- Professional and discreet with confidential content





Communication Requirements

- Strong written English required for clear communication

- Comfortable reviewing and working with English-language scripts

- Ability to understand tone, pacing, and instructional content



Growth Opportunity

While there is no guaranteed minimum volume, we produce weekly YouTube content year-round.

For the right editor — someone who consistently delivers clean, organized work on time — this role can expand into additional projects and ongoing collaboration. We value long-term working relationships with reliable professionals.



Application Instructions (Important)

- Applications generated by AI without carefully reviewing this job description will not be considered.



To apply, please include:

- A letter describing your relevant experience and qualifications

- Links to 3 long-form YouTube videos you personally edited (a minimum of 15 minutes in length is preferred)

- Your Premiere Pro version

- Your internet speed (upload/download)

- Your typical turnaround time for a 120-minute compilation edit

- If you are comfortable with $60 per video?



In the first line of your application, write:

“4K Ready Editor”

title: App and Automation Developer
description:
We are looking for a talented and driven Full-Time Developer to join our team. thodologies.

title: Virtual Administrative Assistant - City Permits for Home Services (HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical)
description:
Job Description:

We are a US Based company looking to hire an experienced Permit Expeditor. A Permit Expeditor is responsible for managing the end-to-end process of securing city permits on behalf of contractors. This includes preparing applications, submitting them to city portals, following up on open jobs, resolving issues with city departments, contractors and homeowners, and updating clients on progress. Online runners handle city submissions through online portals,
, and phone communications.



Key Responsibilities:

• Review contractor-provided documentation for accuracy and completeness before submission.

• Submit permit applications through city or county online portals or via
, following jurisdiction-specific requirements.

• Communicate professionally with city officials to resolve missing information, clarifications, or additional requirements.

• Track the status of permit applications and proactively follow up until the permit is issued.

• Update internal systems (CRM Portal) with accurate notes and status changes.

• Notify clients (contractors) of permit progress, fees, or additional steps needed.

• Ensure all required attachments, corrections, or revisions are submitted on time.



Skills & Qualifications:

• Outside the box thinker

• Strong attention to detail and ability to follow jurisdiction-specific requirements.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines efficiently.

• Strong problem-solving skills and persistence when following up with cities.

• Tech-savvy and comfortable working with online portals,
, and internal systems.



Software Applications we Commonly Use:

• Zoho

• Airtable

• 

• Ring Central

• Excel



Hours:

• 40 Hours per week, Monday - Friday

• 8AM-4PM PST USA

• (may change to earlier hours to start such as 5AM PST)

• Candidates must be flexible in working hours.



Type of Online Runners we Need:

• Very Detail-Oriented: They must carefully follow city instructions and ensure all paperwork is accurate.

• Persistent and Organized: They should follow up consistently with cities and manage multiple permits without losing track.

• Professional Communicators: Able to
, call, and document interactions clearly and respectfully.

• Quick Learners: Comfortable adapting to different city processes and online platforms.

• Reliable and Self-Managed: Since they work remotely, they need to stay productive and accountable without direct supervision.



Other Requirements:

• Reliable Internet

• Reliable Power Source

• Preferably 2 monitors for multi-tasking

• Clear communication in English



We are looking for long-term, highly dedicated outside the box thinkers. Candidates must be able to push through difficult work times and have a go-getter mentality.

description:
We're Hiring: Virtual Assistant – Permitting Company (Inbound/Outbound Calls Specialist)



Are you a highly motivated Virtual Assistant with a talent for communication and a background in the permitting industry? Do you excel at handling both inbound and outbound calls with professionalism and efficiency? If yes, we want you on our team!



About Us:

We are a fast-growing staffing company providing seamless solutions for businesses and individuals navigating the permitting process. Our mission is to take the stress out of permitting by offering clear, timely, and effective support every step of the way.



Role: Virtual Assistant – Permitting Support

Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8 AM - 4 PM PST



Responsibilities:



Handle high-volume inbound and outbound calls with clients, contractors, and government offices



Schedule appointments, follow up on permit status, and relay updates to clients



Assist in preparing and submitting permit applications



Maintain and update internal databases and CRM systems



Provide administrative support to the permitting team



Build and maintain strong professional relationships with clients and partners



Requirements:



Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, Call Center Representative, or similar role



Experience in the permitting industry or construction-related fields preferred



Exceptional verbal and written communication skills



Strong phone presence and active listening skills



Proficiency in tools such as Google Workspace, CRM software (ZOHO, Monday, Airtable), and VoIP systems (Ring Central, Textline)



Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-driven



Bonus Points If You:



Have worked with U.S.-based permitting or construction companies



Are familiar with common permitting software platforms



Can handle multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously



How to Apply:

Send your resume and a brief cover letter highlighting your relevant experience. Please include “Virtual Assistant – Permitting” in your subject line.

title: Accelevents Customer Support Representative
description:
Company Description

Accelevents is a comprehensive event management platform that offers a one-stop solution for organizing virtual, hybrid, and in-person events. With an emphasis on ease of use, our platform combines enterprise-grade capabilities with advanced data security to streamline the event planning process. Trusted by 12,500 organizations worldwide, Accelevents provides 24/7 customer support and a wide range of features to bring your event strategy to life.



Role Description

This is a full-time remote role for a Customer Support Representative at Accelevents. As a Customer Support Representative, you will be responsible for providing exceptional customer service and support to our clients. This includes troubleshooting technical issues, addressing customer inquiries and concerns, and ensuring customer satisfaction. You will also be responsible for maintaining accurate records of customer interactions and collaborating with other teams to resolve issues efficiently. Internally, you’ll work with our Sales, Product, and Marketing teams to collaborate, innovate, and expand our platform, service, and company culture.



What to Expect in This Role

This isn’t your typical customer support position.



Yes, you’ll help clients troubleshoot and guide them when they have questions—but that’s just the starting point. In this role, you’ll be expected to think critically, offer proactive solutions, and come up with creative ideas that truly add value to our clients' businesses.



We integrate with a wide range of platforms, so there’s a lot to learn—and quickly. You’ll need to become fluent in different systems, spot patterns across tools, and make smart recommendations based on each client’s unique needs.



More importantly, this is a relationship-focused role. Our clients should feel like you're a part of their team, not just ours. They’ll rely on you for your expertise, your initiative, and your ability to anticipate needs before they’re spoken. You’ll become a trusted partner, not just a point of contact.



If you love solving complex challenges, picking up new tools, and forming real connections with the people you support, you’ll thrive here.



Ideal Candidate

Our ideal applicant is someone with a background in online customer support and managing multiple customers at a time. This candidate must possess a driven intellect, emotional intelligence when engaging with customers, and a spirit of resilience while adapting to a quickly flourishing work environment.



Excellent and confident English communication is essential, as this role requires onboarding clients through video calls and building strong, long-term relationships. Clear, thoughtful communication during these sessions is critical to ensure clients fully understand our services and feel supported from the start.



We’re also looking for someone who is street smart—able to read between the lines, think independently, and come up with creative, out-of-the-box solutions. You should be comfortable making recommendations that truly serve the client’s needs, not just following a script. The right person for this role can think on their feet and take initiative to solve problems before they even arise.



Qualifications

Customer Support and Customer Service skills

Excellent and confident English communication and interpersonal skills

Ability to troubleshoot and resolve technical issues

Attention to detail and ability to multitask

Excellent problem-solving skills

Patience and empathy in dealing with customer inquiries

Previous experience in a customer support role is a plus

Knowledge of event management software is a plus



Requirements

At least 1 year of experience supporting a technical product, preferably for a SaaS

Must be based in the Philippines

Availability to work 40 hours per week on a non-traditional schedule

Ability to work holiday shifts and weekend shift

title: Virtual Assistant — Amazon DSP Scorecard Dispute Specialist
description:
About ScoreGuard:

ScoreGuard is a U.S.-based weekly dispute management service built specifically for Amazon Delivery Service Partners (DSPs). We submit targeted scorecard disputes on behalf of DSP owners every week to help them improve their performance metrics and increase defect reversals. We are a small, fast-growing company and we treat our team well.



About the Role:

We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle our weekly dispute submission process for multiple clients. You will be trained on our exact system — no prior Amazon DSP experience required, but a willingness to learn and strong attention to detail is a must.



Weekly Tasks:

- Log into client Amazon DSP portals using authorized credentials

- Download weekly scorecard data

- Run defects through our proprietary Excel-based dispute generator

- Submit disputes through the Amazon portal for each client

- Complete a weekly performance report per client using our tracker template

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to help streamline and improve weekly processes

- Flag any issues or unusual scorecard results to the manager



Requirements:

- Strong attention to detail — accuracy is everything in this role

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Proficient in Microsoft Excel — including formulas, data entry, and spreadsheet navigation

- Comfortable with AI tools including ChatGPT and Claude — you will be expected to use these regularly to improve efficiency

- Comfortable navigating web portals

- Strong written English communication

- Available to complete weekly tasks by Tuesday of each week

- Trustworthy and discreet — you will have access to client business accounts



Nice to Have:

- Previous experience working with Amazon Seller Central, Amazon Logistics, or any Amazon portal

- Experience as a VA for a U.S.-based business

- References from previous long-term employers



What We Offer:

- $5–$7/hour based on experience

- Consistent weekly work with growth potential as we add clients

- Clear processes and full training provided — you will never be left guessing

- Long-term opportunity — we are building something and want someone who grows with us

- Respectful, communicative management



How to Apply:

Please send a message introducing yourself, your relevant experience, and your availability. Applications without a personal introduction will not be considered. Bonus points if you tell us one thing that makes you detail-oriented AND one AI tool you have used and how you used it.

title: Inside Sales Support Coordinator (Remote – Overseas)
description:
Position Overview:



We are seeking a detail-oriented and process-driven Inside Sales Support Coordinator to assist our sales and operations team. This role supports revenue growth by maintaining rate accuracy, preparing customer pricing updates, and coordinating cost information with ocean carriers.



Working Hours



This is a full-time remote position operating Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM Pacific Standard Time (PST). The candidate must be available and responsive during these hours to ensure alignment with our North American operations.



Candidates must have their own reliable computer suitable for full-time remote work.  Computer minimum specifications are below.



Rate Management & Maintenance:



Update and maintain internal rate sheets accurately and promptly

Enter and organize carrier rate updates in company templates and online folders

Monitor rate validity and expiry dates

Ensure correct surcharges (fuel, overweight, DTHC, etc.) are reflected

Ensure origin and destination free time is filed correctly



Customer Rate Administration



Input and maintain customer-specific monthly pricing

Prepare formatted rate sheets for customer distribution (with approval)

Monitor customer contract terms and expiration dates to ensure timely updates and renewals

Maintain organized records of all customer rate files



Carrier Cost Coordination



Request updated freight rates and surcharges from ocean carriers

Follow up on pending rate confirmations

Maintain organized documentation of carrier correspondence

Verify cost breakdowns for accuracy before submission to management



CRM & Sales Support



Update CRM with current pricing and shipment activity

Track quote issuance and follow-up schedules

Maintain clean and accurate pipeline records

Assist in preparing sales reports when required



Required Qualifications



Strong written and spoken English

Experience with spreadsheets (Excel or Google Sheets)

Comfortable working with structured templates

High attention to detail

Experience with CRM systems preferred

Ability to follow detailed instructions and meet deadlines

Prior experience in ocean freight forwarding or logistics is preferred but not required.



Computer minimum Specs:

Windows 10+ or macOS

8GB RAM (16GB preferred)

SSD recommended

Stable internet (25 Mbps+)

title: Experienced Digital Marketing Specialist (Social Media, Funnels & Lead Generation)
description:
Job Title: Experienced Digital Marketing Specialist (Social Media, Funnels & Lead Generation)



We are seeking a highly experienced and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to lead the creation and execution of high-performing marketing campaigns across social media and digital platforms. This role requires a proven track record in building successful funnels, managing paid advertising campaigns, and consistently generating qualified leads that convert into customers.



You will be responsible for developing and optimizing full-funnel marketing strategies—from awareness to conversion—while crafting compelling ad creatives and persuasive messaging that capture attention and drive action. A strong ability to analyze performance data and continuously optimize campaigns for maximum ROI is essential.



Key Responsibilities:



* Design and execute advanced social media marketing campaigns with measurable results

* Build, test, and optimize high-converting lead generation funnels

* Create compelling ad creatives, visuals, and copy that attract and convert audiences

* Manage, scale, and optimize paid advertising campaigns across platforms 
, Instagram, etc.)

* Analyze campaign performance and implement data-driven improvements

* Develop strategies that consistently generate high-quality leads for the business

* Continuously test, refine, and improve marketing systems for better conversion rates



Requirements:



* Proven experience in digital marketing, advertising, and funnel building

* Strong portfolio demonstrating successful campaigns and lead generation results

* Hands-on experience managing paid ads and optimizing performance campaigns

* Strong creative and analytical skills

* Ability to work independently and deliver results under minimal supervision



Important Requirement:

Applicants must submit their updated resume and portfolio of previous work/campaigns showcasing proven experience in digital marketing, advertising, and funnel creation. Only experienced candidates with demonstrable results will be considered.



We are looking for someone who doesn’t just create content—but builds systems that attract, convert, and scale leads effectively.

title: Client Success Specialist - URGENT HIRING
description:
Company: Ascension Business Solutions LLC

Department: Success Department 

Employment Type: Full-Time 

Location: Remote 

Schedule: Business hours aligned with U.S. time zones 



APPLY HERE: 



Interested applicants are requested to complete the questionnaire below. Applications that fail to comply with this instruction will not be entertained.







Role Overview 

The Client Success Specialist is responsible for managing client onboarding, VA readiness, and 

early-stage account success. This role plays a key part in ensuring smooth onboarding 

execution, strong client communication, and proper alignment between client expectations and 

VA performance. 



This is an ownership-driven role where the Specialist manages their own accounts, facilitates 

onboarding sessions, and coordinates across departments to ensure both clients and Virtual 

Assistants are set up for long-term success. 



The role requires strong proactiveness, accountability, structured reporting, and the ability to 

confidently handle client-facing communication while maintaining internal alignment. 



Qualifications & Requirements

Required

- 1–2 years experience in client success, account management, or client-facing roles

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

- High level of proactiveness and accountability

- Strong organizational and documentation skills

- Ability to manage multiple onboarding schedules simultaneously

- Confidence in handling client communication independently 



Preferred (Not Required)

- Experience in Virtual Assistant, home care, or service-based industries

- Familiarity with onboarding processes and client lifecycle management

- Experience working with cross-functional teams 



Performance Expectations

Success in this role requires:

- Strong ownership of assigned accounts

- Consistent and structured reporting

- Proactive communication with clients and internal teams

- Ability to identify and resolve issues early

- Maintaining alignment between client expectations and VA performance 



Training & Performance Expectations

- Participation in structured onboarding and internal training programs

- Continuous improvement through feedback and coaching

- Adherence to onboarding processes, SOPs, and reporting standards

- Ability to adapt to evolving client needs and workflows 



Core Responsibilities 

Client Onboarding & Facilitation 

- Facilitate onboarding meetings with clients and Virtual Assistants 

- Manage up to 4 onboardings per day while maintaining quality and structure

- Ensure onboarding agenda is followed and all required topics are covered

- Guide clients on how to train and work effectively with their VA

- Ensure all systems, tools, and access are properly set up 



Account Management & Client Communication

- Manage assigned client accounts independently

- Conduct post-onboarding follow-ups to ensure smooth transition to live operations

- Handle client concerns directly and provide timely resolutions 

- Maintain proactive communication with clients to prevent issues

- Escalate high-level concerns appropriately while maintaining ownership of the account



VA Readiness & Performance Alignment

- Monitor VA readiness prior to onboarding

- Coordinate with Training Team to confirm VA-client alignment

- Ensure VAs are prepared with tools, access, and basic understanding before onboarding

- Identify early performance gaps and coordinate with internal teams for support

- Reinforce expectations and accountability with VAs during onboarding 



Cross-Department Coordination

Sales Team

- Report “VA Ready to Onboard” status

- Clarify client expectations and follow up on Strategy Call details



Training Team

- Follow up on assigned VA readiness and training progress



Operations Team

- Coordinate pre-onboarding requirements and VA deployment readiness



Client Relations Team

- Escalate client-related concerns or sensitive situations requiring support 



Reporting, Documentation & KPI Management

- Submit accurate and timely End-of-Day (EOD) and End-of-Week (EOW) reports

- Provide onboarding summaries after each onboarding session



Track and report:

- VA readiness status

- Onboarding progress

- Client feedback

- Ensure all onboarding documentation is complete, organized, and up-to-date 



KPIs & Performance Metrics 

Success in this role is measured by:

- 60% Onboarding Survey Rate

- 40% Onboarding Completion Rate

- Quality and consistency of onboarding summaries

- Timeliness and accuracy of EOD/EOW reports

- Client satisfaction and communication effectiveness

- Ability to manage and retain assigned accounts independently 



Escalation Guidelines

Handled Independently:

- Low-level client concerns

- Routine onboarding adjustments

- Standard VA coordination



Coordinate with Client Success Manager:

- Medium to high-level client concerns

- Performance risks or onboarding issues

- Account-level challenges requiring strategic decisions



Escalate to Appropriate Teams:

- Client Relations: Client escalations or sensitive issues

- Training: VA readiness or training gaps

- Sales: Misalignment from Strategy Call expectations

- Operations: Pre-onboarding and deployment concerns 





This is an urgent hiring need.



Ascension Business Solutions is prioritizing this role due to active onboarding demands and leadership support requirements.



Qualified candidates who complete all application and assessment steps promptly may be contacted and processed on an accelerated timeline.



Compensation & Benefits:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.



Competitive compensation aligned with the leadership role scope

- Paid training and structured onboarding

- Fully remote work setup, including company-issued laptop and noise-canceling headset

- HMO health coverage (subject to eligibility guidelines)

- Paid Time Off (PTO)

- Performance-based annual salary increases

- Additional bonuses are available after 6 months of tenure



ABS is intentional about building long-term professional partnerships, not short-term or gig-based arrangements.



Why Join Ascension Business Solutions?



Shape the quality and readiness of ABS’s global VA workforce

Work directly with Leadership and cross-functional teams

Operate within clear systems, standards, and escalation frameworks

Join a values-driven organization guided by Love, Support, and Excellence



Disclaimer: Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs. Employment is at-will.





How to Apply:

Complete the Application Form and include the following:

Vocaroo introduction link

Updated resume

Device specifications screenshot

Internet speed test result



APPLY HERE: 



??This role is urgent. Early and complete applications will be prioritized. Incomplete applications may not be processed.

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
About the Role

We're a boutique real estate team in OC known for educational, personality-driven content across Instagram and TikTok. Our videos have a specific look and feel — candid walkthroughs, real talk on design and market trends, and a warm-but-confident tone. We're not looking for someone to reimagine our brand. We need someone who can study what we've built and replicate it consistently at higher volume.



What You'll Do



Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) from raw footage — primarily property walkthroughs, market commentary, and agent/founder-led content



Match our existing editing style: pacing, text overlays, color grading, music selection, and transition choices

Deliver polished exports ready to post, with captions and cover frames

Occasionally assist with B-roll selection and sequencing when full clips are provided

Communicate turnaround times clearly and hit them



What We're Looking For



A portfolio that includes real estate or lifestyle short-form content — we need to see your work before we talk

Demonstrated ability to match an existing style, not just create your own

Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro

Attention to detail on audio sync, caption accuracy, and mobile-first framing

Based in or near Orange County — we shoot locally and may need occasional on-site collaboration

Responsive communicator. If you go quiet, this won't work.



Not a Fit If:



Your portfolio is mostly long-form or corporate video

You need creative direction on every clip

You can't turn around a 60-second Reel in under 48 hours



To Apply

Send a short intro and 3–5 examples of short-form content you've edited — ideally real estate, home, or lifestyle. Do not send a generic resume without samples.

title: Assistant Project Manager & Estimator
description:
ABOUT US

iFOAM Insulation and Thermo Ridge Insulation are Denver-based insulation contractors delivering premium spray foam, batt, blow-in, and hybrid insulation solutions to residential and commercial clients across Colorado. We are a fast-moving, veteran-owned team that values precision, professionalism, and people who take ownership of their work. We are growing — and we need a sharp, detail-oriented virtual Assistant Project Manager & Estimator to help us manage projects, control costs, and keep our sales and install teams running smoothly every single day.



POSITION AT A GLANCE

Position: Assistant Project Manager & Estimator (Virtual)

Companies: iFOAM Insulation | Thermo Ridge Insulation

Work Type: Remote — International Independent Contractor

Hours: Part-time to Full-time | Mountain Time (MT) business hours required

Daily Meeting Required: Sales & Install team standup each morning

Experience: Minimum 2 years in construction project management

Reports To: Sales & Project Management Leadership



THE ROLE

This is not a background administrative role. You will be an active, daily participant in our operations — sitting inside project finances, coordinating crews, communicating with clients and GCs, and keeping leadership informed in real time. If something is off on a job, you will catch it first and flag it fast. You will support both the iFOAM and Thermo Ridge teams, working directly with sales leadership and the install crew to make sure every project runs on time, on budget, and with zero surprises.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Project Cost Management

• Monitor and update job costing in real time as projects progress

• Track labor, material, and subcontractor costs against estimated budgets

• Flag cost overruns or budget deviations to leadership immediately

• Generate and maintain job cost reports for active projects



2. Daily Reporting & Team Communication

• Attend daily morning standups with both the sales and install teams

• Report on current project status, cost position, and any open issues

• Maintain a running log of project notes, change orders, and decisions

• Keep leadership updated throughout the day via Google Chat or OpenPhone



3. Estimating & Takeoffs

• Perform material takeoffs using Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or equivalent tools

• Assist with bid preparation and scope-of-work documentation

• Review plans and specs to identify quantities, materials, and labor needs

• Maintain and update pricing databases as material costs change



4. Procurement & Purchase Orders

• Order materials and supplies based on job schedules and project needs

• Create, track, and close out purchase orders in JobTread or equivalent

• Coordinate with suppliers to confirm lead times and delivery schedules

• Reconcile material deliveries against purchase orders and flag discrepancies



5. Client & GC Communication

• Support the sales team in communicating with clients and general contractors on scheduling

• Send confirmations, updates, and follow-ups on behalf of project leadership

• Help manage RFI responses and document submittals for commercial projects

• Maintain a professional, responsive presence in all external communication



6. Install Team Coordination & Scheduling

• Assist in scheduling the install team across active and upcoming projects

• Coordinate with crew leads to confirm start times, site access, and material availability

• Adjust schedules in real time when projects shift, and notify all parties promptly

• Track crew availability and flag scheduling conflicts before they become problems



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Experience & Background

• Minimum 2 years of experience in construction project management or a closely related field

• Hands-on experience with estimating and material takeoffs — insulation, drywall, or similar trades preferred

• Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously without dropping details

• Strong understanding of job costing, purchase orders, and construction project workflows

• Experience working remotely and coordinating with field-based teams



Skills & Traits

• Highly organized with an obsessive attention to detail

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills — professional and clear

• Comfortable speaking directly with clients and general contractors

• Self-directed and proactive — you don't wait to be told something is wrong

• Comfortable in a fast-paced environment where priorities can shift mid-day

• Coachable, team-oriented, and willing to learn our systems and processes



REQUIRED SOFTWARE EXPERIENCE

You do not need to know our exact tools — but you must have solid experience with tools in each category below. We will train on our specific systems during onboarding.



Softwares

1. Project Management: JobTread (preferred) or equivalent (Procore, Buildertrend, CoConstruct)

2. Estimating / Takeoffs: Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or equivalent plan markup & takeoff tool

3. Communication & Docs: Google Workspace — Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Calendar

4. CRM HubSpot: — lead tracking and client communication logging

5. Team Communication: OpenPhone, WhatsApp, or Google Chat

6. Scheduling:  Google Calendar or integrated scheduling within project management tool



THIS ROLE IS A GREAT FIT IF YOU...

• Have a construction background and understand how the field actually works

• Are motivated by keeping projects organized and on budget

• Thrive in a small, close-knit team where your work is visible and your impact is real

• Want a long-term role with a growing company — not short-term freelance work

• Can take ownership of your responsibilities without needing to be micromanaged



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered for this role, you must submit all of the following:

• A short voice or video recording (1–2 minutes) — introduce yourself, describe your construction PM or estimating background, and tell us why you're the right fit for this role

• A brief summary of the estimating and project management software you have used

• Examples of projects you have managed or estimated (type, size, scope)

• Confirmation of your weekly availability and that you can work Mountain Time hours



?  Applications without a voice or video recording will not be considered ?

title: Sales Development Representative (Lead Generation & Appointment Setting)
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a highly driven and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing team. This role is focused on lead generation, qualification, and appointment setting within the business financing space.



You will be the first point of contact for potential clients—guiding them through the application process and connecting them with our closing team once qualified.



This is a performance-driven role ideal for individuals who are hungry to earn, coachable, and thrive in a fast-paced sales environment.



Work Schedule

Monday to Thursday only (4-day work week)

8 hours per day

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Enjoy a 3-day weekend while maintaining strong earning potential.



Key Responsibilities

- Make 250+ outbound calls daily to potential business clients

- Guide prospects in completing the credit application process

- Collect and organize required documentation: Signed credit application, 6 months of bank statements, Voided check, Valid government-issued ID

- Upload completed files into the company system

- Ensure submissions meet “full package” requirements for underwriting

- Coordinate and transfer qualified clients to a live call with a closer

- Maintain a minimum of 1 qualified file per day (must receive an offer)



Training & Development

- You will receive FREE access to the Jordan Belfort’s Straight Line Persuasion training program

(Value: $500)

- This world-class training will help you: Improve your sales confidence, Master objection handling, Close more opportunities



Compensation Structure

Month 1 (Training & Proving Period): Commission-based only

- $20 USD for every qualified client transferred to a closer

- $100 USD bonus when your client closes a deal

- $50 USD recurring bonus for every future deal closed with your client



After 1 Month (Based on Strong Performance):

- Hourly base rate + commission

- You will be eligible for a fixed hourly rate on top of your commissions

- Continued access to all commission bonuses listed above



High performers are rewarded with more stability + higher earning potential as they grow with the team.



We are looking for someone who is:

- Fluent in English with clear, neutral communication

- Comfortable working U.S. hours

- Highly motivated by financial goals

- Energetic, confident, and persuasive

- Able to handle high call volumes daily

- Sales experience is a plus (but not required—training provided)



Why Join Us?

- High earning potential with performance-based rewards

- Access to premium sales training for free

- Opportunity to grow into a closing or senior sales role

- Work remotely with a fast-growing team

- 4-day work week with 3 days off



Please provide an accessible resume link.

 or apply via [OnlineJobs.ph](https://onlinejobs.ph/) with:
