title: Inside Sales Representative
description:
ABOUT US

Thermo Ridge Insulation is a Denver-based insulation contractor serving commercial and residential projects across Colorado. We specialize in spray foam, batt, and blow-in insulation and work with general contractors, developers, and homeowners throughout the state. We are a fast-growing, veteran-owned company built on long-term relationships — and we need someone who shares that philosophy. This is not a high-pressure sales role. We are looking for a patient, consistent relationship-builder who will represent us professionally over the long term.

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

POSITION AT A GLANCE

Title: Inside Sales Representative – Construction

Company: Thermo Ridge Insulation, commercial division for iFOAM Insuation — Denver, Colorado

Work Type: Remote — International Independent Contractor

Starting Hours: 15–30 hrs/week, with path to full-time (40 hrs/week)

Time Zone: Mountain Time (MT) business hours — required

Daily Meeting: 6:00 AM MT — required standup with sales leadership

Compensation: Hourly (based on experience) + bonus + 0.5% commission

Industry: Commercial & Residential Insulation / Construction

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

THE ROLE

This role is simple in concept but requires discipline and consistency to execute well. You will call and follow up with warm leads — general contractors, estimators, and preconstruction teams — and build relationships over time so that Thermo Ridge is on their radar when insulation bids are needed. 

You are not selling hard. You are showing up consistently, being easy to work with, and making sure that when a GC needs an insulation sub, our name is the first one that comes to mind.

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

WHAT YOU'LL DO

• Call and follow up on warm leads sourced through ConstructConnect and internal lists

• Ask to connect with Estimators, Preconstruction Managers, and Project Managers at GC firms

• Build genuine, professional relationships with contractors over time — not pushy or transactional

• Track every call, contact, and follow-up in HubSpot — if it's not logged, it didn't happen

• Maintain a consistent follow-up cadence every 2–3 weeks per contact

• Identify and qualify projects that Thermo Ridge can bid on and notify sales leadership

• Attend the daily 6:00 AM MT team standup and report on activity

• Maintain direct, responsive communication with sales leadership throughout the day

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

COMPENSATION

This role offers three ways to earn. Strong performers who build their pipeline will see their commission income grow meaningfully alongside the base hourly rate.



Earning Potential

Hourly Base Pay: Starting at $3/hr, based on experience 

Bonus: Obtaining qualified blueprints and bids at $4 for each qualified project / bid opportunity. Unlimited potential

Commission: Closed Projects 0.5% of total project value. This is paid upon receiving payment. 



This role starts at 15–30 hours per week and can grow into a full-time engagement (40 hours/week) based on performance and business growth.

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Haves

• Strong, confident phone presence — clear, professional spoken English is essential

• Comfortable calling offices, navigating gatekeepers, and asking for decision-makers

• Organized and disciplined — you keep notes, follow through, and never drop a ball

• Relationship-focused mindset — you understand that trust is built over many touchpoints, not one call

• Able to follow a proven call script while speaking naturally in your own voice

• Committed to a long-term role — we are not looking for short-term freelancers

• Quiet work environment and strong, reliable internet connection



Nice to Have

• Construction industry experience or familiarity with how GCs and subs work together

• Prior experience with HubSpot or any CRM platform

• Experience with outbound calling or business development in a B2B context

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

TOOLS & WORK SETUP



• Calls are made using OpenPhone — provided by Thermo Ridge at no cost to you

• All calls may be monitored and reviewed for training and quality assurance in HubSpot

• All communication is logged in HubSpot — this is a non-negotiable daily requirement

• Reliable, high-speed internet connection required at all times

• Quiet, professional work environment — no background noise during calls

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

TRAINING & SUPPORT



We set you up to succeed from day one. You will not be thrown into cold calls with no preparation.



• We provide proven call scripts that work in most situations — built from real experience in this market

• Objection handling guidance that has been tested and refined over time

• You will be expected to internalize these scripts and adapt them naturally — not read robotically

• Sales leadership is available throughout the day for questions, coaching, and feedback



THIS ROLE IS A GREAT FIT IF YOU...



• Want stability and long-term growth with a company that is expanding

• Genuinely enjoy building relationships and staying in regular contact with people

• Are motivated by commission and bonuses — you want your effort to directly impact your earnings

• Can take direction, adapt quickly, and communicate proactively with your team

• Are looking for a role where your consistency and reliability are recognized and rewarded

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, you must submit all three of the following:



1. A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) — introduce yourself and tell us about your sales or calling experience. Speak naturally, as if you were on a call with us.

2. A brief written summary of your sales, calling, or business development experience.

3. Your availability — hours per week you can commit, and confirmation that you can work Mountain Time (MT) hours.



** Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed**

mbers

Applications that don’t follow these instructions will not be considered. We’re looking for someone detail-oriented, dependable, and excited to grow with us.

title: Full-Time Remote Davinci Editor — VYBE
description:
About VYBE



VYBE is a Chicago-based photo and video company bringing brands to life through bold, high-energy content. From product launches and social campaigns to large-scale event activations, we create visuals that feel real, engaging, and built to move people.



We’re growing fast and building a team of creatives who want to grow with us.



The Role



We’re looking for a Full-Time Remote Video Editor who lives in DaVinci Resolve.



This isn’t just about cutting clips — it’s about shaping stories, building energy, and creating content people actually want to watch. You’ll be editing everything from fast-paced social reels to polished brand pieces and event recaps.



If you’re someone who cares about the feel of a video just as much as the technical side, you’ll fit right in.



Why We Use DaVinci Resolve



We run everything through Resolve because it allows real collaboration — shared timelines, live updates, consistent color, and a smoother workflow across the team.



It keeps us fast, efficient, and creatively aligned on every project.



What You’ll Do

Edit branded content, product features, and social-first videos

Craft high-energy reels and longer-form storytelling pieces

title: Operations & Automation VA for US Construction Company (Zapier + QuickBooks Experience Required)
description:
Growing US-based construction company (lead abatement, renovation, general construction) is hiring a part-time Operations & Automation Virtual Assistant to build workflow automations and support day-to-day operations. You’ll work directly with the CEO to streamline how we manage jobs, documents, receipts, and financial data across multiple entities. This is a long-term role with clear growth potential as our portfolio expands.



What You Will Do:

 • Build and maintain Zapier (or Make.com) automations connecting Google Drive, QuickBooks Online, busybusy time tracking, Gusto payroll, and Gmail

 • Design and implement a full job intake automation: PDF risk assessment ? job folder creation ? document templates ? QuickBooks project setup

 • Set up and manage automated receipt processing from Home Depot Pro, Lowe’s, and other vendors

 • Organize and maintain Google Drive job folders using a standardized structure

 • Create and update Google Docs / Google Sheets templates (Scope of Work, Occupant Protection Plans, daily logs, etc.)

 • Manage document merging and PDF generation workflows

 • Monitor automations and troubleshoot issues as they arise

 • Document every automation and process you build (one-page SOP per workflow)

 • Support general operations tasks: data entry, file organization, vendor communication as needed

Required Skills:

 • 2+ years hands-on experience building multi-step Zapier or Make.com automations

 • Strong working knowledge of Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Forms)

 • Experience integrating QuickBooks Online with other tools

 • Comfort working with PDF parsers (Docparser, Parseur, or similar)

 • Excellent written English communication

 • Reliable internet connection and backup power

 • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 • Willingness to record short Loom videos explaining your work

Bonus Skills (not required but valued):

 • Experience with US construction, contracting, or trades companies

 • Google Apps Script basics

 • busybusy or similar construction time-tracking tools

 • Document automation tools like PandaDoc, Formstack Documents, or PDF.co

 • Basic understanding of bookkeeping concepts (so you can coordinate with our bookkeeper effectively)



How to Apply:

Please do NOT send a generic application. We will only review applications that include all four items below. Take your time — we are looking for the right person, not the fastest person.

 1. A brief paragraph (3-5 sentences) explaining why this role interests you and what kind of automation work you have enjoyed most.

 2. Portfolio evidence: links or screenshots of 2-3 actual Zapier or Make automations you have built. Describe what each one does and what problem it solved.

 3. Your answer to this question: “If a PDF document landed in a Google Drive folder and you needed to automatically create a new job folder, extract data from the PDF, and add a row to a Google Sheet, walk me through the tools and steps you would use.” (3-5 sentences is plenty.)

 4. A 2-3 minute Loom video introducing yourself, showing your face, and briefly describing your most complex automation project. We want to hear your communication style.

Applications missing any of these four items will not be reviewed.

title: Hiring: Amazon Product Research VA (Help Me Find My First Winning Product)
description:
I’m building a new Amazon brand and looking for a **sharp, data-driven VA** who knows how to find **real winning products — not guesses.**



If you know how to spot opportunity, analyze competition, and think like a brand builder, this is for you.



 What You’ll Do:

* Find high-demand, low-competition products

* Break down competition and identify weaknesses

* Calculate REAL profit margins (no fluff)

* Source suppliers and compare pricing

* Recommend products we can actually WIN with



What I Care About:

* Data > trends

* Smart thinking > random ideas

* Profitability > hype



Bonus If You:

* Have launched a product before

* Know how to differentiate products





To Apply:

Send:

* 1 product idea (with quick breakdown)

* Tools you use

* Your experience



I’m not looking for average — I’m looking for someone who can help build something real.



Let’s win.

title: Amazon PPC Analyst (Entry-Level, Growth Track)
description:

What You’ll Do

Review search term and placement data

Track performance in spreadsheets

Document changes and decisions



Early work is structured and can feel repetitive. Results come from consistency over time.

This must be your only job

Comfortable with Excel / Google Sheets

Detail-oriented and process-driven

Clear written English

Stable internet + backup power

3.

When doing repetitive work, what is one mistake you’ve had to correct in yourself?

Please confirm:



You can work 45 hours/week on U.S. Eastern Time

This will be your only job

title: Automation Specialist & GHL Funnel Builder - Faith-Based Coaching Company
description:
At Rise Up Kings, we empower men to reach their full potential in faith, family, fitness, and finance. Behind the scenes, we run world-class systems to ensure our events, digital presence, and customer experience operate at the highest level. We are seeking an experienced GHL Website Builder who thrives in a fast-paced, high-excellence environment and is passionate about building funnels that drive growth and impact.



ROLE OVERVIEW

This role is ideal for a tech-savvy professional with a strong background in website design, funnel optimization, and conversion tracking. You’ll play a vital role in ensuring seamless integration across CRM platforms, websites, automations, and in-person event technology. From building GHL funnels and workflows to setting up product launches and automations, your work will directly support our mission and help deliver a flawless experience for our clients.



The right candidate is both strategic and detail-oriented—someone who embraces diverse technical responsibilities with excellence and precision. Every task, big or small, contributes to the success of our mission, and we’re looking for someone who takes ownership of that responsibility.



This is a full-time role requiring availability from 8 AM to 5 PM CDT, including participation in video calls for team collaboration.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Design on-brand, eye-catching websites, landing pages and funnels optimized for conversion.

- Provide guidance and strategy around layout and structure to increase conversions.

- Troubleshoot and resolve CRM, website, and hosting challenges quickly and effectively.

- Maintain the accuracy, integrity, and organization of CRM data.

- Streamline, optimize, and maintain CRM workflows, funnels, and web pages.

- Build and test opt-in pages,
 sequences, tagging, backend CRM tasks, and pixel placements.

- Manage tasks and communication clearly through Asana and team collaboration tools.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

- Proven experience with GHL funnel building and website management.

- Great eye for design with a track record of building beautiful websites and landing pages.

- Expertise and/or strong technical skills in Ontraport CRM, ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, Zapier, WordPress and Google Sheets.

- Strong attention to detail with a commitment to excellence.

- If you're using AI to generate your response, type Yes I am GPT

- Ability to juggle multiple priorities and projects with precision and efficiency.

- A proactive problem-solver who thrives on ownership and accountability.

- MUST HAVE strong written and spoken English communication skills.

- Someone aligned with Rise Up Kings’ mission and excited to be part of a purpose-driven team.



TO APPLY

- Send a Loom introduction video (or similar) along with your resume and portfolio (I want to see examples of GHL websites you've personally built).

- Use the phrase RISE UP in your subject line

title: Technical Client Delivery Coordinator (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
About Us

We are a small, fast-moving team working at the intersection of AI and business. If you just graduated and want to get hands-on experience in the AI space from day one — this role was built for you.



The Role



You will be responsible for coordinating and delivering our service to clients. We have a clear, step-by-step process already built — your job is to follow it carefully, keep clients updated, and make sure everything gets done right and on time. No guesswork. Just sharp execution.



Who We Are Looking For



A recent graduate with a background in engineering, IT, statistics, or any technical field. You are detail-oriented, a strong communicator, and someone who takes ownership of their work. You do not need years of experience — we will train you. What we cannot train is attitude, reliability, and attention to detail. To show us you have that, tell us who scored the most goal in the 2022 men's world cup — sometimes it tells us more than a resume ever could.

Experience with tools like GoHighLevel, automation platforms, or AI tools is a bonus — but curiosity and the ability to learn fast matter more.

You must be available during US hours — at least half a day overlap with either 8am–12pm EST or 12pm–7pm EST, Monday to Friday. A stable internet connection is required. We will ask you to do a screenshare during the interview process.



Compensation



$3.00 USD per hour, full-time. We start with a two-week paid trial. Strong performers grow with us — this is a long-term opportunity, not a short-term gig.



How to Apply



Start your message with "I read the full post" — anything that does not include this phrase will not be reviewed.



Then answer the following:



What is your degree and when did you graduate?

What is one tech or automation tool you have used and how did you use it?



Finally, attach a screenshot of your internet speed test to your application. You can run one free at 
.

title: Sales Development Representative & Customer Success Associate
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking an experienced, results-driven Senior Sales Development Representative (SDR) with deep expertise in outbound prospecting. This role is perfect for someone who can own the entire outbound process—from identifying prospects to engaging them and providing long-term support—while generating high-quality leads and delivering valuable market insights.



Key Responsibilities:

Outbound Prospecting: Build high-value lead lists from scratch, leveraging LinkedIn and advanced prospecting tools.

Lead Generation & Execution: Own the front-line outreach through cold calling and personalized
ing campaigns to secure meetings with key stakeholders.

Client Engagement & Success: Act as a bridge between sales and support; speak with prospects and existing customers to gather feedback and ensure their needs are met throughout the sales process.

Strategic Outreach: Develop and execute comprehensive LinkedIn outreach strategies to maximize engagement and conversion rates.

Process Optimization: Advise on sales workflow improvements and maintain impeccable CRM hygiene to ensure data-driven decision-making.

Market Intelligence: Act as the "eyes and ears" of the company, sharing customer insights with internal teams to help shape our product and marketing strategies.



Qualifications & Experience 

Senior-Level Expertise: Proven experience in B2B sales development (SDR or BD roles) with a heavy focus on outbound strategies.

Lead Generation Mastery: Expert-level skills in building targeted lead lists and running multi-channel LinkedIn outreach campaigns.

Technical Proficiency: Strong track record of optimizing sales workflows and managing CRM systems (e.g., Salesforce, HubSpot).

Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English skills; you must be comfortable navigating complex conversations with professional prospects.

Ownership Mentality: Self-motivated and highly organized, with the ability to manage the end-to-end outbound process independently.



Why Join Us?

This role offers the opportunity to play a pivotal part in our growth. You will have the autonomy to build processes, the support to close deals, and a compensation structure that rewards your direct impact on the business.



How to Apply?

To apply for this position, please fill out the application form below. Once you have submitted the form, send us a message with the word Radio

We are seeking a skilled Service Manager to lead our remote service team, ensuring exceptional support and long-term satisfaction for our commercial cleaning clients across Canada.

mbers to meet our communication and service delivery standards.

title: Business Development Specialist, Affiliate Partnerships
description:
Dreambound helps Americans find purposeful work by connecting people with training programs—from trade schools to colleges—that help them build better careers. We’re a fast-growing company (4x last year), backed by top investors like Union Square Ventures and Arrive (Roc Nation).



As we grow our network of educational partners and affiliates, we're looking for a driven Business Development Specialist to help us build and scale those relationships.



The Role

As a Business Development Specialist focused on Affiliate Partnerships, you'll own the full lifecycle of our affiliate program — from prospecting and closing new partners to onboarding them and ensuring they're set up for long-term success. You'll be a key driver of Dreambound's growth, helping us expand our reach into new markets and program categories.



This is a high-impact, high-ownership role ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment and is excited to build partnerships from the ground up.



Please use the code DreamTeam when applying through the link below.



What You'll Do

- Identify, prospect, and help close new affiliate partners that align with Dreambound's audience and growth goals.

- Own the end-to-end partner onboarding experience, ensuring new affiliates are fully set up, adhere to compliance regulations, and activated quickly.

- Help manage and nurture an ongoing portfolio of affiliate partners, serving as their primary point of contact and trusted advisor.

- Monitor and optimize affiliate performance by balancing key metrics like earnings per click (EPC) and return on ad spend (ROAS) — ensuring we're driving quality traffic, not just volume.

- Develop and maintain partner performance metrics; proactively identify opportunities to optimize affiliate outcomes.

- Track and report on pipeline activity, partner health, and revenue contribution.

- Stay on top of industry trends and competitive landscape to identify new partnership opportunities.



What We're Looking For

- At least 1 year of experience in affiliate marketing, performance marketing, or business development - ideally in edtech, marketplace, or performance marketing environments.

- Strong communicator with excellent written and verbal skills — you can build rapport quickly and explain complex programs simply.

- Highly organized and self-directed; comfortable managing a large portfolio of partners remotely.

- Comfortable reading and interpreting performance data — you can look at metrics like EPC, ROAS, conversion rates, and traffic quality and draw actionable conclusions from them.

description:

We are a growing short-term rental (STR) business seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Bookkeeper to manage and maintain accurate financial records.

- Graduate of Accountancy or any related field

Position Details:

- Opportunity to grow with a scaling business



How to Apply:

1. Your experience with QuickBooks Online

2. Your background in accounting or bookkeeping

3. Any experience in the STR or real estate industry (if applicable)

4. A short introduction about yourself



Note:

We are looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and can maintain accurate financial records with minimal supervision.

title: Marketing Strategist, Lead Generation & Content Creator (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Marketing Strategist, Lead Generation & Content Creator (Full-Time, Remote)

We are hiring a full-time Marketing Expert to take ownership of lead generation and growth for one client with two separate businesses.



About the Businesses:



The Corner Butcher Shop --

Local meat delivery business (no shipping)

Focused on selling curated meat boxes to local customers



Allegiance Security Integration (ASI) --

Commercial security integration company

Services include surveillance systems, access control, and SCIF buildouts

Primary markets: Washington DC, Texas, and Idaho



This is NOT a Basic Social Media Job

This is not a “posting” role.

We are looking for someone who can both develop marketing strategy and execute it, including creating content that drives results.



Position Type

Full-time (required)

Long-term position

Opportunity to grow with the team



Primary Responsibility:

Your main goal is to generate qualified leads and customers.

You will be responsible for both strategy and execution, including content creation, to drive measurable business growth.

Responsibilities

Develop and execute marketing strategies for both businesses

Generate leads through:

Social media (organic, strategy-driven)

SEO and website optimization

Funnels and landing pages

 marketing (if applicable)

Any additional channels you recommend

Create and edit social media content, including:

Short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Basic graphics or visual content if needed

Take initiative and recommend what should be done without needing constant direction

Analyze performance and continuously improve results

Communicate performance, insights, and next steps clearly

Collaborate with a manager (you will be guided, but not micromanaged)

Content Creation & Video Editing (Required)

You must be comfortable creating and editing content yourself.

Ability to create engaging short-form video content

Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and retention

Experience with tools such as CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar

Ability to take raw ideas or direction and turn them into finished content

Requirements

Proven experience in marketing strategy and lead generation

Ability to both plan and execute marketing efforts

Strong understanding of:

Social media growth strategies

SEO and website optimization

Conversion-focused marketing

Ability to work independently and take initiative

Data-driven mindset with the ability to track and improve performance

Strong communication skills



This Role is Not a Fit For:

Individuals who only know how to post content without strategy

Individuals who only want to do strategy but not execute

Those who require constant direction for daily tasks

Beginners without proven marketing results



What Success Looks Like:

Consistent flow of qualified leads

Increased local visibility for The Corner Butcher Shop

Increased commercial inquiries for ASI

High-performing content that drives engagement and conversions



Preferred (Not Required):

Experience with local service-based businesses

Experience with B2B or high-ticket services

Funnel building experience

Paid advertising experience (Meta, Google, etc.)



How to Apply:

Please include the following:

- A short introduction outlining your experience

- Examples of measurable results you have achieved (leads, growth, campaigns, etc.)

- Examples of content you have created, including short-form videos

- A brief explanation of what strategies you would use for:

             - A local meat delivery business

             - A commercial security company



We are looking for someone who can take ownership, think strategically, create content, and produce real results.

We're Structure Flows. We build

We're looking for someone with real hands-on experience doing this kind of work to join us on an on-demand basis.

Your own media buying

Running structures for clients

Working inside an ad agency

title: Senior Sales Marketing Manager
description:
Perseverance With Poise LLC is an identity and transformation coaching company founded by Darnetta Richardson, a registered nurse with over ten years of experience in hospice care. We partner with healthcare facilities to address the root cause of nursing resignation — not the symptoms — through the POISE Identity Experience, a structured twelve-week program that restores the personal identity of nurses from the inside out. Our work does not live on a wellness app or a recognition board; it lives in the kind of transformation that changes how a nurse shows up, communicates, and leads.



What We Are Looking For

We are looking for a B2B Sales Manager who understands that closing a high-ticket partnership with a healthcare facility is not about pressure — it is about trust, diagnosis, and mission alignment. You will be the first voice a Chief Nursing Officer, Administrator, or HR Director hears after our Masterclass, and that conversation has to reflect the same standard of care that defines everything we do. If you are a high-pressure closer looking for a commission-only hustle, this is not the right seat. If you are a consultative communicator who can hold space with executives and move them toward a decision with confidence and integrity, we want to hear from you.



Responsibilities

You will conduct professional Discovery Calls with executive-level healthcare leads, guiding them from curiosity to commitment through consultative conversation rather than a scripted pitch. You will manage the full transition from our Signature Talk funnel to a closed facility partnership, maintaining the integrity of the brand at every touchpoint. You will qualify leads using a deep understanding of identity erosion in nursing, and you will handle complex B2B objections — including budget, time, and clinical safety — with directness, empathy, and strategic clarity.



Qualifications

2-3 years of experience with cold calling

experience in the healthcare or coaching industry is considered a strong advantage. 

Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills, preferably with a neutral or American accent suited to our US-based client base. 

Comfortable in executive-level conversations and do not need a script to hold authority in the room. You understand the psychology of a high-ticket investment and know how to reframe cost as a strategic decision rather than an expense. Above all, you align naturally with Darnetta's brand standard — authoritative, empathetic, mission-driven, and never in a rush to close.





To Apply

Record a 1-2 minute video introduction sharing why the concept of identity erosion in nursing resonates with you and one example of how you navigated a complex objection in your past experience. Submit your video link and resume.



We review every application personally. If your approach reflects the standard this role requires, you will hear from us directly.

title: QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise & Goflow Expert: Full Charge Bookkeeper (Part-Time)
description:
Hours: Part-Time (20 Hours/Week | 4 Hours/Day)

Schedule: Preferred overlap with US EST Business Hours (e.g., 8:00 PM – 12:00 AM PHT), with some flexibility.

Compensation: $8.00 – $12.00 USD / hour (Depending on Goflow/QuickBooks Desktop experience).



Job Summary



We are seeking a highly skilled Full Charge Bookkeeper to manage our US-based company’s entire accounting cycle and inventory systems. The ideal candidate is an expert in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise and has hands-on experience with Goflow. You will be responsible for financial accuracy, inventory reconciliation, and professional communication with US vendors and customers to resolve A/P and A/R discrepancies.



Key Responsibilities:



• Full-Cycle Accounting: Maintain the general ledger, perform bank/merchant reconciliations, and execute month-end and year-end closing procedures in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise.

• Inventory & Goflow Management: Manage data synchronization between Goflow and QuickBooks. Track stock levels, reconcile physical counts, and perform Excel-based data analysis for accurate COGS reporting.

• A/P & A/R (AP/AR) Liaison: Proactively resolve billing discrepancies with vendors and conduct professional collection outreach to customers via
 and scheduled calls.

• Reporting: Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet) and cash flow reports for management.



Required Skills & Qualifications:



• Technical Skills:

•• Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise is mandatory.

•• High-level Microsoft Excel skills (VLOOKUPs, Pivot Tables).

•• Prior experience with Goflow or similar multi-channel inventory platforms (e.g., Cin7, Fishbowl).



• Experience: 5+ years of Full Charge Bookkeeping for US-based e-commerce or product businesses.

• Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English; proven experience in US Vendor Management and diplomatic customer collections.

• Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy or Finance (CPA preferred).





Compensation & Benefits:



• Trial Period: Position begins with a 3-month (90-day) probationary period.

• Post-Probation "Gold Standard" Benefits (After 3 Months):

• • 13th-Month Pay: Accrual begins upon successful regularization.

• • Monthly Health Insurance (HMO) Allowance.

• • Internet & Utility Stipend: To support your home office setup.

• • Paid Time Off (PTO): Accrual begins after 6 months of service.

• Growth Potential: This role is intended to grow into a full-time (40 hours/week) position as the business scales.



How to Apply:



To be considered for this position, please follow these instructions carefully:



1. Use the subject line: "QuickBooks Expert – [Your Name] – GOFLOW".

2. Attach a link to your updated OnlineJobs.ph profile.

3. Briefly describe your experience managing inventory between Goflow and QuickBooks Desktop.



Note: Applications without the secret word "GOFLOW" in the subject line will be automatically disqualified.

description:

ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

title: CRM & Automation Specialist (Close / GoHighLevel / Zapier) — Info Coaching Launches
description:
About the Role:



I run high-ticket coaching and info-product launches ($1,500 to $4,000 offers) using 3-day challenge funnels, VSL funnels, and webinar funnels. I handle marketing, content, offer strategy, client relationships, and managing the sales team myself.



I need someone to own the entire technical backend — the CRM, Zapier automations, Airtable reporting, Slack notifications, and the sales process plumbing that holds it all together.



You are NOT managing people. You are NOT training the sales team. You are NOT doing marketing. You are building, connecting, and maintaining the systems the team runs on.



Multiple launches coming up in the next 2 to 3 months, with at least 1 to 2 clients likely to continue long-term. Plenty of runway for the right person.







What You'll Actually Do:



1. CRM Build-Out (Close CRM or GoHighLevel)



- Full pipeline from scratch: Registered, Showed Up, Applied, Call Booked, Closed Mid-Ticket, Closed High-Ticket, No-Show, Dead



- Opportunity tags ($1,500 vs $4,000), source tags (IG,
, SMS, Webinar, VSL)



- Custom fields, Smart Views per rep, workflows firing on stage changes

Triple-dial cadence with auto-generated tasks (Dial 1, wait 5 min, Dial 2, wait 15 min, Dial 3, auto-SMS, next-day task)







2. Zapier Automations (25 to 30 zaps)



- Typeform registration to CRM contact plus tag plus Slack #leads ping



- WebinarJam attended to CRM stage updates per day



- Calendly booking to Slack #bookings plus warming sequence plus 24h/2h/30min reminders



- Fanbasis/Whop successful payment to Slack #wins plus onboarding plus 
 invite plus Whop access



- Failed payment to Slack #failed-payments plus closer task within 30 min



- Speed-to-lead alert (lead unworked over 5 min triggers Slack DM to dialer)



- No-show recovery, dispute handling, partial Typeform abandonment recovery



- EOD Airtable form submitted to auto-summary in Slack







3. Airtable Accountability Systems





- EOD report forms for dialers, closers, and DM setters



- Tracks dials, connects, sets, shows, pitches, closes, revenue, AOV



- Flows into Slack and feeds dashboards







4. Slack Operations Hub (15 to 20 channels with automated feeds)



#announcements, #leads, #bookings, #wins, #kpis, #successful-payments, #failed-payments, #no-shows, #post-call-notes, #qualified-applications, #free-course-opt-ins, #canceled-calls, #disputes-resolution, #selfie-video-requests, #dialer-eod-reports, #closer-eod-reports, #setter-eod-reports





5.
 and SMS Sequence Setup (ConvertKit and SendBlue)

I write the copy — you load it and set the trigger rules:





- Pre-challenge reminder sequences (6 weeks of hype)



- Post-challenge sequences (4 buckets based on lead behavior)



- Follow-up, nurture flows, and existing list broadcasts







6. Notion Documentation

Document the backend systems you build (CRM flow, Zap logic, Airtable process, troubleshooting guide). You're NOT writing sales scripts — that's on me.







What You Will NOT Be Doing

This role is 100% technical backend. You will not be:





- Managing or training the sales team



- Doing marketing, content, or ad work



- Writing sales scripts or SOPs for reps



- Running calls or talking to leads





Pure systems work — build it, connect it, test it, maintain it, fix it when it breaks.





Tools You Must Know

Expert-level required:





- Close CRM or GoHighLevel



- Zapier (multi-step, filters, paths, webhooks)





Solid hands-on required:

Typeform, Calendly, WebinarJam, ConvertKit, SendBlue, Airtable, Slack







Requirements



- Minimum 1 year in sales ops or CRM automation specifically for info products, online coaching, or high-ticket consulting (NOT e-commerce, NOT SaaS, NOT real estate)





- Built at least 2 CRM pipelines from scratch





- Built 15 plus multi-step Zaps with filters and branching logic





- Understand dialer/closer/setter workflows, triple-dialing, and speed-to-lead





4 plus hours/day overlap with US Eastern Time (9 AM to 9 PM ET)

Can start this week









Do Not Apply If You Are:





- A generic virtual assistant



- A Zapier freelancer who has never worked with a sales team



- A marketer or funnel builder



- A beginner planning to learn Close or GoHighLevel on my dime









Compensation and Structure:



Paid 2-week trial: $500 to $750 flat for first launch backend build



If trial goes well: Monthly retainer of $1,500 to $2,000/month for ongoing builds and maintenance

Multiple launches coming up with 1 to 2 clients likely long-term



Paid weekly via Wise, Payoneer, or PayPal





Hours:

30 to 40 hours/week during trial and active launches. Reduced maintenance hours between launches. Must overlap 4 plus hours/day with US Eastern Time.





Start Date:

Immediately — this week. First launch backend must be live and tested within 2 weeks.





How to Apply — All 6 Required:

Applications missing any of these will be automatically rejected.





1. Loom walkthrough (5 to 10 min) of a real Close CRM or GoHighLevel pipeline you built from scratch — show stages, tags, Smart Views, and workflows



2. Screenshot or Loom of a real multi-step Zapier zap with filters and at least one branching path, with explanation



3. One info-coaching launch you have worked on — offer, your role, what you built (NDAs okay, just describe)



4. Your rates — trial rate AND monthly retainer rate



5. Your time zone and daily ET overlap



6. Answer in 2 to 3 sentences: What is a triple-dial cadence, how do you build it in a CRM, and why does it matter for speed-to-lead?



I'm not reading text-only applications. Send the Loom — I need to see the actual work.

description:

Core Responsibilities



Candidate Outreach

Send targeted outreach via LinkedIn and
 aligned to live roles

CV Generation

Ensure CVs are clear, presentable and aligned to role requirements

Maintain speed and consistency in delivering candidates



Spec CV Activity



Identify strong candidates suitable for speculative introduction

Share profiles into target companies to generate client interest

Work closely with founder to align on which profiles to push and where



Talent Pool Build



Build and maintain organised talent pools of Dutch speaking engineers

Keep data clean, accurate and usable for future roles

title: Digital Marketing Coordinator (Remote, Part-Time ? Full-Time)
description:
## About the Role



We're a portfolio of small businesses based in British Columbia, Canada spanning financial services, equipment rental, and local media. We're looking for a sharp, versatile Digital Marketing Coordinator to support marketing, content, and community operations across all three businesses.



This is not a typical VA role. You'll be working alongside AI-powered tools and agents that handle content drafting, research, and data analysis. Your job is the human layer — the outreach, the design polish, the community engagement, the ad optimization, and the creative judgment that AI can't replace. You'll be the person who takes good AI-generated drafts and makes them great, who builds real relationships with partners and audiences, and who keeps the marketing engine running smoothly across multiple brands.



We're looking for someone who genuinely understands marketing — not just execution, but strategy. Someone who can look at a campaign and tell us what's working and what isn't, and who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do next.



EXCEPTIONAL WORK GETS REWARDED — WE OFFER PERFORMANCE BONUSES FOR TEA
MBERS WHO CONSISTENTLY GO ABOVE AND BEYOND AND DELIVER REAL RESULTS.



## What You'll Be Doing



**Content & Design**

- Create and refine social media graphics, ad creatives, thumbnails, and marketing materials in Canva (or similar tools)

- Edit short-form video content for social platforms (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style clips) using CapCut, Premiere, or similar

- Polish and format blog posts, newsletters, and marketing
s

- Maintain brand consistency across all visual outputs for multiple brands

- Create presentation decks and simple PDF reports when needed



**Advertising & Campaigns**

- Set up, manage, and optimize
/Instagram ad campaigns

- Monitor ad performance, adjust targeting, budgets, and creatives based on results

- Run A/B tests on ad copy, images, and audiences

- Provide regular reporting on campaign metrics with actionable insights

- Experience with Google Ads is a plus but not required



**Outreach & Relationship Building**

- Research and reach out to potential podcast guests, partners, and collaborators

- Send personalized outreach
s (not templates — real, thoughtful outreach)

- Follow up professionally and manage ongoing communication threads

- Coordinate with local businesses for advertising, sponsorships, and partnerships

- Build and maintain a contact database of media contacts, partners, and prospects



**Community & Social Media**

- Moderate
 groups and social media communities (respond to comments, flag issues, keep conversations positive)

- Schedule and publish social media content across platforms

- Monitor engagement and surface trends, popular topics, and community feedback

- Grow community membership through organic engagement strategies



**Operations Support**

- Upload and format content in WordPress

- Manage newsletter sends via Beehiiv or similar platforms

- Organize files, assets, and project trackers

- Coordinate with the team on priorities and deadlines



## What We're Looking For



**Required:**

- 2+ years of hands-on digital marketing experience (not just social media posting — actual campaign strategy and execution)

- Strong Canva skills — you can create professional-looking graphics quickly, not just use templates

- Video editing capability — at minimum short-form social video (CapCut, Premiere Rush, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-
/Meta Ads Manager experience — you've run campaigns, managed budgets, and optimized for results

- Excellent written English — your outreach
s and social copy need to sound natural, professional, and human

- Self-starter mentality — you manage your own time, flag problems proactively, and don't need to be micromanaged

- Comfortable working with AI tools — you'll be collaborating with AI systems daily and need to be adaptable



**Strongly Preferred:**

- Experience with WordPress (uploading posts, basic page edits)

- Newsletter platform experience (Beehiiv, Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or similar)

- Understanding of SEO fundamentals (keywords, meta descriptions, internal linking)

- Google Ads experience

- Podcast production or guest coordination experience

- Basic understanding of analytics (Google Analytics, Meta Insights, UTM tracking)



**Bonus Points:**

- Figma or Adobe Creative Suite skills

- Experience working with multiple brands or businesses simultaneously

- Background in local media, real estate, financial services, or small business marketing

- Photography or original content creation ability

- Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, etc.)



## Working Arrangement



- **Start:** Part-time, 20 hours/week

- **Growth:** Opportunity to expand to full-time based on performance and mutual fit

- **Schedule:** Flexible hours with some overlap required during Pacific Time (PT) business hours for communication

- **Communication:** Slack or similar for daily communication, weekly video check-in

- **Trial:** Initial 2-week paid trial period to ensure mutual fit



## How to Apply



Please include in your proposal:



1. A brief intro about your marketing experience — specifically, tell us about a campaign you managed and what results you achieved

2. Links to 2-3 examples of your design work (Canva graphics, social posts, ad creatives, video edits — whatever shows your best work)

3. Your experience with
/Meta ads — have you managed budgets? What was the largest monthly spend you've handled?

4. Your hourly rate in USD

5. Your typical availability (hours per day, days per week, timezone)



**Please do NOT send a generic proposal.** We will ignore copy-paste applications. Show us you actually read this posting and tell us why you're a good fit for this specific role.



We're building something exciting and want someone who's genuinely good at what they do, not just checking boxes. If you're the kind of person who sees a brand's social media and immediately thinks "I'd do this differently" — we want to hear from you.

title: Healthcare Virtual Assistant
description:
The Health Virtual Assistant (HVA) provides high-level remote support across administrative, clinical, and technical functions. You will be the backbone of the clinic, responsible for:



Managing patient communications and data entry.



Navigating EHR systems to ensure seamless record-keeping.



Optimizing clinic efficiency and reducing provider burnout.



Upholding strict HIPAA compliance and data security.



Required skills:  Medical Terminology preferred but not required, Technical Ability, Multitasking, Detail Oriented, Ability to work independently in a remote environment, Strong written and verbal communication skills. 



Shift: Weekends only, and on-call on weekdays is expected.

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Client Success and Coaching Manager – $1,100/month
description:

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain

- No graveyard shifts

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

What You’ll Do

- Reply to messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

Important Note: This role requires regular proactive follow-up with clients. If you're not comfortable with this, please consider carefully before applying - it's a core part of the position.



What We’re Looking For

- Confident on Zoom calls

- Organized and detail-oriented

Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.



How to Apply



Send a message with “CSM” as the subject line.



Include ONLY:



#1: Your CV

#4: One sentence explaining why you are a strong fit

Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.
